examples.english: She's dyed her hair red -- it looks so unnatural.
examples.chinese: 她把头发染成了红色—看上去很不自然。

examples.english: The boy wore a headdress of dyed ostrich feathers.
examples.chinese: 这个男孩戴着一顶由染过色的鸵鸟毛做成的头饰。

examples.english: To play the part, Kensit had to bleach her hair and gain 20 pounds.
examples.chinese: 为了扮演那个角色，肯西特必须使头发颜色变淡并增重20磅。

examples.english: I'm going to bleach these curtains and see if I can get the stains out.
examples.chinese: 我想把窗帘漂白一下，看看是否能除掉污渍。

examples.english: The beach was full of bleached blondes.
examples.chinese: 海滩上全是头发染成金色的女人。

centers.english: to lose colour

examples.english: Over the years the green paint had faded.
examples.chinese: 经年累月，绿色的油漆已褪色了。

examples.english: Your natural hair colour begins to fade as you grow older, and eventually you go grey.
examples.chinese: 头发原来的颜色会随着年龄的增长而变淡，最终成了灰白色。

examples.english: The curtains that were at one time bright and cheerful were now faded and torn.
examples.chinese: 一度鲜艳夺目的窗帘现已破旧褪色了。

examples.english: Will this shirt lose its colour if you wash it?
examples.chinese: 这件衬衫洗涤后会掉颜色吗？

examples.english: Red onions lose their color when cooked.
examples.chinese: 烹调的时候红洋葱会褪色。

examples.english: It is usually advisable to wash new clothes separately as they tend to run.
examples.chinese: 新衣服容易渗色，一般建议单独洗涤。

centers.english: water/hole/snow/sand

examples.english: Be careful. The water's quite deep here.
examples.chinese: 小心，这里水很深。

examples.english: The hole was deeper than they thought.
examples.chinese: 这个洞比他们想的要深。

examples.english: Larry had a deep cut on his left leg.
examples.chinese: 拉里的左腿上有一条很深的刀伤。

examples.english: The pond gets much deeper in the middle.
examples.chinese: 水塘的中间要深得多。

examples.english: To the child the hole seemed like a bottomless pit.
examples.chinese: 在这孩子看来，这个洞就像个深不见底的坑。

examples.english: In the dream, I was falling and falling in a bottomless abyss.
examples.chinese: 在梦中我掉啊掉啊，一直落入无底的深渊。

examples.english: Who knows what creatures live in the depths of the ocean?
examples.chinese: 谁知道海洋深处生活着什么样的生物?

examples.english: As I hiked around the volcano, clouds of steam rose up from the depths of the Earth.
examples.chinese: 我在火山周围远足时，大团大团的蒸汽从地底深处冒出来。

centers.english: a long distance below the surface

examples.english: As we dug deeper, we uncovered a large wooden chest.
examples.chinese: 我们掘至更深处时发现了一个大木箱。

examples.english: Turtles lay their eggs deep in the sand and leave them there until they hatch.
examples.chinese: 海龟把蛋深深地产在沙里，并把它们留在那里直到孵化。

examples.english: Earthquakes are caused by movements deep below the Earth's surface.
examples.chinese: 地震是由地表深处的运动引起的。

examples.english: Crews are working deep underground to build the tunnel.
examples.chinese: 数队工作人员在地下深处建造隧道。

examples.english: They found rock with gold in it deeply buried beneath the earth's surface.
examples.chinese: 他们发现有含金的岩石深埋在地底下。

examples.english: It is said that there is an ancient city deeply submerged in this part of the ocean.
examples.chinese: 据说有一座古城深深地淹没在这片海洋里。

examples.english: The road followed the deeply cut river valley.
examples.chinese: 这条路沿着深开的河谷一直下去。

centers.english: how deep something is

examples.english: How deep was the snow?
examples.chinese: 雪有多深？

examples.english: I wasn't sure how deep the water was and I didn't want to swim out too far.
examples.chinese: 我不清楚这水有多深，我也不想游出去太远。

examples.english: The pool is only five feet deep.
examples.chinese: 这水池才5英尺深。

examples.english: The snow is over two metres deep.
examples.chinese: 这积雪有两米多厚。

examples.english: After the floods, the streets had become ankle-deep streams.
examples.chinese: 洪水之后，街道都成了齐脚踝深的小溪了。

examples.english: The depth of the pond varies with the rainfall.
examples.chinese: 这水塘的深浅随降雨量多少而有变化。

examples.english: The plants need sand with a depth of at least 10 to 15 cm to grow.
examples.chinese: 这些植物需要至少10至15厘米深的沙土才能生长。

centers.english: not deep

examples.english: The babies splashed around at the shallow end of the pool.
examples.chinese: 小宝宝们在水池浅的那一端戏水。

examples.english: The river is too shallow for our boat.
examples.chinese: 这河太浅，我们的船通不过。

examples.english: Come on in - the water isn't very deep.
examples.chinese: 下来吧，水不深。

examples.english: The wound isn't very deep so it shouldn't take long to heal.
examples.chinese: 伤口不是很深，所以应该很快就会愈合。

centers.english: weather

examples.english: Weather patterns have been changing as a result of global warming.
examples.chinese: 因全球气候变暖，气候模式已经发生了变化。

examples.english: What was the weather like on your vacation?
examples.chinese: 你度假时的天气怎么样?

examples.english: We want to have a picnic on Saturday, but it depends on the weather.
examples.chinese: 我们想周六去野餐，但是要看天气。

examples.english: a period of warm sunny weather
examples.chinese: 一段时间的阳光明媚的暖和天气

examples.english: I don't like going to work on my bike in wet weather.
examples.chinese: 我下雨天不喜欢骑自行车上班。

examples.english: We'll play softball in the park tomorrow, weather permitting.
examples.chinese: 天气好的话，我们明天去公园打垒球。

examples.english: What's it like in Spain at this time of year? Is it really hot?
examples.chinese: 现在这个时候西班牙的天气怎么样？很热吗？

examples.english: The weather forecast says it's going to be cloudy tomorrow.
examples.chinese: 天气预报说明天多云。

examples.english: It was cool and sunny when we left this morning.
examples.chinese: 我们早上走的时候天气凉爽而且晴朗。

examples.english: Queensland has a warm tropical climate.
examples.chinese: 昆士兰天气暖和，是热带气候。

examples.english: These flowers will not grow in a cold climate.
examples.chinese: 这些花在寒冷的气候下不会生长。

examples.english: The climate of southern Florida attracts thousands of tourists each winter.
examples.chinese: 佛罗里达州南部的气候每年冬天都会吸引成千上万的旅游者。

examples.english: The recent floods are said to be caused by climate change in the northern hemisphere.
examples.chinese: 最近发生的水灾据说是由于北半球气候变化造成的。

examples.english: Conditions are perfect for today's boat race.
examples.chinese: 这天气正适合今天的划船比赛。

examples.english: If the conditions are really bad we'll have to postpone the trip and stay at home.
examples.chinese: 如果天气真的很糟糕，我们将不得不推迟这次旅行而留在家里。

examples.english: We can expect a return to normal weather conditions this weekend.
examples.chinese: 我们可以预料这个周末恢复正常天气。

examples.english: Freezing conditions are making the roads extremely hazardous and drivers are warned to take extra care.
examples.chinese: 严寒的天气使路面情况极其危险，司机注意开车时要格外小心。

centers.english: connected with the weather

examples.english: toxic gases that threaten the earth's climatic balance
examples.chinese: 威胁地球气候平衡的有毒气体

examples.english: The types of rice grown in a country depend on climatic conditions.
examples.chinese: 一个国家种植的稻米种类取决于气候环境。

examples.english: Climatic changes are caused by the increasing levels of carbon dioxide in the atmosphere.
examples.chinese: 气候变化是由大气中二氧化碳的含量不断增加而引起的。

examples.english: Meteorological reports are fed into a computer, which helps scientists make accurate predictions about the weather.
examples.chinese: 气象报告输入电脑，这有助于科学家对天气作出准确的预报。

examples.english: His meteorological observations resulted in a theory of how tropical storms arise in the Gulf of Mexico.
examples.chinese: 他对气象的观察得出了墨西哥湾热带风暴如何形成的理论。

examples.english: Snow crystals form when atmospheric conditions turn water vapour into ice.
examples.chinese: 大气环境将水蒸气转变为冰就形成了雪晶体。

examples.english: The cylinder swelled and contracted with the changing atmospheric pressure.
examples.chinese: 随着大气压力的变化，圆筒会膨胀和收缩。

centers.english: information about the weather

examples.english: The weather forecast predicted blizzards for Scotland.
examples.chinese: 天气预报预计苏格兰有暴风雪。

examples.english: ‘Do you think it's going to rain?’ ‘Well it said so on the weather forecast.’
examples.chinese: “你认为会下雨吗？”“嗯，天气预报是这么说的。

examples.english: There are weather reports every hour to keep you up to date with driving conditions in your area.
examples.chinese: 每小时都有天气预报，让你驾车时知道所在地区的最新天气情况。

examples.english: And now over to the London Weather Centre for the latest weather report.
examples.chinese: 现在由伦敦气象中心报告最新的天气情况。

examples.english: The news from your area will follow the weather in five minutes time.
examples.chinese: 地区新闻在五分钟后紧接天气预报之后播出。

examples.english: I'm afraid the outlook isn't very good -- they say it's going to rain tomorrow.
examples.chinese: 恐怕天气不太好——天气预测明天会下雨。

expressions.text: the outlook for tomorrow/the weekend etc

examples.english: The outlook for the weekend is for continued sunny weather.
examples.chinese: 周末的天气预测是继续晴朗的天气。

centers.english: good weather

examples.english: We go to Greece every Easter, and we usually get good weather.
examples.chinese: 每年复活节我们都去希腊，通常都是好天气。

examples.english: We had good weather apart from one day of heavy rain.
examples.chinese: 除了有一天下大雨，我们遇到的都是好天气。

examples.english: You must be ready to take advantage of any spell of good weather.
examples.chinese: 碰到有一段时间的好天气你就要好好利用。

examples.english: Sometimes, in good weather, he walked to work across the fields.
examples.chinese: 他偶尔会在天气好的时候，穿过农田走路上班。

examples.english: It was a glorious day with blue skies.
examples.chinese: 那天风和日丽，碧空如洗。

examples.english: We had three weeks of absolutely gorgeous weather.
examples.chinese: 我们有一连三个星期的极好的天气。

examples.english: What's happened to the weather? It was beautiful last week.
examples.chinese: 天气怎么了？上周天气还很好呢。

examples.english: Morning, Bill. Nice weather, isn't it?
examples.chinese: 早上好，比尔，天气可真好，是吗？

expressions.text: it's a nice day/it's a lovely morning etc

examples.english: It's a lovely day - why don't we go for a walk?
examples.chinese: 天气真好—我们为什么不去散步呢？

examples.english: Next week will be fine but a little cooler.
examples.chinese: 下周天气晴朗，但是有点凉。

examples.english: a fine spring evening
examples.chinese: 一个晴朗的春夜

examples.english: It can take several days of fine weather for the grass to dry out.
examples.chinese: 要几天好天气草地才能干透。

examples.english: The dry weather will continue for several days
examples.chinese: 干燥的天气将持续几天。

examples.english: Southern areas should stay dry until the early evening.
examples.chinese: 傍晚之前，南部地区天气仍干燥。

examples.english: During the dry season, many of the swamps turn to hard-baked mud.
examples.chinese: 旱季期间，许多沼泽地变成了硬邦邦的泥地。

examples.english: a lovely sunny afternoon
examples.chinese: 一个美好的、阳光明媚的下午

examples.english: It's going to be sunny all day.
examples.chinese: 全天都将阳光明媚。

examples.english: The weather will remain dry with sunny spells.
examples.chinese: 天气仍将干燥，间或有阳光。

examples.english: We sat on the patio enjoying the autumn sunshine.
examples.chinese: 我们坐在露台上，享受着秋日的阳光。

examples.english: Northern regions will start dry with some sunshine.
examples.chinese: 北方地区时有阳光，开始干燥起来。

examples.english: I get a rash every time I go in the sun.
examples.chinese: 我每次晒了太阳就出疹子。

examples.english: Put the plant on a window sill in the sun.
examples.chinese: 把那盆植物放到窗台上晒晒太阳。

examples.english: We spent all day lazing around in the sun.
examples.chinese: 我们整天都在懒洋洋地晒太阳。

centers.english: bad weather

examples.english: The game was cancelled because of bad weather.
examples.chinese: 由于天气不好，比赛取消。

examples.english: Once this spell of bad weather is over, we can start work on the garden.
examples.chinese: 这段坏天气一过去，我们就可以开始弄花园了。

examples.english: At least 20 people died when the aircraft crashed in bad weather.
examples.chinese: 飞机在恶劣的天气中坠毁，至少20人死亡。

examples.english: Awful weather, isn't it?
examples.chinese: 天气真糟糕，是吗?

examples.english: ‘What's it like outside?’ ‘Terrible.’
examples.chinese: “外面天气怎么样？”“很糟糕。”

examples.english: It's been absolutely horrible all day.
examples.chinese: 一整天天气糟糕透了。

centers.english: weather that changes a lot

examples.english: More unsettled weather is forecast for the weekend.
examples.chinese: 预报周末天气更不稳定。

examples.english: Tomorrow will continue unsettled, with showers in most areas.
examples.chinese: 明天天气仍不稳定，大部分地区有阵雨。

examples.english: The British weather is very changeable.
examples.chinese: 英国的天气变化无常。

examples.english: The changeable weather that November brings can lead to foggy conditions.
examples.chinese: 11月份的无常天气可导致雾天。

centers.english: hot weather

examples.english: We had three weeks of very hot weather.
examples.chinese: 我们有三个星期天气非常炎热。

examples.english: It was the hottest summer this century.
examples.chinese: 这是本世纪最炎热的夏天。

examples.english: Isn't it hot today?
examples.chinese: 今天天气不热吗？

examples.english: It's boiling out here! Let's go inside and get a cool drink.
examples.chinese: 这儿热得很！我们进去喝杯冷饮吧。

examples.english: It was a boiling hot day, and the kids were out playing in the pool.
examples.chinese: 天气酷热难当，小孩子在外面的水池里玩耍。

examples.english: I'm looking forward to some warmer weather.
examples.chinese: 我盼望着天气稍为暖和些。

examples.english: It was nice and warm in the sunshine.
examples.chinese: 太阳底下暖烘烘的。

examples.english: It seems quite mild for February.
examples.chinese: 对于2月份的天气来说似乎相当暖和。

examples.english: Some plants will survive outside during a mild winter.
examples.chinese: 暖冬季节，有些植物可以在室外存活。

examples.english: Tokyo is very humid in summer.
examples.chinese: 东京的夏季非常潮湿。

examples.english: It was a hot, humid day, and the only sound was the buzzing of insects.
examples.chinese: 那天又热又潮湿，只有昆虫在嗡嗡地叫。

centers.english: cold weather

examples.english: I'd hate to live somewhere where it's always cold.
examples.chinese: 我讨厌住在天气一直很冷的地方。

examples.english: The car is difficult to start, especially on cold winter mornings.
examples.chinese: 这辆车很难发动，尤其是在寒冷的冬天早上。

examples.english: It's so cold. I wish I was back home in Morocco.
examples.chinese: 天气真冷，我希望回到摩洛哥的家中。

examples.english: Come in out of the cold.
examples.chinese: 外面天气很冷，快进来。

examples.english: It gets much cooler in the evenings.
examples.chinese: 晚上，天气变得凉快多了。

examples.english: We stopped at a cool, grassy area, under the shade of the trees.
examples.chinese: 我们在树荫下一片凉爽的草地上停了下来。

examples.english: He liked to take a stroll in the cool of the evening.
examples.chinese: 他喜欢在凉爽的晚上散步。

examples.english: It was getting chilly outside, so we went back into the house.
examples.chinese: 外面冷起来了，所以我们回到屋里。

examples.english: Despite the chilly autumn afternoon, she was wearing a thin cotton dress.
examples.chinese: 尽管秋天下午天气寒冷，她还是穿着薄薄的棉布裙。

examples.english: Supporters queued for tickets all night in freezing conditions.
examples.chinese: 球迷整晚在冰冷彻骨的情况下排队买票。

examples.english: Can't we go inside? It's freezing out here.
examples.chinese: 我们不可以进去吗？这儿冷极了。

examples.english: a freezing cold day in January
examples.chinese: 1月里一个大冷天

centers.english: rain

examples.english: The rain was beating against the window.
examples.chinese: 雨点敲打着窗户。

examples.english: I like walking in the rain
examples.chinese: 我喜欢在雨中漫步。

examples.english: The roads are flooded after a period of exceptionally heavy rain.
examples.chinese: 经过一段时间的滂沱大雨，道路都被淹了。

examples.english: The coast has been battered by torrential rain all week.
examples.chinese: 整整一周，大雨在沿海地区肆虐。

examples.english: Some light rain is likely in the Boston area.
examples.chinese: 波士顿地区可能有几阵小雨。

examples.english: Four inches of rain have fallen in four days.
examples.chinese: 四天的降雨量为四英寸。

examples.english: When acid rain falls, it affects the pH balance of the soil.
examples.chinese: 降酸雨会影响土壤的酸碱平衡。

examples.english: It rained all night, and half the day after.
examples.chinese: 雨下了一个晚上，第二天又下了半天。

examples.english: Take an umbrella in case it rains.
examples.chinese: 带把伞，以防下雨。

examples.english: Look, it's raining again.
examples.chinese: 瞧，又下雨了。

examples.english: Is it still raining?
examples.chinese: 还在下雨吗？

examples.english: It had been raining heavily and the ground was very soft.
examples.chinese: 雨一直下得很大，地变得很软了。

examples.english: As soon as I got outside it started pouring.
examples.chinese: 我刚走到外面，大雨便倾盆而下。

examples.english: It was pouring with rain and she had forgotten her umbrella.
examples.chinese: 大雨瓢泼，她却忘记带伞。

examples.english: I think I'll walk to work - it's only drizzling.
examples.chinese: 我想我还是走着去上班吧—只是在下毛毛雨。

examples.english: ‘Is it raining out?’ ‘It's just sprinkling.’
examples.chinese: “外面在下雨吗？”“只是在下小雨”。

examples.english: There were a few sprinkles this afternoon, but the sun was shining through it all.
examples.chinese: 今天下午下了几阵小雨，但是一直有太阳。

examples.english: It's been wet all week.
examples.chinese: 一星期都在下雨。

examples.english: You should bring a waterproof jacket and strong boots in case of wet weather.
examples.chinese: 你应带防水外套和结实的靴子，以防下雨。

examples.english: a rainy weekend in November
examples.chinese: 11月里一个多雨的周末

examples.english: It was just a shower, so we didn't get too wet
examples.chinese: 只是一场阵雨，我们没有淋得很湿。

examples.english: Heavy showers are forecast for the weekend.
examples.chinese: 预报周末有大阵雨。

examples.english: The weather will be cloudy with light showers in places.
examples.chinese: 天气将会是阴天，局部地区有小阵雨。

examples.english: Come on in out of the wet.
examples.chinese: 快进来，别让雨淋着。

examples.english: The seeds must be planted in time for the rainy season.
examples.chinese: 必须及时播种赶上雨季。

examples.english: At this time of year, before the Monsoon, the river is at its lowest.
examples.chinese: 每年雨季到来之前的这个时候，河水水位最低。

examples.english: During the monsoon rains, torrents of water spill down the mountains.
examples.chinese: 雨季的时候，山上湍急的水流奔腾而下。

centers.english: snow and ice

examples.english: The tops of the mountains were still covered in snow.
examples.chinese: 山顶上仍然白雪皑皑。

examples.english: Tony and I trudged home through the deep snow.
examples.chinese: 我和托尼费力地穿过深深的积雪走回家。

examples.english: When climbing in snow and ice, it is essential to use the correct gear.
examples.chinese: 在冰雪中爬山，使用正确的装备很重要。

examples.english: Some snow is expected to fall in the Rockies tonight.
examples.chinese: 今晚落基山脉预料会下雪。

examples.english: She disappeared without trace in a heavy snow storm.
examples.chinese: 她在暴风雪中消失得无影无踪。

examples.english: There was a single line of footprints in the virgin snow.
examples.chinese: 洁白的雪地上有一行脚印。

examples.english: It snowed continually for three weeks.
examples.chinese: 一连下了三周的雪。

examples.english: It was snowing when he left the house.
examples.chinese: 他走出房子的时候正在下雪。

examples.english: There were frequent showers of rain and hail.
examples.chinese: 经常有阵雨和冰雹。

examples.english: Even in England, half-inch diameter hail stones are not unusual.
examples.chinese: 即使在英格兰，直径半英寸的冰雹并不罕见。

examples.english: We couldn't see anything because of the sleet and snow.
examples.chinese: 因为雨夹雪，我们什么也看不见。

examples.english: The grass and trees were white with frost.
examples.chinese: 草木都结了白霜。

examples.english: Frost covered all the windows.
examples.chinese: 窗户上全是霜。

examples.english: Be careful - the roads are icy this morning.
examples.chinese: 小心—今天早晨路面结冰了。

examples.english: Despite the icy ground, he was urging his horse on faster and faster.
examples.chinese: 尽管地面结冰，他还是对马儿加鞭往前赶路。

centers.english: cloudy

examples.english: You can still get sunburnt on a cloudy day.
examples.chinese: 多云的日子仍有可能被晒伤。

examples.english: It will be dry but dull this morning, with the possibility of showers later in the day.
examples.chinese: 今天上午天阴无雨，晚些时候可能有阵雨。

examples.english: It was a grey winter morning.
examples.chinese: 这是一个灰蒙蒙的冬日早晨。

examples.english: The sky was overcast, and a light rain began to fall.
examples.chinese: 天空阴沉沉的，开始下起小雨来。

examples.english: There wasn't a single cloud in the sky.
examples.chinese: 天空万里无云。

examples.english: Dense cloud prevented the rescue helicopter from taking off.
examples.chinese: 厚厚的云层妨碍救援直升机起飞。

examples.english: I could just make out a dim figure coming towards me in the fog.
examples.chinese: 大雾中，我只看见一个模糊的人影朝我走来。

examples.english: Watch out for patches of fog in low-lying areas.
examples.chinese: 小心低洼地区的雾团。

examples.english: Dense fog is making driving conditions difficult on many roads.
examples.chinese: 浓雾使许多道路上行车困难。

examples.english: The fog has almost cleared - our plane will be able to take off soon
examples.chinese: 雾差不多散了一我们的飞机将很快起飞。

examples.english: a foggy November evening
examples.chinese: 11月里一个有雾的晚上

examples.english: A light mist lay in the valley.
examples.chinese: 山谷中飘荡着薄雾。

examples.english: The mist along the river banks had gone by mid-morning.
examples.chinese: 上午过半，河岸的雾气已经消散。

examples.english: From Primrose Hill, London looked like a ruined city shrouded in mist.
examples.chinese: 从普里姆罗斯山望去，伦敦就像是一个笼罩在薄雾之中的废墟。

examples.english: It may be misty in the east in the morning.
examples.chinese: 明天早晨，东部地区可能有薄雾。

centers.english: windy

examples.english: It was a bright windy day in October.
examples.chinese: 这是10月里一个刮着风的晴天。

examples.english: The windy conditions made it difficult to put the tent up.
examples.chinese: 大风的天气很难支起帐篷。

examples.english: We walked home through the wind and the rain.
examples.chinese: 我们顶着风雨走路回家。

examples.english: A bitter wind was blowing from the East
examples.chinese: 寒风正从东边吹来。

examples.english: The flags fluttered gently in the wind.
examples.chinese: 旗帜在风中轻轻飘动。

examples.english: Strong winds caused damage to many buildings.
examples.chinese: 强风对许多建筑物造成破坏。

examples.english: A sudden gust of wind blew the paper out of his hand.
examples.chinese: 一阵狂风吹落了他手中的报纸。

examples.english: A cool breeze blew in off the sea.
examples.chinese: 凉爽的微风从海上吹来。

examples.english: A gentle breeze ruffled her hair.
examples.chinese: 微风吹拂她的头发。

examples.english: Her black hair was blowing in the breeze as she waved goodbye to me.
examples.chinese: 她挥手向我道别，黑发在微风中飘动。

examples.english: The fence was blown down in the gale last night.
examples.chinese: 昨晚，篱笆在大风中被吹倒了。

examples.english: A howling gale and torrential rain lashed the windows.
examples.chinese: 狂风暴雨猛烈地拍打着窗户。

centers.english: storm

examples.english: The Spanish ships were wrecked in the storm.
examples.chinese: 西班牙人的船在暴风雨中失事。

examples.english: There had not been such severe storms in southern England for hundreds of years.
examples.chinese: 英格兰南部数百年未遇过如此猛烈的暴风雨。

examples.english: The storm clouds were gathering over the sea.
examples.chinese: 暴风云在大海上空聚集。

examples.english: stormy weather
examples.chinese: 暴风雨天气

examples.english: The sky was starting to look stormy.
examples.chinese: 天空看似快有暴风雨来临。

examples.english: There was a spectacular thunderstorm that night.
examples.chinese: 那天晚上突然下起雷雨。

examples.english: They could hear thunder rumbling in the distance.
examples.chinese: 他们听见远处雷声隆隆。

examples.english: There was a thunder clap followed instantly by lightning.
examples.chinese: 一声雷鸣，紧接着是闪电。

examples.english: The thunder and lightning seemed to have moved away, but the rain continued to pour.
examples.chinese: 雷电似乎已经远离，但是大雨继续倾盆而下。

examples.english: A flash of lightning lit up the whole sky.
examples.chinese: 一道闪电点亮了整个天空。

examples.english: There was a great summer storm, with thunder and lightning and heavy rain.
examples.chinese: 这是夏季一场暴风雨，雷电交加、大雨谤沱。

examples.english: Eliot had to drive home in the blizzard.
examples.chinese: 埃利奥特要在暴风雪中驱车回家。

examples.english: The hurricane devastated Florida and killed at least 40 people.
examples.chinese: 飓风摧毁了佛罗里达州，至少40人丧生。

examples.english: The typhoon brought 30 foot waves crashing down on to the sea walls.
examples.chinese: 台风卷起的30英尺高的巨浪撞向海堤。

examples.english: A tornado destroyed twelve homes in Ashport, Tennessee yesterday.
examples.chinese: 昨天一场龙卷风刮倒了田纳西州阿什波特的12幢住宅。

centers.english: happening or used in any kind of weather
centers.chinese: 任何天气中发生或使用的

examples.english: My husband plays golf every weekend, rain or shine.
examples.chinese: 我丈夫每个周末都打高尔夫，风雨无阻。

examples.english: Organizers say the concert in Central Park will go ahead come rain or shine.
examples.chinese: 组织者称中央公园的音乐会将风雨无阻地如期举行。

examples.english: There are homeless people sleeping on the streets of London in all weathers.
examples.chinese: 不管什么天气，伦敦的街道上都有无家可归的人在露宿。

examples.english: She loves gardening -- she's out in her garden in all weathers.
examples.chinese: 她喜欢园艺一不管什么天气她都在自己的花园里。

examples.english: The team now have their own all-weather stadium, and matches are rarely cancelled.
examples.chinese: 这个队现在有了自己的全天候体育场，比赛很少被取消了。

examples.english: an all-weather jacket
examples.chinese: 全天候外套

centers.english: the air that we breathe

examples.english: Alex stood shivering in the cold, damp air.
examples.chinese: 空气又冷又湿，亚历克斯站着冷得发抖。

examples.english: the clean air of the countryside
examples.chinese: 乡下的洁净空气

examples.english: Cars are a major cause of air pollution.
examples.chinese: 汽车是引起空气污染的主因。

examples.english: There was a strong smell of burning in the air.
examples.chinese: 空气中有一股浓烈的燃烧气味。

examples.english: Open the window and let's get some fresh air in here!
examples.chinese: 把窗子打开，让我们来呼吸点新鲜空气吧！

examples.english: I'm just going outside for a breath of fresh air.
examples.chinese: 我要出去呼吸一下新鲜空气。

examples.english: Fresh air isn't necessarily better for you, but it will certainly make you feel better.
examples.chinese: 新鲜空气不一定很有用，但是肯定能让你感觉好一些。

centers.english: when there is not enough fresh air

examples.english: The hotel room was hot and stuffy, and I woke up with a terrible headache.
examples.chinese: 旅馆的房间又闷又热，我醒来时头疼得厉害。

examples.english: It's getting stuffy in here -- shall I open the window?
examples.chinese: 这里越来越闷了—我开窗好吗?

examples.english: I wish I could escape from this stuffy little office.
examples.chinese: 我真希望能从这个闷热的小办公室逃出去。

examples.english: The classroom was airless and uncomfortably hot.
examples.chinese: 教室里空气不流通，热得难受。

examples.english: Hales lived in a tiny, airless room with one small window that wouldn't open.
examples.chinese: 黑尔斯住在一个不通风的小房间里，房间里有一扇小小的窗，但是打不开。

examples.english: It was stifling in there; I was glad to get out.
examples.chinese: 那里面很闷热，我很高兴出来走走。

examples.english: The heat in the narrow packed streets was stifling.
examples.chinese: 狭窄拥挤的街道上，那热气令人窒息。

examples.english: The room was stifling hot.
examples.chinese: 这房间又闷又热。

centers.english: to let fresh air into a place

examples.english: She was opening windows and shutters to air the empty rooms.
examples.chinese: 她正把窗户和百叶窗打开，让空房间通通风。

examples.english: The bedrooms are aired and cleaned every morning.
examples.chinese: 卧室每天早晨都通风打扫。

examples.english: I opened all the windows, hoping that I could air the place out before the guests came.
examples.chinese: 我打开所有的窗子，想趁客人来之前给屋子通通风。

examples.english: Workrooms must be adequately ventilated by the circulation of fresh air.
examples.chinese: 工作室必须有新鲜空气流通，保持足够的通风。

examples.english: Store the potatoes in a cool, dark, well-ventilated space.
examples.chinese: 把马铃薯储藏在阴凉不透光、通风良好的地方。

examples.english: Working in a poorly ventilated area will affect your health.
examples.chinese: 在通风不好的地方工作会影响你的健康。

centers.english: to fill something with air

examples.english: Come and help me blow up the balloons.
examples.chinese: 来帮我给气球充气。

examples.english: This tyre's really flat - could you blow it up for me?
examples.chinese: 这轮胎真是没气了—你帮我充一下气好吗？

examples.english: Tyres should always be inflated to the correct pressure.
examples.chinese: 轮胎一定要充气到有适当的压力。

examples.english: You can inflate the mattress in 30 seconds, using a foot pump.
examples.chinese: 你可以用脚踏泵在30秒内把床垫充好气。

examples.english: Her life jacket failed to inflate.
examples.chinese: 她的救生衣没有充气胀开。

examples.english: Your back tire was a little flat so I pumped it up.
examples.chinese: 你的后胎有点瘪，所以我给它打了气。

centers.english: to let the air out of something

examples.english: Lisa let the air out of the balloon.
examples.chinese: 莉萨给气球放了气。

examples.english: Someone let the tires down on my bike!
examples.chinese: 有人把我自行车轮胎的气放掉了！

examples.english: The boys let his tyres down while he was in the headteacher's office.
examples.chinese: 他在校长办公室的时候，这些男孩子把他车胎的气放掉了。

examples.english: The balloon gradually lost altitude as we deflated it and came in to land.
examples.chinese: 我们给气球放了气，它就渐渐降低高度，落到了地上。

examples.english: He woke up aching all over - somehow his airbed had deflated in the night and there was nothing to cushion him from the cold ground.
examples.chinese: 他醒过来浑身疼痛—不知怎么的，他的充气床垫在夜里跑了气，这使他直接躺在了冰冷的地面上。

centers.english: not wet

examples.english: You should change into some dry clothes.
examples.chinese: 你该换上干衣服了。

examples.english: Keep the apples stored in a cool, dry place.
examples.chinese: 把苹果存放在凉爽干燥的地方。

examples.english: The wood was dry and it burned easily.
examples.chinese: 这木头很干，容易燃烧。

examples.english: Can you check to see if the laundry's dry?
examples.chinese: 你能去看一下洗的衣服是否干了吗？

examples.english: I forgot to water the plants and the soil has gone bone dry.
examples.chinese: 我忘了给植物浇水，泥土已经干透了。

centers.english: when there is not much rain

examples.english: It was a very dry summer.
examples.chinese: 那是个十分干燥的夏天。

examples.english: The weather tomorrow will be sunny and dry.
examples.chinese: 明天天气是阳光充足而干燥。

examples.english: Tunisia has a hot, dry climate.
examples.chinese: 突尼斯的气候炎热而干燥。

examples.english: In Arizona, the air is often extremely dry.
examples.chinese: 亚利桑那州的空气通常都极为干燥。

examples.english: Central Africa is suffering one of the worst droughts of the century.
examples.chinese: 中非正遭遇到本世纪最严重的旱灾。

examples.english: A severe drought has caused most of the corn crop to fail.
examples.chinese: 一场严重的旱灾导致了大部分谷物歉收。

examples.english: The road to Bangalore was hot and dusty.
examples.chinese: 去班加罗尔的道路炎热又尘土飞扬。

examples.english: Samandari lives in a small dusty village on the edge of the desert.
examples.chinese: 萨曼达里住在沙漠边缘的一个干而多尘的小村庄里。

examples.english: Much of Namibia is arid country and only fit for raising goats.
examples.chinese: 纳米比亚有许多地方都很干旱，只适宜于饲养山羊。

examples.english: The region is an arid wasteland.
examples.chinese: 这一地区是干旱的不毛之地。

examples.english: The earth was so parched that there were huge cracks in it.
examples.chinese: 土地焦干得出现了巨大的裂缝。

examples.english: The parched yellow landscape of Death Valley stretched out for miles in front of us.
examples.chinese: 死谷那片干枯的黄土地在我们面前绵延数英里。

centers.english: to become dry

examples.english: This should only take a few minutes to dry.
examples.chinese: 这应该只需几分钟就干了。

examples.english: Wet clothes dry quickly on a sunny day.
examples.chinese: 在阳光充足的日子里，湿衣服很快就能干。

examples.english: Leave the dishes on the draining board to dry.
examples.chinese: 把碗碟放到滴水板上去滴干。

examples.english: I like to hang the sheets out to dry. It gives them a fresh smell.
examples.chinese: 我喜欢把床单挂出去晒干，这样床单会有一种清新气味。

examples.english: Hang your towel over the chair to dry it out.
examples.chinese: 把毛巾挂在椅子上晒干。

examples.english: Cover the pastry with a damp cloth to prevent it from drying out.
examples.chinese: 在油酥面团上盖块湿布以防它干硬。

examples.english: Farmers will have to wait for fields to dry out before they can harvest their soybeans.
examples.chinese: 农夫要等到地里干透后才能收割大豆。

examples.english: Last summer the river dried up and you could walk right across it.
examples.chinese: 去年夏天河水干涸了，你可以直接走过去。

examples.english: The town's reservoir has nearly dried up and many homes are without water.
examples.chinese: 该镇的水库几乎干涸了，许多家庭都没水用。

examples.english: Lake Elizabeth will not dry up, but its water level could drop.
examples.chinese: 伊丽莎白湖不会干涸，但其水位可能下降。

examples.english: There was so little rain that most of the crops shrivelled up and died.
examples.chinese: 雨下得那么少，大部分的庄稼都枯死了。

centers.english: to make something dry or make yourself dry
centers.chinese: 把某物弄干或把自己擦干

examples.english: Could you wait ten minutes while I dry my hair?
examples.chinese: 你能等10分钟让我把头发揩干吗?

examples.english: We built a fire to get ourselves warm and dry our clothes.
examples.chinese: 我们生了个火暖暖身体，烤干衣服。

examples.english: Evan got out of the pool and dried himself off.
examples.chinese: 埃文从水池里出来并擦干了身体。

examples.english: She began to dry herself off, talking to me over her shoulder.
examples.chinese: 她开始揩干身体，一边回过头来跟我说话。

examples.english: He dried off his bicycle seat with a towel.
examples.chinese: 他用一条毛巾把自行车座措干。

examples.english: Clean the plastic cover with a damp sponge, then dry it off with a soft cloth.
examples.chinese: 用湿海绵把塑料盖擦干净，然后用一块柔软的布把它擦干。

centers.english: something that has had liquid removed from it

examples.english: Dried herbs are convenient but I think fresh ones have more flavour.
examples.chinese: 干的香草用起来很方便，但我觉得新鲜的香草味道更好一些。

examples.english: My friend Minu loves dried flowers.
examples.chinese: 我的朋友米纽喜爱干花。

examples.english: Add four tablespoons of dried milk to a pint of cold water, and stir until dissolved.
examples.chinese: 在一品脱冷水中加入四汤匙奶粉，搅至溶解。

centers.english: wet

examples.english: I can't come out yet - my hair's still wet.
examples.chinese: 我现在还不能出来，我头发还没干。

examples.english: You'd better change out of those wet clothes.
examples.chinese: 你最好把湿衣服换掉。

examples.english: Let's not sit here - the grass is wet.
examples.chinese: 我们别坐这里—草地是湿的。

examples.english: Freshly wet roads are dangerous because oil and dust mix with the water to make them slippery.
examples.chinese: 刚淋湿的马路很危险，因为油和灰尘与水混合令路面很滑。

examples.english: Hurry up with the umbrella - I'm getting wet!
examples.chinese: 快打伞—我都给淋湿了！

examples.english: When he got out of the boat, the sleeves of his sweater were all wet.
examples.chinese: 他下船的时候，毛衣的袖子全湿了。

examples.english: All the benches had been painted and had ‘wet paint’ signs on them.
examples.chinese: 长凳全部漆好了，上面都有块“油漆未干”的牌子。

examples.english: Your clothes are soaked. Leave them in front of the fire to dry.
examples.chinese: 你的衣服都湿透了，把它们放在火炉前烘干。

examples.english: Don't leave the cushions in the garden. They'll get soaked if it rains.
examples.chinese: 别把垫子放在花园里，下雨的话会湿透的。

examples.english: Panting and soaked with sweat, Ron came running into the house.
examples.chinese: 罗恩跑进屋来，气喘吁吁、浑身是汗。

examples.english: When the men came in from the storm, they were soaked to the skin.
examples.chinese: 那些男子从暴风雨中走进来时，衣服湿透了。

examples.english: After a morning walk through the meadow, my shoes were completely soaked through.
examples.chinese: 早晨散步穿过草地后，我的鞋子湿透了。

examples.english: We were soaking wet by the time we got out of the rain.
examples.chinese: 等我们找到地方避雨时，浑身已经湿透了。

examples.english: There's no way I can wear this shirt tonight - it's still sopping wet.
examples.chinese: 今天晚上我没办法穿这件衬衫——它还是湿淋淋的。

examples.english: Can I call you back in five minutes? I just got out of the shower and I'm dripping wet.
examples.chinese: 我五分钟后给你回电话好吗？我刚洗好淋浴，浑身湿淋淋的。

examples.english: You're soaking. Take those wet clothes off before you catch a cold.
examples.chinese: 你浑身湿淋淋的，快把湿衣服脱下来，免得感冒。

examples.english: Someone had pushed Sally into the swimming pool, and she was soaking.
examples.chinese: 有人把萨莉推进游泳池里，结果她浑身都湿透了。

examples.english: Everyone got completely drenched when a huge wave hit the boat.
examples.chinese: 一个巨浪打来，船上每个人都湿透了。

examples.english: The two and a half hour walk in the wind and rain left us drenched.
examples.chinese: 我们在风雨中走了两个半小时，浑身湿透了。

examples.english: Breakfast was terrible - the eggs were burnt and the toast was soggy.
examples.chinese: 早餐难吃极了——鸡蛋是焦的，面包片没烤透。

examples.english: A soggy pile of old leaves lay in the corner of the yard.
examples.chinese: 院子的角落里有一堆潮湿的枯叶。

examples.english: His shoes were sodden and covered with mud.
examples.chinese: 他的鞋湿漉漉的，上面全是泥。

examples.english: Mary tried to read the writing in her sodden address book, but it was impossible.
examples.chinese: 玛丽试图看懂那湿漉漉的通讯录上的字，但无法辨认。

examples.english: When the summer rains begin, the soil quickly becomes saturated.
examples.chinese: 夏天雨季一开始，泥土很快就湿透了。

examples.english: The bandage around his knee was already saturated with blood.
examples.chinese: 他膝盖上绑的绷带已经被血浸透了。

examples.english: The game was cancelled because the field was waterlogged.
examples.chinese: 比赛取消，因为场地汪着水。

examples.english: You can plant the seeds anytime, as long as the soil is not frozen or waterlogged.
examples.chinese: 只要泥土不冻硬、不浸透水，可以在任何时候把种子种下去。

examples.english: The ship leaned further to starboard and soon the decks were awash.
examples.chinese: 船向右舷倾斜得更厉害，甲板很快被水漫过了。

examples.english: The toilet leaks, leaving the bathroom floor awash in slimy water.
examples.chinese: 抽水马桶漏了，浴室地面浸在黏乎乎的水中。

centers.english: slightly wet

examples.english: Don't put that shirt on. It's still damp.
examples.chinese: 别穿那件衬衫，还有点湿。

examples.english: Clean the counter with a damp cloth.
examples.chinese: 用一块湿布擦柜台。

examples.english: Be careful you don't slip - the grass is damp.
examples.chinese: 小心别滑倒—草地有些潮湿。

examples.english: There was a damp spot on the ceiling.
examples.chinese: 天花板上有块地方潮了。

examples.english: The mixture should be slightly moist, but not sticky.
examples.chinese: 混合料应该有点湿润，但不黏。

examples.english: Water the plants regularly to keep the soil moist.
examples.chinese: 定期浇灌花草，使土壤保持湿润。

examples.english: The sandwiches are made with moist slices of chicken breast, topped with various ingredients.
examples.chinese: 三明治用了带汁的鸡胸肉片，上面加有各种配料。

examples.english: As soon as the interview began, I felt my hands go clammy.
examples.chinese: 面试一开始，我就觉得双手变得湿冷发黏。

examples.english: We were left waiting in our clammy clothes for over an hour.
examples.chinese: 我们穿着黏湿的衣服被留下来等了一个多小时。

examples.english: His whole body was clammy with sweat as a result of the malaria.
examples.chinese: 由于疟疾，他全身都是黏乎乎的汗。

centers.english: when the air feels wet

examples.english: Summers in Tokyo are hot and humid.
examples.chinese: 东京的夏天又热又潮湿。

examples.english: Her clothes were sticking to her, but the humid air didn't seem to bother Ralph.
examples.chinese: 她的衣服都黏在身上，但是潮湿的空气并不让拉尔夫觉得难受。

examples.english: The entire island is covered by thick humid jungle.
examples.chinese: 整个岛上全是浓密潮湿的丛林。

examples.english: The humidity makes it feel even hotter here.
examples.chinese: 潮湿的空气令人觉得这里更热。

examples.english: It's cold and damp outside - make sure you wear a warm coat.
examples.chinese: 外面又冷又湿—一定要穿一件保暖的大衣。

examples.english: At first I hated the damp weather in Britain.
examples.chinese: 起初我不喜欢英国潮湿的天气。

examples.english: The constant cold and damp made Tony feel even worse.
examples.chinese: 一直又冷又湿的天气让托尼感觉更糟糕。

examples.english: When it's hot and muggy, no one feels like working.
examples.chinese: 天气又闷热又潮湿的时候，没有人想工作。

examples.english: It was a warm muggy afternoon, and it looked like it would rain.
examples.chinese: 下午温暖郁热，看样子要下雨了。

examples.english: We left Rome on a hot sticky day in August.
examples.chinese: 我们在8月里闷热得令人难受的一天离开了罗马。

examples.english: Something about the sticky humid weather made people feel a little angry.
examples.chinese: 闷热潮湿的天气似乎使人感到有点恼火。

examples.english: The air in the room was heavy and dank, and I couldn't sleep.
examples.chinese: 房间里的空气又闷又潮，我睡不着。

examples.english: I'm not surprised he's miserable, living in that dank old house.
examples.chinese: 他住在那阴湿的老房子里，对他这种可悲的处境我并不感到惊奇。

examples.english: The bag had been sitting in a dank tent for three days and smelled like an old laundry hamper.
examples.chinese: 那只袋子放在阴湿的帐篷里三天了，有股像旧洗衣筐的味道。

centers.english: to make someone or something wet

examples.english: Don't splash me - I don't want to get my hair wet.
examples.chinese: 别拿水泼我—我可不想弄湿头发。

examples.english: How did you manage to get the bathroom floor so wet?
examples.chinese: 你怎么把浴室地面弄得那么湿？

examples.english: She can't wash the dishes without getting the front of her clothes all wet.
examples.chinese: 她洗碗盘总是把前襟都弄湿了。

examples.english: The other hairdresser usually wets my hair before she cuts it.
examples.chinese: 另一个理发师通常都是先把我的头发弄湿再剪。

examples.english: She wet her index finger and cleaned the spot off the mirror.
examples.chinese: 她弄湿食指，把镜子上的污点擦掉。

examples.english: Wetting the toothbrush before you put the toothpaste on makes the bristles softer.
examples.chinese: 挤上牙膏前先弄湿牙刷，使刷毛更软些。

examples.english: Soak the beans overnight before cooking.
examples.chinese: 烹调前，先把豆子泡一晚。

examples.english: The rain had come in through the bottom of our tent and completely soaked our clothes.
examples.chinese: 雨水从我们的帐蓬底下渗进来，我们的衣服都给浸湿了。

examples.english: Soak a piece of cotton in water and use it to clean the wound.
examples.chinese: 把一团棉花浸在水中，再用来清洗伤口。

examples.english: The kids were playing around in the pool, splashing each other.
examples.chinese: 小孩子在泳池里到处玩，互相泼水。

examples.english: He knocked over her cup and splashed coffee all over her new dress.
examples.chinese: 他碰翻了她的杯子，溅得她的新裙子上到处都是咖啡。

examples.english: A motorcycle sped past, splashing all the spectators with mud.
examples.chinese: 一辆摩托车飞驰而过，把所有观众都溅了一身泥。

examples.english: He turned the hose on us and drenched us all.
examples.chinese: 他把软管对准我们，把我们都浇湿了。

examples.english: Blood was pouring from the cut, drenching his shirt.
examples.chinese: 鲜血从伤口涌出，浸透了他的衬衫。

examples.english: Farmers flood the fields in order to grow rice.
examples.chinese: 农场主往田里灌满水以便种植水稻。

examples.english: In the rainy season the river can rise rapidly to flood the valley in a few hours.
examples.chinese: 在雨季，这条河会迅速上涨，几小时里就淹没了山谷。

examples.english: We waded up the flooded garden path to the house.
examples.chinese: 我们蹬过被水淹没了的花园小径向房子走去。

examples.english: Water the young plants well, but don't swamp them.
examples.chinese: 好好给这些幼苗浇水，但不要浇得太多。

examples.english: The dam burst, swamping the valley and hundreds of homes.
examples.chinese: 大坝决堤，淹没了山谷和数百户人家。

examples.english: About 3000 years ago a tidal wave swamped the coastal lowlands of Greece, causing massive destruction.
examples.chinese: 大约3,000年以前，海啸淹没了希腊沿海的低地，造成巨大破坏。

examples.english: Heavy rains had saturated the ground, turning the streets into rivers.
examples.chinese: 大雨把地面淋了个透，将街道变成了河流。

examples.english: Saturate the label with vinegar and let it sit before you try to scrape it off the bottle.
examples.chinese: 用醋将标签浸透，放一会儿再将它从瓶子上刮掉。

centers.english: to make something slightly wet

examples.english: Dampen the soil a little before you put the seeds in.
examples.chinese: 把泥土弄湿一点，再放入种子。

examples.english: She dampened a cloth and held it to his forehead.
examples.chinese: 她把一块布弄湿放在他的前额上。

examples.english: If you dampen your piece of paper before you start painting it will be easier to paint evenly.
examples.chinese: 作画之前把画纸弄湿，可以更容易画得均匀些。

examples.english: Add just enough water to moisten the cake mixture without making it too watery.
examples.chinese: 加入适量的水使蛋糕混合料略湿，但不要太稀。

examples.english: Tom paused and moistened his lips.
examples.chinese: 汤姆停顿了一下，润了润嘴唇。

examples.english: When the clay becomes dry, moisten it lightly before you continue to shape it.
examples.chinese: 黏土开始变干时，略微用水润湿后再继续将它捏塑成形。

centers.english: cold weather

examples.english: This is the coldest winter we've had in years.
examples.chinese: 这是几年来最冷的一个冬天。

examples.english: a cold January evening
examples.chinese: 1月的一个寒冷的傍晚

examples.english: Put your gloves on - it's cold outside today.
examples.chinese: 戴好手套——今天外边冷。

examples.english: It gets really cold here at night.
examples.chinese: 这里晚上会很冷。

examples.english: The layer of fat below a goose's skin protects it from cold weather.
examples.chinese: 鹅皮肤下的一层脂肪能御寒。

examples.english: Come in. Don't stand out there in the cold.
examples.chinese: 进来，不要站在外面，外面冷。

examples.english: a chilly morning in April
examples.chinese: 4月的一个寒冷的早晨

examples.english: It's a little chilly out here - I think we'll go inside.
examples.chinese: 外面有点冷—我想我们会进屋去。

examples.english: Temperatures were in the 80s on Tuesday, but it turned chilly Wednesday afternoon.
examples.chinese: 星期二气温80多度，但星期三下午转冷了。

examples.english: The weather's getting warmer, but the mornings are still nippy.
examples.chinese: 天气越来越暖和，但早晨还有点冷。

examples.english: I'm going indoors. It's a little nippy out here.
examples.chinese: 我要进屋了，外面冷丝丝的。

examples.english: They were both shivering slightly from the frosty air.
examples.chinese: 空气凛冽，他们都有点哆嗦。

examples.english: It was a frosty autumn morning with spiders’ webs glistening in the frozen grass.
examples.chinese: 这是秋天一个严寒的早晨，蜘蛛网在结霜的草上一闪一亮。

examples.english: We can expect a few wintry showers on the northern hills.
examples.chinese: 我们预料北方的山区会下几场冬雨。

examples.english: Outside it was a cold wintry day, but Anne felt safe and warm inside by the fire.
examples.chinese: 屋外一片寒冬景象，但安妮坐在火炉旁感到安全和温暖。

examples.english: Last month's cold spell was responsible for the deaths of hundreds of old people.
examples.chinese: 上月的寒冷期导致数百名老人死亡。

examples.english: The price of firewood usually shoots up during cold spells.
examples.chinese: 寒冷期木柴价格往往会猛涨。

examples.english: It was a wintry day in April in the middle of an unexpected cold snap.
examples.chinese: 这是4月里寒冷的一天，突如其来的寒汛期还没有过去。

centers.english: extremely cold weather

examples.english: The freezing weather continued all through February.
examples.chinese: 寒冷的天气持续了整个2月。

examples.english: How can you stand to be out here without a coat? It's freezing!
examples.chinese: 你怎么能不穿外套就出去？天冷极了！

examples.english: We arrived in Chicago during the bitterly cold winter of 1935.
examples.chinese: 1935年的严冬，我们来到了芝加哥。

examples.english: a bitter east wind
examples.chinese: 刺骨的东风！

examples.english: Don't go out tonight. It's bitterly cold.
examples.chinese: 今晚不要出去。外面寒冷刺骨。

examples.english: I wouldn't take the car out in these arctic conditions.
examples.chinese: 天气这么冷，我不会驾车外出。

examples.english: He could feel the arctic chill creeping into the cabin.
examples.chinese: 他能感觉到凛冽的寒气钻进小木屋里。

examples.english: Subzero temperatures can be expected for the next few days.
examples.chinese: 未来的几天内，气温将降至零下。

examples.english: Thousands of refugees are spending tonight on a mountainside in subzero temperatures.
examples.chinese: 今晚，数以千计的难民在气温低于零度的山腰上过夜。

centers.english: pleasantly cold weather

examples.english: a cool sea breeze
examples.chinese: 凉爽的海风

examples.english: Although the days are very hot, it's much cooler at night.
examples.chinese: 尽管白天很热，但晚上要凉爽得多。

examples.english: We walked towards the sea with a fresh breeze blowing in our faces.
examples.chinese: 我们向海边走去，凉爽的微风轻拂着我们的脸庞。

examples.english: The hot weather will continue today, but tomorrow will be fresher with cool, westerly winds.
examples.chinese: 今天仍是炎热天气，但明天将会有凉快的西风送爽。

examples.english: I love to be out of doors on these bright, crisp autumn mornings.
examples.chinese: 我喜欢在明朗凉爽的秋天早晨到户外活动。

examples.english: The weather was crisp and clear and you could see the mountains fifty miles away.
examples.chinese: 天气凉爽、晴朗，可以望见50英里外的山脉。

examples.english: Hank loved the feel of the bracing sea air against his face.
examples.chinese: 汉克喜欢清爽的海风拂面的感觉。

examples.english: Tourists are attracted by the beautiful scenery and bracing mountain climate.
examples.chinese: 游客喜欢那里的美景和清爽的山区气候。

centers.english: person

examples.english: Dad, I'm cold. Can I put the heater on?
examples.chinese: 爸爸，我很冷。我能开暖气吗？

examples.english: Your hands are really cold!
examples.chinese: 你的手真冷！

examples.english: He woke up in the middle of the night feeling cold.
examples.chinese: 他感到冷，半夜就醒了。

examples.english: Come and sit by the fire. You look cold.
examples.chinese: 来，坐在炉火旁边。你看上去很冷。

examples.english: How much longer do we have to wait out her? I'm freezing.
examples.chinese: 我们还要在外面等多久？我冻死了。

examples.english: You look absolutely frozen.
examples.chinese: 你看上去冻僵了。

examples.english: I was shivering in my thin sleeping bag.
examples.chinese: 我在薄薄的睡袋里冷得直打哆嗦。！

examples.english: They were forced to wait outside for hours, shivering with cold.
examples.chinese: 他们被迫在门外等了几个小时，冷得直发抖。

examples.english: A shiver of cold ran through him when he stepped outside.
examples.chinese: 他走到室外时，不禁打了个冷颤。

examples.english: He was huddled into his coat, his face blue with cold.
examples.chinese: 他缩进大衣里，冷得脸都发紫了。

examples.english: Look at her. The poor girl's quite blue with cold.
examples.chinese: 瞧这可怜的女孩，冻得皮肤都发青了。

examples.english: She was shivering, her arms and legs covered in goosepimples.
examples.chinese: 她在发抖，手臂和腿上都起了鸡皮疙瘩。

examples.english: Why don't you put something else on? You've got goosebumps.
examples.chinese: 为什么不再找件衣服穿上？你都起鸡皮疙瘩了。

examples.english: Her teeth were chattering with cold.
examples.chinese: 她冷得牙齿直打颤。

centers.english: place/room

examples.english: I love being in a warm bed in a cold room.
examples.chinese: 冷飕飕的房间里，我喜欢留在温暖的床上。

examples.english: He waited an hour for the train on a cold platform.
examples.chinese: 他在冰冷的站台上候车，等了一个小时。

examples.english: Why is it always so cold in here?
examples.chinese: 这里为什么总是这么冷？

examples.english: Medicine should always be stored in a cool place.
examples.chinese: 所有药品都应该储存在阴凉处。

examples.english: It's much cooler over here in the shade.
examples.chinese: 在这儿的遮荫处感觉凉快多了。

examples.english: They have to get washed and dressed in a chilly bathroom.
examples.chinese: 他们只得在冰冷的浴室里洗澡、穿衣。

examples.english: It's chilly in the house, even when it's sunny outside.
examples.chinese: 即使屋外阳光明媚，屋里也很冷。、

examples.english: The two women live in a drafty old farmhouse.
examples.chinese: 那两位女士住在一间透冷风的旧农舍里。

examples.english: It's so draughty in here. Is there a window open?
examples.chinese: 这里穿堂风很大，是不是有扇窗开着？

examples.english: The little children sat in rows in the freezing classroom.
examples.chinese: 小孩子在冰冷的教室里排排坐着。！

examples.english: It's absolutely freezing in the basement.
examples.chinese: 地下室冷极了。

centers.english: liquid/object/surface

examples.english: I wanted to swim, but the water was too cold.
examples.chinese: 我想游泳，但是水太冷了。

examples.english: a cold stone floor
examples.chinese: 冷冷的石地板

examples.english: His friends pulled him from the freezing water.
examples.chinese: 朋友们将他从冰冷的水里拉出来。

examples.english: The river is freezing cold this time of year.
examples.chinese: 每年的这个时候，河水冰冷。

examples.english: Ruth put her cool hand on my burning forehead.
examples.chinese: 露丝把凉凉的手放到我滚烫的额头上。

examples.english: I slid into bed between cool white sheets.
examples.chinese: 我上床钻进了凉凉的白色被单里。

centers.english: food/drink

examples.english: I want something cold like an ice cream bar.
examples.chinese: 我想吃冰淇淋之类的冷东西。

examples.english: Most white wine tastes best when served very cold.
examples.chinese: 大多数白葡萄酒冷饮味道最佳。

examples.english: They provided a selection of cold meats.
examples.chinese: 他们出售各种冷冻肉食。

examples.english: You can serve the quiche hot or cold.
examples.chinese: 蛋奶火腿馅饼冷、热食用均可。

examples.english: Come eat your dinner before it gets cold.
examples.chinese: 趁热把晚饭吃了吧。

examples.english: By the time I got off the phone, my coffee was stone cold.
examples.chinese: 挂断电话时，我的咖啡已经冰凉了。

examples.english: Can I interest you in a nice, cool drink?
examples.chinese: 我给你介绍一种可口的冷饮，你感兴趣吗?

examples.english: Summer is the time for cool, refreshing fruit salads.
examples.chinese: 夏天是吃凉凉的新鲜水果沙拉的时节。

examples.english: a bottle of chilled champagne
examples.chinese: 一瓶冰镇香槟酒

examples.english: The kids were rewarded with ice-cold lemonade.
examples.chinese: 孩子们得到冰冻的柠檬水作为奖励。

examples.english: I could do with an ice-cold beer.
examples.chinese: 我想喝一瓶冰冻啤酒。

examples.english: frozen vegetables
examples.chinese: 冷冻蔬菜

examples.english: All I had in the freezer was a couple of frozen pizzas.
examples.chinese: 我的冰柜里只有几块冷冻比萨饼。

centers.english: to make food and drink cold

examples.english: Blow on the soup first to cool it.
examples.chinese: 先把汤吹凉。

examples.english: Cool the jam by stirring it before putting it into jars.
examples.chinese: 装罐之前，搅动果酱使它冷却。

examples.english: Chill the salad for an hour or two before serving.
examples.chinese: 沙拉端上来以前，先把它放在冰箱里冷藏一两个小时。

examples.english: Put some ice in the sink, and we'll chill the drinks in there.
examples.chinese: 水槽里放些冰，我们要在里面冰饮料。

examples.english: You can make a big batch and freeze some of it for later.
examples.chinese: 你可以做许多，将其中一些冷冻起来以后用。

examples.english: Don't freeze the rolls for longer than three weeks.
examples.chinese: 面包卷冷冻不能超过三周。

examples.english: Cover the bowl and refrigerate the dough overnight.
examples.chinese: 盖好碗，将面团冷藏一晚上。

examples.english: Poultry, fish, and seafood should be kept refrigerated.
examples.chinese: 家禽、鱼和海鲜应冷藏保存。

centers.english: to get cold or colder

examples.english: It's getting colder - I guess winter's on its way.
examples.chinese: 天气越来越冷—我猜想冬天的脚步近了。

examples.english: Hey, John, your soup's getting cold.
examples.chinese: 嗨，约翰，你的汤凉了。

examples.english: I need to finish fixing the roof before the weather turns cold.
examples.chinese: 天气转冷之前，我得把屋顶修好。

examples.english: The wind had turned cold and Billy took off his coat and gave it to the girl.
examples.chinese: 风变冷了，比利脱下自己的外套给那女孩穿。

examples.english: Fortunately the temperature never dropped low enough to freeze the pipes.
examples.chinese: 还好，气温还没有下降到能使水管结冰的程度。

examples.english: The temperature dropped 10 degrees during the night.
examples.chinese: 气温在夜间下降了10度。

examples.english: It's been hot all summer, but it's finally starting to cool down a little.
examples.chinese: 整个夏天一直很热，但是天气终于凉一点了。

examples.english: If the engine overheats, switch it off and do not start it again until it has cooled down.
examples.chinese: 如果引擎过热，关掉它，等它冷却后再重新发动。

examples.english: She took the cake out of the oven and left it on the kitchen table to cool.
examples.chinese: 她把蛋糕从烤箱里拿出来，放在厨房的桌子上冷却。

examples.english: Most liquids contract steadily as they cool.
examples.chinese: 大多数液体冷却时，体积会逐渐缩小。

centers.english: land that is owned by someone or is used for something
centers.chinese: 某人所拥有或用于某事物的土地

examples.english: They moved to the country and bought some land.
examples.chinese: 他们搬到乡下去，买了块土地。

examples.english: Get off my land!
examples.chinese: 别到我的地里来！

examples.english: Each family was given a small piece of land where they could grow food for themselves.
examples.chinese: 每户人家都分到一小块地自己种东西吃。

examples.english: There is a shortage of suitable farmland in the south of the country.
examples.chinese: 国家的南部地区缺少可耕地。

examples.english: Miller had accidentally crossed into Iraqi territory and was arrested for spying.
examples.chinese: 米勒误闯伊拉克领土，被指从事间谍活动而遭到逮捕。

examples.english: His plane was shot down over enemy territory.
examples.chinese: 他的飞机在敌占区上空被击落。

examples.english: A committee has been set up to deal with territorial disputes in the area.
examples.chinese: 为了解决该地区的领土争端，成立了一个委员会。

examples.english: The country has suffered substantial territorial losses in this war.
examples.chinese: 该国在此次战争中丧失了大片领土。

examples.english: We passed cows grazing in the fields.
examples.chinese: 我们经过一群在田野里吃草的奶牛。

examples.english: a football field
examples.chinese: 足球场

examples.english: a field of wheat
examples.chinese: 一块麦田

examples.english: We went out onto the school playing fields to watch a game of football.
examples.chinese: 我们出去到学校的操场上看一场足球赛。

examples.english: birds such as skylarks whose habitat is open fields and farmland
examples.chinese: 云雀等栖息在空旷的田野和农田上的鸟类

examples.english: Have you ever been to Penryn Castle? The grounds are beautiful.
examples.chinese: 你去过彭林城堡吗？那里的庭园非常漂亮。

examples.english: The nurse said I could go for a short walk around the hospital grounds.
examples.chinese: 护士说我可以到医院的花园里去走走。

centers.english: what you see in an area of land

examples.english: The construction of dams has changed the character of the landscape.
examples.chinese: 修筑水坝改变了自然风光的特点。

examples.english: an urban landscape of glittering modern buildings
examples.chinese: 现代建筑熠熠生辉的都市景象

examples.english: We stayed in a peaceful Alpine village surrounded by magnificent scenery.
examples.chinese: 我们住在阿尔卑斯山一个宁静的村子里，四周景色迷人。

centers.english: the surface of the land

examples.english: The ground was covered with snow.
examples.chinese: 地面上积雪覆盖。

examples.english: He kicked Cook as he lay on the ground.
examples.chinese: 库克躺在地上，他踢了他一脚。

examples.english: In the middle of the forest was a bare patch of marshy ground.
examples.chinese: 森林的中央有一片荒芜的沼泽地。

examples.english: The ground sloped down from where we stood to the lake shore.
examples.chinese: 地面从我们所站的地方向湖岸倾斜。

examples.english: The terrain on the island varies quite a bit.
examples.chinese: 岛上地形多变。

examples.english: They had to drive very slowly over the difficult terrain.
examples.chinese: 地势崎岖难行，他们只得把车开得很慢。

examples.english: Boots are the best footwear on rough terrain.
examples.chinese: 在崎岖复杂的地形上行走，穿靴子最好。

centers.english: the land compared with the sea or air

examples.english: They had defeated the enemy on land and at sea.
examples.chinese: 他们已在海陆两方面战胜了敌人。

examples.english: Reptiles reproduce by laying eggs on land or giving birth to live young.
examples.chinese: 爬行动物的繁殖方式是在陆地上产卵，或是直接产下成活的幼体。

examples.english: Some repairs to the boat will have to wait until we're back on dry land.
examples.chinese: 船上需要作些修理，但只能等到我们回到陆地再说。

examples.english: Our plane was flying only 100 feet above the ground.
examples.chinese: 我们的飞机正在距地面只有100英尺的空中飞行。

examples.english: Spectators watched in horror as the aircraft plunged to the ground.
examples.chinese: 旁观者惊恐地看着飞机栽到地面。

examples.english: Most of the other passengers had gone ashore.
examples.chinese: 其他乘客中大多数都上岸了。

examples.english: People were returning to their cabins after a day ashore.
examples.chinese: 人们在岸上待了一天之后，都回船舱去了。

examples.english: Two bodies were washed ashore last night.
examples.chinese: 昨晚有两具尸体被冲到岸上。

centers.english: the substance that forms the surface of the land

examples.english: Outside, the sun beat down on the red baked earth of Provence.
examples.chinese: 外面，烈日烤晒着普罗旺斯干焦的红土。

examples.english: Thousands of tons of earth were moved to build the dam.
examples.chinese: 无数吨泥土被运去修筑水坝。

examples.english: Roses do best in well-drained, slightly acid soil.
examples.chinese: 玫瑰在排水良好、稍有酸性的土壤里长得最好。

examples.english: Parsley should have a deep, moist, fertile soil for ideal growth.
examples.chinese: 西芹最好在湿润肥厚的土壤里种植。

examples.english: The kids were playing in the yard, digging in the dirt.
examples.chinese: 孩子们正在院子里挖泥土玩。

centers.english: land at the edge of water

examples.english: driving along the Californian coast, from San Francisco to LA
examples.chinese: 驱车在加利福尼亚的海岸上行驶，从圣弗朗西斯科到洛杉矶

examples.english: a little house on the coast of Brittany
examples.chinese: 布里塔尼海岸上的一幢小屋

examples.english: They discovered oil off the northern coast of Scotland.
examples.chinese: 他们在苏格兰北海岸附近发现了石油。

examples.english: The ship slowly made its way along the west coast of Africa.
examples.chinese: 那艘船沿着非洲的西海岸缓缓行驶。

examples.english: We could see a boat about a mile from the shore.
examples.chinese: 我们看到离岸一英里的地方有艘船。

examples.english: a small town on the shores of Lake Ontario
examples.chinese: 安大略湖的一个湖滨小镇

examples.english: The area has miles of unspoiled sandy beaches..
examples.chinese: 那个地区有连绵数英里的原始沙滩。

examples.english: By nine o'clock the beach was already crowded with people.
examples.chinese: 到9点钟的时候，沙滩上已经挤满了人。

examples.english: Let's go to the beach tomorrow.
examples.chinese: 我们明天去沙滩吧。

examples.english: When I was little we used to go to the seaside most weekends.
examples.chinese: 我小时候，我们大多数周末都去海滨。

examples.english: We bought a small cottage by the sea.
examples.chinese: 我们在海边买了一幢小屋。

examples.english: walking by the ocean in the early morning
examples.chinese: 清晨在海边漫步

examples.english: The road follows the rugged coastline of northern France for nearly 100 miles.
examples.chinese: 这条路就在法国北部崎岖不平的海岸线上，全长近100英里。

examples.english: Environmentalists are concerned about possible damage to some of the most beautiful stretches of Welsh coastline.
examples.chinese: 环保主义者担心威尔士最漂亮的几段海岸线可能会被破坏。

examples.english: Far below us, we could just see the coastline of Argentina dimly outlined.
examples.chinese: 在很远的下面，我们只看到阿根廷海岸线若隐若现的轮廓。

centers.english: the distance between one place or point and another
centers.chinese: 某地或某一点与另一地或另一点之间的距离

examples.english: What is the distance from New York to Miami?
examples.chinese: 纽约与迈阿密之间的距离是多少？

expressions.text: the distance between something and something

examples.english: Measure the distance between the window and the door.
examples.chinese: 量一量窗到门之间的距离。

examples.english: the distance between the earth and the sun
examples.chinese: 地球与太阳之间的距离

examples.english: ‘How far is Newark?’ ‘It's about 200 miles.’
examples.chinese: “到纽瓦克有多远？”“大约200英里。”

examples.english: How far is it to the nearest gas station?
examples.chinese: 到最近的加油站有多远？

examples.english: Seattle is about 100 miles from the Canadian border.
examples.chinese: 西雅图离加拿大边境约100英里。

examples.english: The junior high school is five minutes from our house.
examples.chinese: 这所初级中学离我家五分钟的路程。

examples.english: She was standing just a couple of metres from the edge of the cliff.
examples.chinese: 她站在离悬崖边仅几米处。

examples.english: The nearest village was about 20 miles away.
examples.chinese: 最近的村庄约20英里远。

examples.english: Toronto's only about an hour and a half away by car.
examples.chinese: 开车去多伦多的话约一个半小时的路程。

examples.english: The station is about two miles away from the city centre.
examples.chinese: 车站离市中心约两英里远。

examples.english: He was standing three metres away from the bomb when it exploded.
examples.chinese: 炸弹爆炸时他正站在离它3米远的地方。

examples.english: The nearest town is fifteen kilometres off.
examples.chinese: 最近的小镇在15公里以外。

examples.english: The robbers must be a long way off by now.
examples.chinese: 小偷现在肯定已经跑得很远了。

examples.english: We were still several miles off, but you could already see a glow in the sky from the lights of the city.
examples.chinese: 我们尚在几英里之外，但你已经看得到城市灯火映照到空中的亮光。

examples.english: The seeds should be planted a few inches apart.
examples.chinese: 应该相隔数英寸播下种子。

examples.english: The two towns are fifteen miles apart.
examples.chinese: 这两个城镇相距15英里。

examples.english: We were standing a few feet apart from each other.
examples.chinese: 我们站在相距几英尺的地方。

examples.english: Stand on the skis with your feet well apart.
examples.chinese: 双脚分开站在滑雪板上。

examples.english: The National Weather Service is forecasting snow in cities as far apart as Atlanta, Boston, and Cleveland.
examples.chinese: 国家气象服务中心预报说像亚特兰大、波士顿和克利夫兰这些相距很远的城市都将有降雪。

examples.english: California is a long way from Georgia.
examples.chinese: 加利福尼亚州离佐治亚州很远。

examples.english: Only a short way from the buildings is the impressive entrance to Bruntscar Cave.
examples.chinese: 距这些建筑仅一小段路就是壮观的布伦特斯卡洞穴的入口处。

examples.english: Oxford is just a short way away. You can make the drive in under an hour.
examples.chinese: 去牛津的路很近，开车的话用不了一小时。

centers.english: to continue for a particular distance

examples.english: The desert stretches over five different countries.
examples.chinese: 这片沙漠覆盖五个不同的国家。

examples.english: From the corner of the terrace the path extended down to the sea.
examples.chinese: 这条小道从平台的一角延伸至海边。

examples.english: The valley stretches from Vassai in the north to Momere in the southwest.
examples.chinese: 峡谷北起瓦塞，向西南绵延至莫梅尔。

examples.english: The estuary stretches for over 100 miles.
examples.chinese: 这河口有一百多英里长。

examples.english: The rockets have a range of 4000 km.
examples.chinese: 这些火箭的射程为4,000公里。

examples.english: A typical radio signal has a range of about 100 miles.
examples.chinese: 典型的无线电信号范围约有100英里。

examples.english: As soon as the tanks came within range, the soldiers opened fire.
examples.chinese: 坦克一进入射程之内，士兵就开火了。

examples.english: The enemy were just out of range of our cannon.
examples.chinese: 敌人刚好在我们大炮的射程之外。

examples.english: The demonstrators were hurling rocks but the police stayed out of range.
examples.chinese: 示威游行的人在扔石块，不过警察站在投掷距离之外。

centers.english: the top part of something

examples.english: When you paint, you should start at the top and work your way down.
examples.chinese: 油漆时应该从顶部开始，然后向下刷漆。

examples.english: The top of the mountain is covered with snow.
examples.chinese: 山顶上覆盖着白雪。

examples.english: The tops of the trees swayed in the breeze.
examples.chinese: 树梢在微风中摇曳。

examples.english: There's a wonderful view from the top of the tower.
examples.chinese: 从塔顶看出去景色很美。

examples.english: I looked out over the roof-tops towards the mountains beyond.
examples.chinese: 我从眼底下的屋顶，向远处的群山看去。

examples.english: It took the climbers four hours to reach the summit.
examples.chinese: 攀登者花了四小时到达山顶。

examples.english: In the distance we could see the snow-covered summit of Mount Kilimanjaro.
examples.chinese: 在远处，我们能看见乞力马扎罗山被白雪覆盖的山顶。

examples.english: We took a small train to the summit of Pike's Peak.
examples.chinese: 我们乘一辆小火车登上派克峰的峰顶。

examples.english: There's a trail up there that follows the length of the crest.
examples.chinese: 那上面有条小径直达山顶。

examples.english: When I reached the crest of the hill, I turned to look back.
examples.chinese: 到达山顶时，我转过身来往后看。

examples.english: In the distance we could see a small boat riding the crests of the waves.
examples.chinese: 我们远远地看到一叶小舟驶在浪尖上。

centers.english: at the top of something

examples.english: She brought me an enormous dish of ice cream with a bright red cherry on top.
examples.chinese: 她拿给我一大盘冰淇淋，顶上有一颗鲜红的樱桃。

examples.english: The church stood on top of a hill.
examples.chinese: 教堂坐落在小山顶上。

examples.english: On top of the cupboard was an old trunk, covered in dust.
examples.chinese: 橱顶上有一只积满了灰尘的旧箱子。

examples.english: The vase has a small crack at the top.
examples.chinese: 花瓶的顶端有条小裂缝。

examples.english: He was waiting for me at the top of the stairs.
examples.chinese: 他在楼梯顶端等我。

examples.english: Don't forget to write your name at the top of the test before you turn it in.
examples.chinese: 交卷之前别忘了把自己的姓名写在试卷的上端。

centers.english: when something is nearest the top

examples.english: The books are on the top shelf.
examples.chinese: 书在最上面的架子上。

examples.english: Put the papers in the top drawer of the filing cabinet.
examples.chinese: 把文件放在文件柜最上面的抽屉里。

examples.english: We moved into an apartment on the top floor of the building.
examples.chinese: 我们搬到了这幢建筑物最高层的寓所里。

examples.english: Several of her upper teeth were missing.
examples.chinese: 她的上排牙齿有几颗掉了。

examples.english: He already had a light growth of hair on his upper lip.
examples.chinese: 他的上唇已经长出稀疏的胡子。

examples.english: Most meteorites do not make it through Earth's upper atmosphere.
examples.chinese: 大部分陨石都未能进入地球大气层的外圈。

examples.english: Human bones were found in the uppermost level of rock.
examples.chinese: 在岩石的最上层发现了人类骨骼。

examples.english: Janey went to the back of the house, sat on the topmost step, and wept.
examples.chinese: 珍妮走到屋子后面，坐在最高一级楼梯上哭泣。

centers.english: a hole that goes through something

examples.english: The sheet was ancient and full of holes.
examples.chinese: 床单很旧，上面全是一个个洞。

examples.english: She stuck her finger through the hole.
examples.chinese: 她把手指插进洞里。

examples.english: Troy looked through a hole in the fence at the garden next door.
examples.chinese: 特洛伊从篱笆上的一个洞看隔壁的花园。

examples.english: A shaft of light came in through a hole in the corrugated iron roof.
examples.chinese: 一道亮光从瓦楞铁皮屋顶上的一个小孔射进来。

expressions.text: something has a hole in it

examples.english: I can't wear my green shirt -- it has a hole in it.
examples.chinese: 我的绿衬衫不能穿了—上面有个洞。

examples.english: They stared at the gaping hole in the wall.
examples.chinese: 他们盯着墙上的那个大洞。

examples.english: The gate was locked but we managed to get through a gap in the fence.
examples.chinese: 大门锁上了，但我们还是通过篱笆上的缺口钻了进去。

examples.english: The light was coming through a tiny gap under the door.
examples.chinese: 亮光穿过门底下的一道细缝照射进来。

examples.english: Sharon has a gap between her two front teeth.
examples.chinese: 莎伦两颗门牙之间有一条宽缝。

examples.english: Bees come and go through a small opening at the bottom of the hive.
examples.chinese: 蜜蜂从蜂房底部的一个小开口处进出。

examples.english: We zipped up the opening of the tent to stop the mosquitoes getting in.
examples.chinese: 我们拉上帐篷开口处的拉链，不让蚊子飞进来。

examples.english: The telescope has an aperture of 2.4 metres.
examples.chinese: 这架望远镜的孔径为2.4米。

centers.english: a hole in the ground or in the surface of something
centers.chinese: 地上或某物表面的洞坑

examples.english: The old mineshaft had left a deep hole, dangerous to both people and livestock.
examples.chinese: 旧矿井留下了一个很深的洞，给人和牲口都带来了危险。

examples.english: The aim is to get the ball in a hole in the ground.
examples.chinese: 目标是要把球打进地上的一个洞里。

examples.english: We made a small hole in the earth, just deep enough to cover the roots of the plant.
examples.chinese: 我们在泥土里挖了一个小洞，深度正好足够覆盖植物的根部。

examples.english: Make a hole in the bottom of each plant pot to let the water drain out.
examples.chinese: 在每个花盆的底部开一个洞，让水流出去。

examples.english: A fox had dug a hole under our garden fence.
examples.chinese: 一只狐狸在我们花园的篱笆下面挖了一个洞。

examples.english: Construction workers have to dig a thousand foot hole before work can start on the tunnel.
examples.chinese: 隧道工程开始以前，建筑工人必须挖出一条1,000英尺的坑道。

examples.english: The meteor left a crater over five miles wide.
examples.chinese: 流星留下了一个超过5英里宽的大坑。

examples.english: When the bomb exploded it left a huge crater in the ground.
examples.chinese: 炸弹爆炸后，地面上留下了一个大坑。

examples.english: He rode his bike over an enormous pothole.
examples.chinese: 他骑自行车经过一个很大的坑。

examples.english: It is going to cost the city at least $500,000 to patch potholes created by winter rains.
examples.chinese: 这个城市至少要花费50万美元修补冬天下雨后形成的坑洼。

examples.english: They found a large pit where all the dead bodies had been thrown.
examples.chinese: 他们发现了一个大坑，所有的尸体都扔在那里。

examples.english: We dug a pit a yard deep in the soil.
examples.chinese: 我们在土里挖了一个一码深的坑。

examples.english: Matthew found himself standing at the edge of a deep abyss.
examples.chinese: 马修发现自己站在一个万丈深谷的边缘。

examples.english: An unsteady-looking rope bridge was the only way to get across the chasm.
examples.chinese: 一座看上去晃晃悠悠的索桥是通过峡谷的唯一路径。

examples.english: The landscape was a series of mountains, chasms, canyons and valleys.
examples.chinese: 那里的地形山峦起伏、峡谷纵横。

centers.english: a place on a surface that is lower than the rest

examples.english: The boy fell off his bicycle when he went over a dip in the road too fast.
examples.chinese: 那男孩骑自行车经过一个凹坑的时候速度太快，从车上摔了下来。

examples.english: The X-rays showed a slight indentation in the man's skull.
examples.chinese: X光片显示那人的头盖骨上有个地方微微凹陷。

examples.english: She gently made an indentation in the centre of each cookie.
examples.chinese: 她在每一块曲奇饼的中心轻轻地点了一个凹痕。

examples.english: You could see a depression in the ground where the helicopter had landed.
examples.chinese: 你可以看到地面上直升机降落的地方留下了一个凹坑。

examples.english: The depressions in the sand are made by turtles, that come up here to lay their eggs.
examples.chinese: 这些沙坑都是由来这里下蛋的海龟留下的。

examples.english: The picture frame came with scratches, dents and marks that make it look old.
examples.chinese: 画框上有划痕、凹坑和污渍，使它看上去很旧。

examples.english: Emma backed into a tree, leaving a dent in the car's rear bumper.
examples.chinese: 埃玛倒车时撞到一棵树上，把汽车的后保险杠撞了个凹痕。

centers.english: a long narrow hole across the surface of something
centers.chinese: 横穿某物表面的狭长裂口

examples.english: This cup has a crack in it.
examples.chinese: 这只杯子有条缝。

examples.english: The crack in the bedroom wall seems to be widening.
examples.chinese: 卧室墙上的那条裂缝好像越来越大了。

examples.english: We suddenly noticed there was a split in the side of the tent.
examples.chinese: 我们突然注意到帐篷的侧面有道裂缝。

examples.english: Tania's skirt has a long slit up the back.
examples.chinese: 塔妮娅的裙子后面有一条长长的开叉。

examples.english: I covered my eyes with my hands, watching through the slits between my fingers.
examples.chinese: 我用双手捂住眼睛，通过手指缝看出来。

examples.english: I dropped a quarter in the slot and dialed the number.
examples.chinese: 我在投币孔中投入一个二角五分的硬币，然后拨了号码。

examples.english: The message was placed in every employee's mail slot.
examples.chinese: 每位员工的邮箱里都投放了这个信息。

centers.english: a hole in something that has been damaged, allowing water, air etc to escape
centers.chinese: 因受到破坏而形成的漏水、漏气等的孔

examples.english: Water trickled in through the hole in the roof.
examples.chinese: 水从屋顶上的那个洞滴漏进来。

examples.english: There are holes in the ozone layer above Antarctica.
examples.chinese: 南极洲上空有臭氧层空洞。

examples.english: The water pressure's right down - there must be a leak in the pipe.
examples.chinese: 水压一下子下降了——肯定是水管漏了。

examples.english: The boat had sprung a leak and it was sinking fast.
examples.chinese: 船突然出现裂缝，下沉得很快。

examples.english: I could hear the hissing sound of air escaping from the puncture.
examples.chinese: 我能听到轮胎的刺孔漏气的咝咝声。

examples.english: The tyre's gone flat again -- I think we've got a slow puncture.
examples.chinese: 轮胎又瘪了—我想它有个小洞，气慢慢跑掉了。

centers.english: words for describing something that has lots of holes in it
centers.chinese: 描述某物有许多洞孔的词语

examples.english: Parker's socks were so full of holes that his toes peeked through.
examples.chinese: 帕克的袜子上全是洞，脚趾都露出来了。

examples.english: The roof was full of holes, all of which sprouted grass and moss.
examples.chinese: 屋顶上全是洞，都长满了草和苔藓。

examples.english: The old table was riddled with holes.
examples.chinese: 这张旧桌子上面全是洞眼。

examples.english: The ship returned from the war-zone riddled with bullet holes.
examples.chinese: 这只船从战区回来，满身弹孔。

examples.english: They put the insect into a tin with a perforated lid.
examples.chinese: 他们把虫子放入一个盖子上有孔的罐子里。

examples.english: Tear along the perforated line and return the bottom part of the form.
examples.chinese: 顺齿孔撕下表格的底部并交回来。

examples.english: If a garage has a porous floor, it can become extremely damp.
examples.chinese: 车库的地板如果是透水性的，会很潮湿。

examples.english: Plants in containers made of porous material, must be watered more often than those in plastic pots.
examples.chinese: 种在透水性材料做的花盆里的植物，必须比种在塑料盆里的植物多浇水。

examples.english: The house had a leaky roof.
examples.chinese: 房子的屋顶漏水。

examples.english: There was a pool of water in the corner where water was dripping from a leaky pipe.
examples.chinese: 角落里有一摊水，是水管漏了滴下来的。

centers.english: to make a hole in the ground or surface of something
centers.chinese: 在地里或某物的表面打洞

examples.english: Carefully hollow out the pineapple and then fill it with the ice-cream.
examples.chinese: 小心地把菠萝掏空，然后放入冰淇淋。

examples.english: To plant the tree you need to dig out a hole about 20 cm wide and 30 cm deep.
examples.chinese: 种树前，你要先挖一个约20厘米宽、30厘米深的洞。

examples.english: The workmen were already digging out the foundations for the building.
examples.chinese: 工人们已经在挖大楼的地基。

examples.english: The blade gouged a deep wound in her leg.
examples.chinese: 刀片在她腿上割了一道很深的伤口。

examples.english: In the play he tries to gouge out his own eyes.
examples.chinese: 剧中他试图挖出自己的双眼。

examples.english: A small bead of blood formed where she had pricked her finger.
examples.chinese: 她扎到手指的地方形成了一个小血滴。

examples.english: Prick the potatoes before baking them.
examples.chinese: 马铃薯在烘烤之前要戳几个洞。

examples.english: I heard the dentist start drilling, but I couldn't feel anything.
examples.chinese: 我听见牙医开始钻孔，但我却没什么感觉。

examples.english: Oil companies still drill for oil off Santa Barbara.
examples.chinese: 石油公司还在圣巴巴拉附近海域钻探石油。

examples.english: It sounds like someone's drilling into the wall.
examples.chinese: 那声音就像是有人在墙上钻孔。

examples.english: The oil engineers have already moved their drilling equipment into the area.
examples.chinese: 石油工程师已把钻探设备运进该地区。

examples.english: The mining company bored a 5000 foot hole.
examples.chinese: 采矿公司凿了一口5,000英尺深的井。

examples.english: The machine they used to bore the tunnel is the size of a two storey house.
examples.chinese: 他们用来挖隧道的机器有两层楼的房子那么大。

examples.english: They had to bore through solid rock.
examples.chinese: 他们必须在坚硬的岩石上打洞。

examples.english: He accidentally dented the garage door, trying to reverse in.
examples.chinese: 他倒车进车库的时候不小心撞凹了车库的门。

examples.english: In the market I bought a beautiful but badly dented silver bowl.
examples.chinese: 我在市场上买了一只很漂亮但凹得很厉害的银碗。

centers.english: to make a hole through something

examples.english: Make a hole in the bottom of the plant pot to allow the water to drain out.
examples.chinese: 在花盆的底部钻个孔，以便让水流出。

examples.english: Make a hole in the surface of the pie before you put it in the oven.
examples.chinese: 在馅饼的表面上留个洞，再放入烤箱。

examples.english: She pierced the lid of the can and poured the milk into a saucepan.
examples.chinese: 她戳穿罐盖，把牛奶倒入平底锅。

examples.english: The arrow pierced his heart.
examples.chinese: 箭刺入了他的心脏。

examples.english: Shelley had her ears pierced when she was a teenager.
examples.chinese: 谢利十几岁的时候扎了耳洞。

examples.english: The doctor was worried that the broken rib might puncture the woman's lung.
examples.chinese: 医生担心那女人断裂的肋骨可能会刺入她的肺。

examples.english: There was an old punctured football lying between the goal-posts.
examples.chinese: 球门柱之间有一个漏气的旧足球。

examples.english: The conductor walked through the train, punching everyone's ticket.
examples.chinese: 列车员穿过一节节车厢，给每一个人的车票打孔。

examples.english: I punched holes in the papers and filed them away in a binder.
examples.chinese: 我在文件上打了孔，归档在一个活页文件夹里。

examples.english: The shoemaker was threading stitches through tiny holes he had punched in the leather.
examples.chinese: 制鞋匠在皮革上打好小小的洞眼，正在一针针地缝上线。

examples.english: I drilled two holes in the shelf and attached it to the wall.
examples.chinese: 我在架子搁板上钻了两个孔，把它安装在墙上。

examples.english: We drilled several small holes in the lid of the jar.
examples.chinese: 我们在瓶盖上钻了几个小孔。

centers.english: to stop doing something for a short time before continuing

examples.english: Kim was reading her e-mail, but she paused and looked up when I came in.
examples.chinese: 金在看电子邮件，我进屋的时候，她停下抬头看了看。

examples.english: Lawrence paused and turned to me: ‘Look, if you don't think it's a good idea, don't go.’
examples.chinese: 劳伦斯停了一下转向我说：“听着，如果你认为这个主意不好，就不要去。”

examples.english: She talked for about twenty minutes without even pausing for breath.
examples.chinese: 她一口气说了近20分钟。

examples.english: We waited while Graham paused to light a cigarette.
examples.chinese: 格雷厄姆停下来点烟的时候我们大家都等着。

examples.english: Can we stop at the next services and get something to eat?
examples.chinese: 我们在下一个服务站停下来吃点东西怎么样?

examples.english: We'll stop for lunch at 12:30.
examples.chinese: 我们12点半停一停去吃午饭。

examples.english: We stopped to listen to a group of boys who were playing guitars in the street.
examples.chinese: 我们停下脚步听一群男孩子在路边弹吉他。

examples.english: I stopped to rest for a few minutes.
examples.chinese: 我停下来休息几分钟。

expressions.text: stop doing something (for a moment/while etc)

examples.english: Could you stop making that noise for a moment?
examples.chinese: 停一停别发出那种噪声好吗?

examples.english: The baby hadn't stopped crying for two whole hours.
examples.chinese: 宝宝不停地哭了整整两小时。

examples.english: She hesitated for a moment before replying.
examples.chinese: 她犹豫了一会儿才回答。

examples.english: Barry stood at the door, hesitating. Should he walk straight in or knock?
examples.chinese: 巴里站在门口，犹豫不决。他该直接进去还是敲门呢？

examples.english: ‘Definitely’, he said, without any hesitation.
examples.chinese: “千真万确。〕9他毫不犹豫地说道。

centers.english: to stop doing something in order to rest, eat etc
centers.chinese: 为了休息、吃东西等停止正在做的事

examples.english: We're all getting tired. Let's take a break for ten minutes.
examples.chinese: 我们都累了。大家休息十分钟吧。

examples.english: Is it all right if we have a break at about 10.30?
examples.chinese: 我们10点半休息一下好吗？

expressions.text: have a quick/short/five minute etc break

examples.english: If you're working at a computer, it's best if you have a quick break at least once an hour.
examples.chinese: 如果使用电脑，最好至少每小时小憩一下。

examples.english: Let's take five and get some coffee.
examples.chinese: 我们休息一下，喝点咖啡吧。

examples.english: It's 12 o' clock. Why don't we take a breather?
examples.chinese: 12点了，我们为什么不歇一会儿？

examples.english: I'd only been running for five minutes, but I had to stop and take a breather.
examples.chinese: 我才跑了五分钟，但是得停下来喘口气了。

examples.english: At 12.30, the committee broke for lunch.
examples.chinese: 12点半，委员会休息吃午餐。

examples.english: There's still an enormous amount of work to do before we break for Christmas.
examples.chinese: 我们圣诞假期之前还有大量工作要做。

examples.english: Try to take time out and get together with the kids.
examples.chinese: 尽量抽空与孩子们在一起。

expressions.text: take time out to do something

examples.english: Taking time out to relax each day is important during pregnancy.
examples.chinese: 怀孕期间每天稍作休息放松一下是很重要的。

examples.english: The President took time out from his busy schedule to speak to the crowds.
examples.chinese: 总统百忙之中抽空与民众对话。

examples.english: If there are no more questions, the committee will adjourn until tomorrow morning.
examples.chinese: 如果没有其他问题要问，委员会将休会至明天上午。

examples.english: ‘The court will recess for twenty minutes,’ Judge Bart said.
examples.chinese: “休庭20分钟。”巴特法官说。

examples.english: The trial was adjourned for two weeks until the psychiatrist's report was ready.
examples.chinese: 审判休庭两星期，直到精神病专家的报告出来。

centers.english: a period of time when you stop doing something

examples.english: She returned to her job after a six-month break.
examples.chinese: 她休息了六个月后，又回去工作了。

examples.english: After finishing school, Craig felt he needed a break from studying.
