examples.chinese: 毕业后，克雷格认为自己需要休息一下再去深造。

examples.english: You get a one hour lunch break, and fifteen minutes for a coffee break in the afternoon.
examples.chinese: 你有一小时的午餐时间，下午还有15分钟休息。

examples.english: After a long pause, Barney said: ‘Yes, I suppose you're right.’
examples.chinese: 巴尼长长地停顿了一下，说道：“是的，我觉得你是对的。”

examples.english: There was a pause in the conversation as everyone turned to say hello to Paul.
examples.chinese: 所有人转身向保罗打招呼，谈话中断了一会儿。

examples.english: ‘Where's Matt?’ There was a long and pregnant pause.
examples.chinese: “马特在哪儿？”然后是好一阵意味深长的停顿。

examples.english: The noise went on all night, without a single moment's respite.
examples.chinese: 噪音响了整整一晚，一刻也不停息。

examples.english: The citizens had only a few days’ respite from the conflict, before the shelling began again.
examples.chinese: 那场战争中市民只有几天喘息时间，过后炮轰又开始了。

examples.english: Weathermen yesterday warned that there would be no respite from the gales.
examples.chinese: 气象预报员昨天发出警告，称大风会一直持续。

examples.english: The drug can only provide a brief respite from the pain.
examples.chinese: 这种药只能暂时止痛。

examples.english: Some mothers regard work as a welcome respite from the stress of looking after a home and children.
examples.chinese: 有些做母亲的将工作视为令人高兴的暂息时间，能从照顾家庭和子女的压力中解脱出来。

examples.english: There was a short letup in the downpour after lunch.
examples.chinese: 午饭后，大雨暂歇。

examples.english: The fighting raged without a letup through the night,
examples.chinese: 激战持续了一整晚没有停止。

examples.english: Kline warned against any letup in the pilot's concentration.
examples.chinese: 克兰恩警告说，飞行员的注意力不能有丝毫松懈。

examples.english: There was a lull, and then the thunder came again.
examples.chinese: 平静了一会，接着雷声又响起来。

examples.english: Managers at Metrocentre have reported a lull in the recession, as takings continue to soar.
examples.chinese: 地铁购物中心的经理们报告说，经济衰退暂时停歇，营业收入持续攀升。

examples.english: For two days there had been a lull in the fighting.
examples.chinese: 两天来战斗暂停了。

examples.english: I waited for a lull in the conversation, before getting up to go.
examples.chinese: 我等着谈话间歇起身走开。

examples.english: At last a temporary agreement was reached, which gave both sides a breathing space.
examples.chinese: 终于达成临时协议，这给双方一次休息的机会。

examples.english: After the divorce, I badly needed some breathing space to try and rebuild my life.
examples.chinese: 离婚后，我急需一点喘息的时间来重建自己的生活。

centers.english: a short period of time when schoolwork, a meeting, a game etc stops
centers.chinese: 停止上课、会议、比赛等的一段短暂时间

examples.english: The children have a fifteen-minute break at 11 o'clock.
examples.chinese: 11点钟，孩子们有15分钟休息时间。

examples.english: Could you come and see me during afternoon break?
examples.chinese: 下午休息时你能来见我吗？

examples.english: There will now be a short intermission.
examples.chinese: 现在要有一次短暂的中场休息。

examples.english: Drinks will be on sale during the interval.
examples.chinese: 饮料于幕间休息时有售。

examples.english: Halfway through the performance there was a short musical interlude.
examples.chinese: 演出进行到一半时，有一次短暂的幕间间歇。

examples.english: The dance provided a delightful comic interlude.
examples.chinese: 那个舞蹈是滑稽的幕间表演，让人开心。

examples.english: Mr Robertson applied for an adjournment, to see if witnesses could be traced.
examples.chinese: 罗伯逊先生请求休庭，以看看是否能找到证人。

examples.english: The heated debate continued after a ninety-minute adjournment.
examples.chinese: 休庭90分钟后又继续激烈的辩论。

examples.english: Peace talks resumed on June 15th, after a month-long recess.
examples.chinese: 休会一个月后，6月15日重开和平会谈。

examples.english: At four o'clock, the judge called a recess, and the jury was led out of the courtroom.
examples.chinese: 4点钟时法官宣布休庭，陪审团被带领走出法庭。

examples.english: The court will be in recess for twenty minutes.
examples.chinese: 法庭将休庭20分钟。

examples.english: The Bill was brought before the House of Commons and passed before the summer recess.
examples.chinese: 该议案被提交给了下议院，并在夏季休会期前通过了。

examples.english: Congress's two-week Easter recess
examples.chinese: 为期两周的国会复活节休会期

examples.english: The House is in recess until January 22nd, when it will vote on the Bill.
examples.chinese: 议会休假要到1月22日结束，届时将会对该议案表决。

centers.english: before the usual or expected time
centers.chinese: 早于往常的时间或预计的时间

examples.english: I finished work early today.
examples.chinese: 今天我很早完工。

examples.english: If you plant the seeds too early they won't grow.
examples.chinese: 种子如果播得太早就不会生长。

examples.english: After an early lunch, we started the meeting at one o'clock.
examples.chinese: 我们早早地吃过午饭，1点钟开始开会。

examples.english: Everyone was deeply shocked by his early death at the age of forty-five.
examples.chinese: 他45岁就不幸早逝，大家都深感震惊。

examples.english: You're early - I wasn't expecting you till seven.
examples.chinese: 你来得早—我以为你要到7点才来呢。

examples.english: I'm sorry, I'm a bit early for my appointment.
examples.chinese: 对不起，我比约好的时间早来了一点。

examples.english: Our first child was born eight weeks early.
examples.chinese: 我们的第一个孩子早产了八周。

examples.english: We will try to complete the building ahead of time.
examples.chinese: 我们将争取让大楼提前竣工。

examples.english: Visas must be obtained ahead of time, and it may take several weeks to get them in order.
examples.chinese: 签证必须提前取得，有时候要好几个星期才能办好。

examples.english: You can always prepare the salad ahead of time and refrigerate it.
examples.chinese: 沙拉总是可以提前做好放在冰箱里。

examples.english: Due to the economy's strong recovery, Mexico will repay ahead of schedule the last installment of a $13.5 billion loan.
examples.chinese: 由于经济强劲恢复，墨西哥将提前偿还135亿美元贷款的最后一期。

expressions.text: six months/two weeks/a year etc ahead of schedule

examples.english: The renovation of the school has just been completed three months ahead of schedule.
examples.chinese: 学校的整修刚刚完工，比原计划提前了三个月。

examples.english: I like to get all my Christmas presents bought and sent in good time.
examples.chinese: 我喜欢早早地买好全部圣诞礼物然后送出去。

examples.english: It is important to arrive in good time for your interview.
examples.chinese: 面试时一定要及早赶到。

examples.english: In spite of the bad traffic, we reached London with plenty of time to spare.
examples.chinese: 尽管交通很不顺畅，我们到达伦敦时还是早了不少时间。

expressions.text: with ten minutes/half an hour etc to spare

examples.english: I finished the test with just two minutes to spare two minutes before the end.
examples.chinese: 我答完考题后只剩下两分钟时间。

centers.english: too early

examples.english: Too much success too early can cause you to grow overconfident.
examples.chinese: 过早取得太多成功会使你变得过分自信。

examples.english: It's still too early to tell if the treatment is going to be effective.
examples.chinese: 现在讲这种疗法是否有效还为时过早。

examples.english: There aren't any raspberries in the stores yet. It's too early for them.
examples.chinese: 商店里还没有覆盆子。现在季节还太早。

examples.english: We arrived far too early and had to wait outside for an hour.
examples.chinese: 我们到得太早，只得在外面等了一小时。

examples.english: I don't think you should go back to work too soon after having the baby.
examples.chinese: 我觉得你生了孩子不应太快回去上班。

examples.english: It's too soon to say what effect the merger will have on the company's 1500 employees
examples.chinese: 说合并会对公司的1，500名雇员产生什么样的影响，现在还为时过早。

examples.english: I knew it was too soon for any likely resolution of the problem.
examples.chinese: 我知道现在还早，这个问题不可能有解决办法。

examples.english: You can't get married next week! That's far too soon.
examples.chinese: 你不能下周就结婚！那也太快了。

examples.english: Lendl hit the ball way too soon.
examples.chinese: 伦德尔太早击球了。

examples.english: Before his untimely death in 1991, Freddie Mercury was a brilliant singer and performer.
examples.chinese: 1991年弗雷迪·默丘里英年早逝，之前他是一位杰出的歌手及表演者。

examples.english: His grandfather had met an untimely end as the result of too much whisky.
examples.chinese: 他的祖父因为过量饮用威士忌而早逝。

examples.english: Alcoholism is one of the major causes of premature death.
examples.chinese: 酗酒是早逝的主要原因之一。

examples.english: It has been proved that sunbathing causes premature ageing of the skin.
examples.chinese: 日光浴已被证明会引起皮肤早衰。

examples.english: Her baby was premature and weighed only 2kg.
examples.chinese: 她的孩子早产，体重只有两公斤。

examples.english: Hannah's hair went prematurely grey when she was only 24.
examples.chinese: 汉娜才24岁的时候头发就过早地变灰白了。

examples.english: I think it would be jumping the gun to sign the agreement at this stage.
examples.chinese: 我认为这个阶段签约是操之过急。

examples.english: Surely it's jumping the gun to buy the ring before you've even asked her to marry you?
examples.chinese: 你甚至还没有向她求婚就买了戒指，想必也太操之过急了吧？

examples.english: It's still early days, but all the signs are that the operation has been a success.
examples.chinese: 现在说还太早，但一切迹象都显示手术很成功。

examples.english: ‘It looks like Liverpool are going to win the championship.’ ‘Oh I don't know. It's early days yet.’
examples.chinese: “看来利物浦队将赢得冠军。”“噢，我不知道，现在说还太早。”

centers.english: early in the morning

examples.english: I always wake up early when the weather's warm.
examples.chinese: 天气暖和的时候我总是起得很早。

examples.english: Early the next day, Jamie received a call from his mother.
examples.chinese: 第二天一早，杰米接到他母亲打来的一个电话。

examples.english: If we make an early start we should avoid the worst of the traffic.
examples.chinese: 我们如果一早出发应该能避开糟糕的交通高峰。

examples.english: The robbery took place in the early hours of Sunday morning.
examples.chinese: 抢劫案在星期天的凌晨时分发生。

examples.english: Jack was always an early bird; he did a lot of his work before dawn.
examples.chinese: 杰克一向是个早起的人，天没亮就干了不少活。

examples.english: I'll telephone her first thing, I promise.
examples.chinese: 我保证第一件事就是给她打电话。

expressions.text: first thing tomorrow/Wednesday/in the morning etc

examples.english: Leave it on my desk and I'll deal with it first thing tomorrow.
examples.chinese: 放在我的桌子上吧，明天一早我就来处理。

examples.english: My Dad used to get up at the crack of dawn every Sunday to go fishing.
examples.chinese: 我爸爸以前每个星期天都天一亮就起来去钓鱼。

examples.english: Geoffrey was up bright and early on Saturday morning, and had everything packed before breakfast.
examples.chinese: 杰弗里星期六一大早就起床，在吃早餐之前把所有的东西都收拾好了。

examples.english: Waking bright and early, I went for a swim and took the dog for a walk.
examples.chinese: 我一大早就醒了，去游了个泳，然后带着狗去散步。

centers.english: arriving or leaving late

examples.english: Andrew arrived late, as usual.
examples.chinese: 安德鲁一如往常，又迟到了。

examples.english: Sorry I'm late - my car wouldn't start.
examples.chinese: 对不起我迟到了—我的车发动不起来。

examples.english: She often arrives late for work.
examples.chinese: 她上班经常迟到。

examples.english: As usual, the bus was half an hour late.
examples.chinese: 和往常一样，公共汽车又迟到了半个小时。

examples.english: We apologize for the late arrival of Flight AZ709.
examples.chinese: AZ709航班延误到达，我们表示歉意。

examples.english: The buses are never on time.
examples.chinese: 公共汽车从来不准时。

examples.english: She knew if she wasn't on time that day she'd lose her job.
examples.chinese: 她知道那天如果不准时到达，她就会失去工作。

examples.english: If we don't leave on time, we'll miss the flight!
examples.chinese: 我们如果不准时出发，会赶不上飞机的！

examples.english: Latecomers will not be allowed into the concert hall until the interval.
examples.chinese: 迟到者须等到幕间休息才准进入音乐厅。

centers.english: what you say when someone or something is late
centers.chinese: 某人迟到或某事迟发生时说的话

examples.english: Where have you been? You said you'd be here at three!
examples.chinese: 你去哪儿了？你说过3点钟到的！

examples.english: ‘What kept you?’ ‘I couldn't find my glasses.’
examples.chinese: “什么事让你晚到了？”“我找不到眼镜。”

examples.english: ‘Look, here's the bus.’ ‘It's about time!’
examples.chinese: “你看，公共汽车来了。”“早该来了。

expressions.text: what time do you call this?

examples.english: What time do you call this, Martin? You were supposed to be here half an hour ago.
examples.chinese: 现在是什么时候了，马丁？你在半小时之前就应该到了。

examples.english: ‘The pictures have finally arrived.’ ‘Well, better late than never.’
examples.chinese: “这些画终于到了。”“好吧，晚到总比不到好。”

examples.english: Oh my god, is that the time? I've got to go!
examples.chinese: 噢，我的天哪，时间到了？我得走了！

centers.english: later than usual

examples.english: The library stays open late on Fridays.
examples.chinese: 星期五图书馆开得比平日晚。

examples.english: The harvest was late this year because of the bad weather.
examples.chinese: 今年由于天气不好，庄稼收得晚。

examples.english: I'm afraid I'll have to work late again tomorrow.
examples.chinese: 恐怕我明天又要晚下班了。

examples.english: It's really nice to get up late on Saturday mornings.
examples.chinese: 星期六早上睡到很晚才起来真舒服啊。

examples.english: ‘Where's Bill?’ ‘He's having a late lunch.’
examples.chinese: “比尔在哪里？”“他现在才吃午饭。”

examples.english: Greg got married late in life.
examples.chinese: 格雷格很晚才结婚。

examples.english: Carter and Reagan had come into politics relatively late in life.
examples.chinese: 卡特和里根从政相对较晚。

centers.english: what you say when someone or something is late
centers.chinese: 表示某人迟到或某事迟发生的话

examples.english: The meeting started late.
examples.chinese: 会议开始晚了。

examples.english: There are severe penalties for late payment of bills.
examples.chinese: 账单迟付罚款很重。

examples.english: Tony handed in his homework a day late.
examples.chinese: 托尼作业晚交了一天。

examples.english: I must take these books back to the library - they're overdue.
examples.chinese: 我必须把这些书还给图书馆—已经过期了。

examples.english: The rent's three weeks overdue.
examples.chinese: 租金逾期三周了。

examples.english: Jim's worried because he's behind with his loan repayments.
examples.chinese: 吉姆很担心，因为他已经欠了几期款项未还。

expressions.text: be two months etc behind with something

examples.english: You're two months behind with the rent.
examples.chinese: 你的房租已拖欠了两个月。

examples.english: I'm getting behind with the mortgage and I don't know how I'm going to pay it.
examples.chinese: 我开始拖欠抵押贷款的还款了，不知道拿什么去付。

examples.english: Even when people fall behind with their payments, they continue to take on financial commitments.
examples.chinese: 人们就算有贷款未还，他们还是会继续去借贷。

examples.english: In some areas, two out of three tenants are in arrears.
examples.chinese: 在一些地区，2/3的租户拖欠租金。

examples.english: Many countries are in arrears with their contributions.
examples.chinese: 许多国家拖欠捐款。

expressions.text: be two months etc in arrears

examples.english: Over 60,000 Londoners are more than three months in arrears with their mortgage repayments.
examples.chinese: 六万多个伦敦人拖欠抵押贷款还款三个月以上。

examples.english: The tax bills are sent out annually, so it's very easy for small employers to fall into arrears.
examples.chinese: 税单一年寄出一次，所以一些小雇主很容易拖欠税金。

examples.english: John made a belated attempt to apologize.
examples.chinese: 约翰尝试作出迟来的道歉。

examples.english: I got a belated birthday card from my cousin yesterday.
examples.chinese: 昨天我收到了表哥迟到的生日贺卡。

examples.english: her belated realisation that he was in love with someone else
examples.chinese: 她事后才明白他爱的是别人

examples.english: You're late! Hurry up and get your books out and get on with your work.
examples.chinese: 你迟到了！赶快拿出书来做功课。

examples.english: You're late again, Chris! You'll be in trouble if you don't get your act together soon.
examples.chinese: 你又迟到了，克里斯！你要是还不快点加把劲，就会有麻烦。

centers.english: to have done less than you planned to do

examples.english: If you're so far behind that you can't finish it on time, give me a call and I'll come and help.
examples.chinese: 如果你落后很多来不及完成，就打电话给我，我来帮你。

examples.english: I've got to stay late tonight because I'm a bit behind with my work.
examples.chinese: 今天晚上我得熬夜了，因为我的工作进度落后了一些。

examples.english: If you don't do your homework every week, you'll get behind in your studies.
examples.chinese: 如果你不是每个星期都做家庭作业，你的学习就会落在别人后面。

examples.english: We were way behind on the budget planning already when the new project came in.
examples.chinese: 这新的项目插进来的时候，我们的预算计划已经远远落后了。

examples.english: Sorry, I can't talk now - I'm behind schedule as it is.
examples.chinese: 对不起，我现在不能谈话——我赶不上计划了。

expressions.text: be six months etc behind schedule

examples.english: The tunnel project is now 18 months behind schedule and £300 million over budget.
examples.chinese: 隧道工程目前的进度比预期落后了18个月，花费超过预算3亿英镑。

examples.english: We're running late - we'll have to hurry if we want to catch the 5 o'clock train.
examples.chinese: 我们晚了，如果想赶上5点钟的火车就必须快一点。

examples.english: The Queen's visit to the factory was running late, so she did not come to see the production department.
examples.chinese: 女王参观工厂的时间有所延误，所以她没来视察生产部。

centers.english: too late

examples.english: I'm afraid you're too late - I've just sold the last ticket.
examples.chinese: 恐怕你来得太晚了—我刚刚卖出最后一张票。

examples.english: We rushed to the store as soon as we left work but arrived too late.
examples.chinese: 我们一下班就直奔商店，但还是太迟了。

examples.english: They got to the airport too late to catch the plane.
examples.chinese: 他们到达机场太迟了，没法赶上飞机。

expressions.text: it is too late (to do something)

examples.english: By the time the doctor arrived, it was too late; he was already dead.
examples.chinese: 医生到达的时候已太迟了；他已经死了。

examples.english: It's never too late to learn a new language.
examples.chinese: 学习外语永不嫌迟。

examples.english: You'd better hurry or you'll miss the start of the show.
examples.chinese: 你最好快点，否则会错过节目的开始部分。

examples.english: I missed the bus and had to wait half an hour for the next one.
examples.chinese: 我没赶上公共汽车，只得等了半小时坐下一班。

examples.english: Perhaps it's a bit late in the day for apologies.
examples.chinese: 现在道歉也许已有点晚了。

expressions.text: it's a little late to do something

examples.english: It's a little late to start worrying about that now.
examples.chinese: 现在开始担心那事有点太晚了。

expressions.text: leave it too late/a bit late/ let it go too long

examples.english: At last the government has decided to lower interest rates, but I think they've let it go too long.
examples.chinese: 政府终于决定调低利率，但我认为已经为时太晚。

expressions.text: leave it too late/a bit late to do something

examples.english: You might have left it a bit too late to apply for a place at university for this academic year.
examples.chinese: 你现在申请这个学年读大学可能太迟了。

centers.english: late at night

examples.english: Look, it's late and I'm tired - let's talk about this tomorrow.
examples.chinese: 看，现在很晚了，我也累了—我们明天再谈这事吧。

examples.english: I must go home now, it's getting late.
examples.chinese: 我现在得回家了，天晚了。

examples.english: I don't like coming home late at night to an empty house.
examples.chinese: 我不喜欢夜深的时候回到家里，面对一个空荡荡的屋子。

examples.english: They stayed up late to watch the end of the match.
examples.chinese: 他们熬夜不睡看比赛的结局。

examples.english: You look as if you've been having too many late nights recently.
examples.chinese: 你看上去好像最近熬夜太多了。

examples.english: In the middle of the night, I was woken by a loud noise downstairs.
examples.chinese: 半夜的时候，我被楼下一个很大的声音吵醒。

examples.english: Helen opened the door. ‘Dave? What's wrong? It's the middle of the night!’
examples.chinese: 海伦打开门。“戴夫？怎么啦？这是半夜呢！”

examples.english: They kept us awake with their late-night parties.
examples.chinese: 他们的深夜聚会吵得我们没法睡。

examples.english: late-night television
examples.chinese: 午夜的电视节目

examples.english: They stopped off for a late-night drink.
examples.chinese: 他们半夜里中途停下来喝了一杯东西。

examples.english: The soldiers are supposed to polish their shoes last thing at night.
examples.chinese: 士兵们临睡前必须擦鞋。

examples.english: The club didn't close till the early hours.
examples.chinese: 这个俱乐部营业至凌晨才关门。

expressions.text: the early hours of the morning

examples.english: They reached San Francisco in the early hours of the morning.
examples.chinese: 他们凌晨抵达圣弗朗西斯科。

examples.english: She and her friends used to stay out till all hours, going from club to club.
examples.chinese: 以前她和她的那些朋友深更半夜都还在外面，一家接着一家俱乐部地玩。

examples.english: Better not wake her - she was up till all hours last night, working.
examples.chinese: 最好不要叫醒她—她昨晚工作到很晚。

centers.english: happening or arriving at the arranged time
centers.chinese: 在安排好的时间发生或到达

examples.english: The trains don't always arrive on time.
examples.chinese: 火车并不总是准时到达。

examples.english: The company will lose money if the work isn't completed on time.
examples.chinese: 如果这项工作没有按时完成，公司就要赔钱。

examples.english: Did Philip pay up on time?
examples.chinese: 菲利普按时还钱了吗?

examples.english: I hate not being on time for class.
examples.chinese: 我讨厌上课迟到。

examples.english: Gary turned up right on time, holding a big bouquet of flowers.
examples.chinese: 加里捧着一大束鲜花，一分不差地准时到达。

examples.english: Ah, Mrs Shields, you're right on time!
examples.chinese: 啊，希尔德夫人，你来得正好准时！

examples.english: The baby arrived on the 16th -- bang on time!
examples.chinese: 婴儿在16日出生—非常准时！

examples.english: He looked at his watch. He was dead on time.
examples.chinese: 他看了看表。他是十分准时的。

examples.english: Linda always pays her rent promptly on the 1st of the month.
examples.chinese: 琳达总是在每个月的1号准时交房租。

examples.english: Loretta arrived punctually at her office the next day at ten o'clock.
examples.chinese: 第二天10点钟洛蕾塔准时回到办公室。

examples.english: Jim told one of his terrible jokes and everyone laughed on cue.
examples.chinese: 吉姆说了一个很蹩脚的笑话，在适当的时候大家都笑了。

examples.english: ‘Ashley should be here soon’, said Jo, and as if on cue, there was a knock at the door.
examples.chinese: “阿什利很快就到。”乔说。恰好在这时候，有人像得了信号一样敲门了。

examples.english: We were looking out over the sea when, right on cue, the dolphins appeared.
examples.chinese: 我们放眼向大海望去，就在这个时候海豚出现了。

expressions.text: at 6.30/ten o'clock/ seven etc on the dot

examples.english: He gets annoyed if his lunch isn't ready at one o'clock on the dot.
examples.chinese: 如果午饭没有在一点钟准时做好，他就会生气。

examples.english: I expect you to arrive at 7:30 on the dot.
examples.chinese: 我希望你在7点半准时到达。

centers.english: someone who is always on time
centers.chinese: 某人总是准时到达或做事情

examples.english: Dinner is served at seven: please try to be punctual.
examples.chinese: 7点用晚餐，请尽量准时。

examples.english: Our clients are usually punctual -- you would be too if you were paying $10 a minute.
examples.chinese: 我们的顾客一般都很准时—如果要你每分钟付十美元，你也会准时的。

examples.english: Punctuality is not one of my strong points, I must admit.
examples.chinese: 守时不是我的优点，这一点我必须承认。

examples.english: Cadets are taught discipline, neatness and punctuality.
examples.chinese: 军校学员要学习守纪、整洁和守时。

centers.english: when something happens before it is too late

examples.english: David said he'd take me to the concert, if he's home in time.
examples.chinese: 戴维说如果他能及时赶回家，就带我去听音乐会。

examples.english: If you don't leave enough space between your car and the car in front, you may not be able to stop in time.
examples.chinese: 如果你的车没有跟前面的车保持足够的距离，就有可能无法及时刹车。

examples.english: Don't worry, I'll be back in time to cook dinner.
examples.chinese: 别急，我来得及赶回来做饭的。

examples.english: She's hoping to be out of hospital in time to celebrate her birthday at home.
examples.chinese: 她希望能及时出院回家过生日。

examples.english: Do you think you'll be fit in time for Saturday's race?
examples.chinese: 你觉得你能及时恢复健康参加星期六的比赛吗？

examples.english: She put her foot on the brakes just in time.
examples.chinese: 她的脚刚刚来得及踩在刹车上。

expressions.text: just in time to do something

examples.english: He got to the airport just in time to catch the flight to Madrid.
examples.chinese: 他正好及时赶到机场搭乘飞往马德里的航班。

examples.english: Come in. You're just in time for a cup of coffee.
examples.chinese: 进来吧，刚好来喝杯咖啡。

examples.english: We were only just in time. A few more minutes and the bank would have been closed.
examples.chinese: 我们来得正好，再过几分钟银行就关门了。

examples.english: Radio contact was established in the nick of time and we managed to transmit a message to the ship.
examples.chinese: 无线电联络在最后一刻接上了，我们设法向船上发送了一份电文。

expressions.text: just in the nick of time

examples.english: She escaped from her smoke-filled home just in the nick of time.
examples.chinese: 她正好在最后关头从浓烟弥漫的家中逃了出来。

examples.english: The ambulance finally arrived, not a moment too soon.
examples.chinese: 救护车终于来了，差点儿就来不及。

examples.english: An American businessman stepped in at the last minute to rescue the company.
examples.chinese: 一位美国商人在最后一刻介入，拯救了公司。

examples.english: Realizing its error at the last minute, the magazine just managed to correct the offending headline.
examples.chinese: 杂志社在最后一刻发现错误，及时更正了这个极具冒犯性的标题。

examples.english: War was averted at the eleventh hour when both sides agreed to talks.
examples.chinese: 双方在最后一刻同意和谈，避免了战争。

examples.english: Fernandez waits on Death Row, hoping for an eleventh-hour reprieve.
examples.chinese: 费尔南德斯在监狱的死囚区里等待着，希望在最后一刻获得缓刑。

examples.english: I managed to catch her just as she was leaving the office.
examples.chinese: 我终于在她正要离开办公室的时候追上了她。

examples.english: The letters were all addressed and stamped, and there was still plenty of time to catch the post.
examples.chinese: 这些信都已写好地址贴上邮票，现在还有足够的时间赶上邮局的收信时间。

expressions.text: catch the news/a TV programme etc

examples.english: She was rushing to catch her favorite show on TV.
examples.chinese: 她急匆匆地赶着去收看她最喜欢的电视节目。

examples.english: Kelly had 10 minutes to reach the studio -- even in normal traffic that was cutting it close.
examples.chinese: 凯利只有十分钟的时间赶去工作室—即使交通正常，时间也是很紧的。

examples.english: You're cutting it a bit fine aren't you? The show starts in 2 minutes.
examples.chinese: 你把时间抠得太紧了吧？演出两分钟后就要开始了。

examples.english: We cut it pretty close - we only had 30 minutes to get to the airport.
examples.chinese: 我们把时间抠得很紧，只有30分钟的时间赶去机场。

examples.english: You'd better get that letter back from her somehow, before it's too late.
examples.chinese: 你最好及早从她那里把信拿回来。

examples.english: We are urging the government to stop the bombing now, before it's too late.
examples.chinese: 我们在敦促政府现在就停止轰炸，以免为时太晚。

centers.english: to finish a piece of work within the time that is allowed for it
centers.chinese: 在期限内完成一项工作

examples.english: Journalists have to work very quickly in order to meet their deadlines.
examples.chinese: 记者必须手脚勤快才能如期完成任务。

examples.english: Without extra help, it's going to be very difficult to meet the Friday deadline.
examples.chinese: 如果不增加人手来帮忙，很难如期在星期五之前完成工作。

examples.english: The builders were lazy and failed to finish the boat on schedule.
examples.chinese: 造船工人很懒，未能按期把船造好。

examples.english: So far we are on schedule and the project should come to an end in two months, as planned.
examples.chinese: 到目前为止我们都是按照预定的时间工作，所以工程应该会如期于两个月后完成。

centers.english: the past

examples.english: My grandfather enjoys talking about the past.
examples.chinese: 我爷爷喜欢谈论过去。

examples.english: There were several horse-drawn carriages, as a nostalgic reminder of the past.
examples.chinese: 那里有几辆马车，让人回想过去，激起怀旧之情。

examples.english: I decided to ask Anna, as she had always been very helpful in the past.
examples.chinese: 我决定去问安娜，因为她以前一直很乐意帮忙。

examples.english: In the past, doctors seemed to have more time for their patients than they do today.
examples.chinese: 与现在相比，过去医生似乎有更多时间给病人诊治。

examples.english: The programme describes events which took place in the distant past, towards the end of the last ice-age.
examples.chinese: 这个节目描述了远古时代—上次冰河时期末期—发生的事情。

examples.english: It's hard to see events from the very recent past in their proper historical perspective.
examples.chinese: 刚过去的事情，很难以正确的历史观点评价。

examples.english: For many people, a relaxing weekend has become a thing of the past.
examples.chinese: 对于很多人来说，周末放松一下已成了往事。

examples.english: Our goal was to learn from our past mistakes and to use the lessons on this project.
examples.chinese: 我们的目的是吸取过去的教训，把这项工作做好。

examples.english: He's learned a lot from his past experience.
examples.chinese: 他从自己过去的经验中学到了许多。

examples.english: Judging by her past performance, I'd say Rowena will do very well.
examples.chinese: 从她过去的表现来看，我认为罗伊娜会做得很好。

examples.english: Groups have put a lot into past projects, and have always seen an excellent result.
examples.chinese: 各小组在过去的计划中投入了许多，一直有出色的成果。

examples.english: The past few months have been very difficult for Mary.
examples.chinese: 对于玛丽来说，过去几个月过得不容易。

examples.english: For the past two weeks, I've been doing my boss's job while she's away on business.
examples.chinese: 前两周，老板出差，我一直在帮她做事。

examples.english: the enormous changes of the past 30 years
examples.chinese: 过去三十年天翻地覆的变化

centers.english: all the things that have happened in the past
centers.chinese: 过去发生过的所有事情

examples.english: Greg didn't like to talk about his past,
examples.chinese: 格雷格不喜欢谈论自己的过去。

examples.english: The newspapers had been investigating the President's past, hoping to find some scandal.
examples.chinese: 报界在调查总统的过去，希望能找到一些丑闻。

examples.english: The elegant buildings on the sea front give us a glimpse of Brighton's more glorious past.
examples.chinese: 滨海区精美的建筑让我们看到了布赖顿辉煌的过去。

examples.english: India has been invaded several times in its history.
examples.chinese: 历史上印度曾几次遭到入侵。

examples.english: a book about the history of the United Nations
examples.chinese: 一本关于联合国历史的书

examples.english: As an employee, his record is outstanding.
examples.chinese: 作为一名员工，他有优秀的纪录。

examples.english: The US had serious concerns over the country's poor human rights record.
examples.chinese: 美国对于该国不良的人权纪录极其关注。

examples.english: The department has a long record of high achievement.
examples.chinese: 该部门长久以来一直成绩卓著。

examples.english: The industry's record on conservation is not very impressive.
examples.chinese: 这一工业领域在自然资源保护方面的历史并不很令人称道。

examples.english: HMA has a great track record of managing hospitals.
examples.chinese: 医务管理协会有出色的医院管理纪录。

centers.english: when something happened or was true in the past but not now
centers.chinese: 某事过去发生或是真实的，但现在却不同了

examples.english: ‘Do you smoke?’ ‘No, but I used to.’
examples.chinese: “你抽烟吗？”“不，但以前常抽。”

examples.english: We used to live in Glasgow when I was young.
examples.chinese: 我年轻的时候，我们住在格拉斯哥。

examples.english: Thirty years ago, there used to be a market in the town.
examples.chinese: 三十年前，镇上有个市场。

examples.english: It never used to rain as much as this.
examples.chinese: 从来没下过那么多雨。

examples.english: I was surprised to see her driving - she didn't use to.
examples.chinese: 看到她开车我很惊讶—她过去不开车的。

examples.english: He used not to be so critical of other people's behaviour.
examples.chinese: 他以前对别人的所作所为没这么挑剔。

examples.english: Apparently he once worked for the FBI.
examples.chinese: 据说他曾为联邦调查局工作。

examples.english: It is a big city now, but at one time the population was only 50,000.
examples.chinese: 现在这是个大城市了，但曾经它的人口只有五万。

examples.english: a sports car once owned by Paul McCartney
examples.chinese: 保罗·麦卡特尼曾经拥有的一辆跑车

examples.english: I was a student in the 1950s, and things were very different then.
examples.chinese: 20世纪50年代我还是个学生，当时情况可大不一样。

examples.english: At that time most married women stayed at home.
examples.chinese: 当时大部分已婚女性都待在家里。

examples.english: In the past, most children didn't go to school at all.
examples.chinese: 过去，小孩子大多根本不去学校。

examples.english: Women were not allowed to vote or own property in the past.
examples.chinese: 过去，女性不准投票或拥有财产。

expressions.text: in those days/in the old days

examples.english: My great grandfather earned £5 a week, which was a lot of money in those days.
examples.chinese: 我的曾祖父当年一周挣五英镑，这在当时是很大一笔钱。

examples.english: In the old days there was no bridge over the river, and we crossed it by boat.
examples.chinese: 当年这条河上没有桥，我们坐船过河。

examples.english: In the good old days people showed more respect to the older generation.
examples.chinese: 在过去的好日子里，人们对长辈很尊敬。

examples.english: The children all wanted to know what life was like in the olden days.
examples.chinese: 孩子们都想知道从前的生活是怎样的。

examples.english: The local school was formerly a hospital.
examples.chinese: 那所地方学校过去是家医院。

examples.english: Peru was formerly ruled by the Spanish.
examples.chinese: 秘鲁过去受西班牙人统治。

centers.english: to try to do things as they were done in the past

examples.english: I wish I could go back to my school days.
examples.chinese: 我希望能回到过去的学生时代。

examples.english: Wouldn't it be nice if we could go back to the days when life was slower than it is today.
examples.chinese: 过去生活节奏比现在慢，要是能回到当时有多好。

examples.english: It's no use having regrets. You can't go back!
examples.chinese: 后悔没有用。你无法回到过去！

examples.english: If I could turn the clock back, I don't think I'd study law again.
examples.chinese: 要是我能让时光倒转，我想我不会去学法律。

examples.english: It would be nice to put the clock back to the years when Mum and Dad were still alive.
examples.chinese: 要是时光倒转，爸爸、妈妈都在世多好。

examples.english: It's no good living in the past. You have to get on with your life.
examples.chinese: 沉浸在过去没有好处。你得继续生活下去。

examples.english: As people get older, they often tend to live in the past.
examples.chinese: 随着年纪渐长，人们往往会沉浸在过去里。

centers.english: on one occasion in the past

examples.english: She once called me a liar - I've never forgiven her.
examples.chinese: 有一次，她叫我骗子—我始终不曾原谅她。

examples.english: Once, when I was a little boy, I found a gold watch on the beach.
examples.chinese: 从前，我还是个小男孩的时候，在海滩上捡到一只金表。

examples.english: One time we went out fishing on the lake at night.
examples.chinese: 我们有一次晚上去湖边垂钓。

examples.english: Aileen came round to tea one time, and we did our homework together.
examples.chinese: 艾琳有次来喝茶，我们便一起做家庭作业。

examples.english: Then, one day he went away and never came back.
examples.chinese: 然后，有一天他离开后再也没回来。！

examples.english: I was having my breakfast one morning when the telephone rang.
examples.chinese: 一天早上我正在吃早餐，电话铃响了。

examples.english: One day, when we had nothing else to do, we went for a swim in the river.
examples.chinese: 一天，我们无所事事，便去河里游泳。

examples.english: He drinks far too much. On one occasion I saw him drink a whole bottle of vodka.
examples.chinese: 他酒喝得太多了，有次我看到他喝了整整一瓶伏特加。

examples.english: On one occasion I made the mistake of arriving at work late and my boss has never let me forget it.
examples.chinese: 有一次我错在上班迟到，老板让我永远也忘不了这件事。

examples.english: It was a terrible winter. At one stage, we had to dig our way out of the house.
examples.chinese: 那年冬天真可怕，我们一度得自己在门前挖出一条道。

examples.english: At one stage during the competition, it looked as though our team might win.
examples.chinese: 比赛时，我们队一度看上去会赢。

examples.english: I went on a diet and at one stage I weighed only 71 kg.
examples.chinese: 我节食减肥，体重一度只有71公斤。

examples.english: At one point in the interview Gorbachev admitted he had made serious mistakes.
examples.chinese: 采访时，戈尔巴乔夫一度承认自己犯了大错。

examples.english: ‘You play the piano very well,’ I remember Mrs Saito remarking at one point.
examples.chinese: 我记得斋藤夫人有次说过：“你钢琴弹得很好。”

centers.english: the time after now

examples.english: Ellen's finishing college soon but she doesn't really have any plans for the future.
examples.chinese: 埃伦马上要大学毕业了，但她对未来没有任何计划。

examples.english: As for the future, Tucker said she intends to take a well-deserved break before deciding what to do next.
examples.chinese: 至于未来，塔克说她该好好休息了，打算先休息一段时间然后再决定接下来做什么。

examples.english: The car of the future may run on solar-powered batteries.
examples.chinese: 未来的汽车有可能靠太阳能电池来驱动。

examples.english: We agreed to consider the matter again at a future date.
examples.chinese: 我们同意将来某个时候再来考虑此事。

examples.english: David had his breakfast and thought about the day ahead.
examples.chinese: 戴维吃了早餐，思考这一天将要面临的事。

examples.english: Unemployment in the region is expected to grow in the months ahead.
examples.chinese: 这一地区的失业率估计在以后几个月将会增加。

examples.english: The government faces some difficult decisions in the months which lie ahead.
examples.chinese: 政府在未来的几个月内要面临一些艰难的抉择。

examples.english: I know there are some big problems ahead of us, but I'm sure we can overcome them.
examples.chinese: 我知道前头有很大的困难，可我确信我们能克服它。

examples.english: In years to come, people will look back on the 20th century as a turning point in history.
examples.chinese: 将来人们回顾今日，会觉得20世纪是历史的一个转折点。

examples.english: Nuclear power stations will still be needed for a long time to come.
examples.chinese: 在未来很长一段时间内，人们仍将需要核电站。

examples.english: The best is still to come -- there's chocolate ice cream for dessert.
examples.chinese: 最好的还在后头呢—甜食是巧克力冰淇淋。

examples.english: The worst of the storm was still to come.
examples.chinese: 这场暴风雨最猛烈的一阵还没来呢。

examples.english: From now on, I'm not letting anyone borrow my car.
examples.chinese: 从现在开始我不让任何人借我的汽车了。

examples.english: From now on, you kids will have to make your own lunch.
examples.chinese: 现在起你们这些孩子得自己做午餐了。

examples.english: From now on, homeowners will have to get a city permit if they want to build an addition onto their homes.
examples.chinese: 自即日起，房主如要扩建房屋，须得到市政府发出的许可证。

examples.english: In future, I expect you to be at work no later than 9.15.
examples.chinese: 今后我要求你上班不要晚于9点15分。

examples.english: In future, prisoners must serve at least half of their sentence before qualifying for any type of early release.
examples.chinese: 自现在起，囚犯必须至少服满其刑期的一半才有资格获得任何形式的提前释放。

examples.english: We don't know what will happen in the long term.
examples.chinese: 我们不知道今后长时期内将发生什么事。

examples.english: Aid to these countries is bound to run into billions of dollars in the long term.
examples.chinese: 就长期而言，对这些国家的援助肯定会高达几十亿美元。

examples.english: Analysts say the reports could have a major impact on the stock market in the short term.
examples.chinese: 分析师说这些报告可能在今后短期内对股票市场产生重大的影响。

examples.english: The country's oil and natural gas reserves are capable only of meeting short-term needs.
examples.chinese: 该国的石油和天然气储备仅够满足短期的需求。

centers.english: at some time in the future

examples.english: It's likely that global warming will become a major problem in the future.
examples.chinese: 全球气候变暖将来很可能会成为大问题。

examples.english: What do you think life in the future will be like?
examples.chinese: 你认为将来的生活会是怎样的？

examples.english: The new software will be available in the UK in the near future.
examples.chinese: 在不远的将来这种新软件就可在英国买到了。

examples.english: It is unlikely that the company will achieve a very high profit margin in the foreseeable future.
examples.chinese: 这家公司在可预见的将来不大可能赚得很高的利润率。

examples.english: Come over and see us some time.
examples.chinese: 以后什么时候过来看看我们。

examples.english: We should get together some time.
examples.chinese: 我们什么时候应该碰碰头。

expressions.text: some time next week/next year/in 2005 etc

examples.english: The project should be completed some time next year.
examples.chinese: 这个项目到明年的时候应该完工了。

examples.english: Perhaps one day we could all go to London together.
examples.chinese: 以后哪一天我们也许可以一起去伦敦。

examples.english: One day, I'd like to visit the Grand Canyon.
examples.chinese: 我想今后哪天去大峡谷游览。

examples.english: She always knew that some day he would leave her.
examples.chinese: 她始终明白有一天他会离她而去。

examples.english: One of these days you're going to be sorry.
examples.chinese: 总有一天你会后悔的。

examples.english: Richard's going to have a heart attack one of these days if he doesn't slow down.
examples.chinese: 理查德如不放慢速度，总有一天会心脏病发作的。

examples.english: The day will finally come when a woman or a black man is elected president of the United States.
examples.chinese: 终有一天哪位女性或黑人会当选为美国总统。

examples.english: Let's hope that the day will come when it's no longer necessary to have such a vast amount of money spent on the military.
examples.chinese: 我们期望终有一天不再需要把这么多的钱花在军费上。

centers.english: at a specific time in the future

expressions.text: an hour/10 years/2 weeks etc from now

examples.english: The package should arrive a few days from now.
examples.chinese: 包裹自此刻算起应该于几天后到达。

examples.english: There may be no rainforest left 30 years from now.
examples.chinese: 从现在起算30年后可能就不再有热带雨林了。

examples.english: A couple of months from now, you'll probably have forgotten all about him.
examples.chinese: 几个月后你可能就把他彻底忘记了。

examples.english: I should be finished work by noon. Would you like to get together then?
examples.chinese: 到中午我应该把工作做完了。到时候你愿意聚一聚吗?

examples.english: School starts in September, and until then I'll be staying with friends.
examples.chinese: 9月份开学，这之前我住在朋友们家里。

examples.english: They're sending the results next week, so I won't know anything until then.
examples.chinese: 他们下周把结果送来，所以这以前我什么都不会知道。

examples.english: Tell him he has two weeks to finish the job. If he's not finished by then, he's fired.
examples.chinese: 告诉他给他两周时间完成工作，如果到时不能完成，他就会被解

examples.english: The next general elections are still two years away.
examples.chinese: 距离下一次大选还有两年时间。

examples.english: Mary was desperately looking forward to her retirement, which was less than a year off.
examples.chinese: 玛丽急切地等着退休，还有一年不到的时间。

examples.english: The wedding was more than a year away but she had already bought a dress for it.
examples.chinese: 距婚礼还有一年多时间，可她已经买好了一套礼服。

examples.english: The exams are still a few weeks off -- you've got plenty of time to prepare for them.
examples.chinese: 离考试还有几个星期—你有足够的时间准备。

examples.english: Come Monday, we'll be in our new house.
examples.chinese: 到星期一，我们就在新房子里了。

examples.english: A mild winter is nice, but it means that come summer you're going to have a bug problem.
examples.chinese: 暖冬确实不错，但这也意味着到夏天你就会碰到臭虫的麻烦了。

centers.english: what will happen to someone or something in the future
centers.chinese: 某人或某物将来要发生的事

examples.english: I'm worried about my future.
examples.chinese: 我在为我的前途担心。

examples.english: I had a meeting with my boss to discuss my future.
examples.chinese: 我和老板见了次面讨论我的将来。

examples.english: You really should start thinking about your future. You're not a child anymore.
examples.chinese: 你真该考虑一下自己的将来了，你不再是个小孩啦。

examples.english: The memo refers to a meeting in Los Angeles, where the future of the network was discussed.
examples.chinese: 这份备忘录提及在洛杉矶的一次会议，会上讨论了网络的未来。

examples.english: Congress will meet to discuss the fate of the US nuclear defense shield.
examples.chinese: 国会将开会讨论美国核防卫盾计划的前途。

examples.english: The fate of the prisoners will be decided by a panel of three judges.
examples.chinese: 囚犯的命运将由三名法官组成的审判小组来决定。

examples.english: He urged a nationwide referendum to decide the fate of the country.
examples.chinese: 他竭力主张通过全民公决来决定国家的命运。

examples.english: His fate was sealed when The New York Times learned of the situation and began preparing an article about it.
examples.chinese: 当《纽约时报》了解了情况并且开始对此事组织文章时，他的命运就被决定了。

examples.english: This afternoon's debate is likely to seal the fate of the imprisoned aid workers.
examples.chinese: 今天下午的辩论很可能将决定被囚禁的援助人员的命运。

examples.english: The government wants to give people more control over their own destinies.
examples.chinese: 政府想给人民更多的权力来控制自己的命运。

expressions.text: be somebody's destiny to do something

examples.english: Susan wondered whether it was her destiny to marry Jorge and live in Mexico.
examples.chinese: 苏珊不知道是否命中注定该嫁给约格，并到墨西哥生活。

examples.english: The economic outlook is better than it has been for several years.
examples.chinese: 经济前景比过去几年好。

examples.english: Company officials insist the long-range outlook for share holders will be brighter.
examples.chinese: 公司高层坚称股东的远期前景将更为乐观。

examples.english: With drought conditions continuing, the outlook for farmers is not very good.
examples.chinese: 干旱情况在继续，农民的前景不乐观。

examples.english: I hope I never have to have a brain operation - it must be an appalling prospect.
examples.chinese: 我希望自己不必做脑部手术，这种事想起来太可怕了。

examples.english: The prospect of putting weapons in space is frightening to many people.
examples.chinese: 把武器放入太空的可能性对许多人来讲都是可怕的。

examples.english: I had read a great deal about Professor Chomsky and I felt very excited at the prospect of meeting him.
examples.chinese: 我看过关于乔姆斯基教授的很多著作，想到将要见到他我非常激动。

examples.english: We are facing the prospect of a very hard winter.
examples.chinese: 我们将遇到一个严寒的冬季。

examples.english: Prospects for a peace settlement in the region are not very hopeful at the moment.
examples.chinese: 目前在该地区达成和平协议的希望不是很大。

centers.english: likely to happen in the future

examples.english: The prospect of real democracy is on the horizon for this Latin American country of 57 million.
examples.chinese: 对这个5,700万人口的拉丁美洲国家而言，真正民主的前景已见曙光。

examples.english: After two weeks of talks a solution to the dispute is finally on the horizon.
examples.chinese: 经过两个星期的谈判，争议终于可望解决了。

examples.english: There was a surprise in store for Paul when he got to his office.
examples.chinese: 保罗回到办公室时，有一件意想不到的事等着他。

examples.english: Russell said expulsion may be in store for some of the students involved in the fighting that broke out Friday.
examples.chinese: 拉塞尔说参与星期五发生的打架的一些学生可能会遭到开除。

expressions.text: what fate/the future holds in store (for somebody)

examples.english: When she first arrived in the US she was afraid of what the future might hold in store for her here.
examples.chinese: 她刚到美国时担心在这里等待着自己的将是什么样的命运。

examples.english: None of us know what the future has in store.
examples.chinese: 我们都不清楚等待我们的是什么样的命运。

centers.english: likely to be or do something in the future
centers.chinese: 将来可能成为某物或做某事

examples.english: He's an extremely talented football player -- he could well be a future captain of England.
examples.chinese: 他是个极有天赋的足球运动员，很可能成为未来的英格兰队队长。

examples.english: It was then that Milstead took the first steps toward a future career in law enforcement.
examples.chinese: 米尔斯特德就是从那时起跨出了将来以执法为职业的第一步。

examples.english: Before the scandal erupted, Grieg was talked about as a future presidential candidate.
examples.chinese: 丑闻发生之前，有言论认为葛理格是未来的总统候选人。

examples.english: Police believe they may have found a potential witness.
examples.chinese: 警方认为他们也许已经找到有可能作证的人了。

examples.english: It's wrong to regard all soccer fans as potential troublemakers -- it's only a small minority who are responsible for the violence.
examples.chinese: 认为所有足球迷都可能会惹是生非是不对的—暴力生事的只是一小部分人。

examples.english: By denying these people a decent education, you're losing out on potential captains of industry and political leaders.
examples.chinese: 不让这些人接受良好的教育，就可能失去了未来的工业和政治领袖。

examples.english: My mother keeps introducing me to men she considers to be prospective husbands.
examples.chinese: 母亲不停地给我作媒，把她认为合适的对象介绍给我。

examples.english: Texaco has introduced a compulsory HIV testing program for all prospective employees.
examples.chinese: 德士古公司引进了一个为所有潜在的雇员进行艾滋病病毒测试的强制方案。

examples.english: When I first saw her play tennis I knew that she was a future Wimbledon champion in the making.
examples.chinese: 我第一次看她打网球就知道她是一位未来的温布尔登冠军。

examples.english: She's a very talented musician, and we think she has a great future.
examples.chinese: 她是个很有才华的音乐家，我们认为她前程似锦。

examples.english: He's obviously got a bright future in this organization.
examples.chinese: 显然，他在这个组织里前程光明。

centers.english: when you ask what time it is

expressions.text: ask (somebody) the time/ask (somebody) what time it is

examples.english: She was walking home near Colbayns School when a man approached her and asked her the time.
examples.chinese: 她正在步行回家走到科尔贝因斯学校附近时，一名男子上前问她几点了。

examples.english: She was distracted for a moment by someone asking the time.
examples.chinese: 有人问时间使她分心了一下。

examples.english: Go and ask Dad what time it is.
examples.chinese: 去问爸爸几点了。

examples.english: If you've got a watch, why are you asking what time it is?
examples.chinese: 若你自己有手表还问时间干什么？

expressions.text: what time is it?/ what's the time?

examples.english: ‘What time is it?’ ‘Just after four o'clock.’
examples.chinese: “现在几点？”“刚过4点。”

examples.english: What's the time? Is it after 10?
examples.chinese: 现在几点？过10点了吗？

expressions.text: have you got the time? /do you have the time

examples.english: Sorry to trouble you, but do you have the time?
examples.chinese: 对不起打扰一下，请问你知道几点了吗？

examples.english: Does anyone have the right time here?
examples.chinese: 这里谁知道准确时间？

examples.english: Excuse me! Have you got the time on you please?
examples.chinese: 很抱歉！请问几点了？

expressions.text: what time do you make it? /what time do you have

examples.english: What time do you make it, Emma? My watch has stopped.
examples.chinese: 埃玛，你的表几点了？我的表停了。

examples.english: What time do you have, Dave? I don't want to miss my plane.
examples.chinese: 戴夫，你的手表几点了？我不想误了飞机。

centers.english: ways of saying what time it is

examples.english: It's 5 o'clock.
examples.chinese: 现在5点钟。

examples.english: It's exactly 10 o'clock.
examples.chinese: 现在正好10点钟。

examples.english: It's just before 6.
examples.chinese: 现在6点不到。

examples.english: It's just after 10 o'clock.
examples.chinese: 现在刚过10点。

examples.english: It's just gone midnight. just after
examples.chinese: 时间刚过子夜。

examples.english: It's ten to six.
examples.chinese: 现在是差10分到6点。

examples.english: It doesn't get dark until about twenty to ten.
examples.chinese: 要到大约9点40分天才会黑。

examples.english: It's a quarter of eleven.
examples.chinese: 现在是差一刻11点。

examples.english: Joe, by the ten of eight you're going upstairs and that's only about a half hour from now.
examples.chinese: 乔，到7点50分你要上楼去了，从现在算起只有半小时左右。

examples.english: It's quarter past four.
examples.chinese: 时间是4点一刻。

examples.english: It's ten after five.
examples.chinese: 现在是5点10分。

examples.english: It's quarter after eight, and Laurie's showing up at nine.
examples.chinese: 现在是8点一刻，劳里要9点到。

examples.english: It's half past two.
examples.chinese: 现在两点半。

examples.english: It's getting on for five o'clock.
examples.chinese: 现在差不多5点钟了。

examples.english: I should think it's getting on for ten by now.
examples.chinese: 我想现在应该差不多10点钟了。

examples.english: ‘What time is it?’ ‘Bang on midnight.’
examples.chinese: “现在什么时候？”“正好是午夜。”

examples.english: I make it dead on half past by my watch.
examples.chinese: 我的表是半点钟整。

examples.english: We finished bang on eight, and we were back home by nine.
examples.chinese: 我们8点整结束，9点回到家。

centers.english: a time when something happens

examples.english: Do you remember that time Tim got really drunk at Sarah's party?
examples.chinese: 你还记得那次蒂姆在萨拉的聚会上烂醉如泥的事吗？

examples.english: Play it really loud this time.
examples.chinese: 这次要奏得非常响。

examples.english: The last time we ate meat was at Thanksgiving.
examples.chinese: 我们最近一次吃肉是在感恩节的时候。

examples.english: The only time I've seen him with a girl was that party at Mike's place.
examples.chinese: 我唯一一次看到过他和女孩在一起，是在迈克家的聚会上。

examples.english: Give us a call next time you're in town.
examples.chinese: 下次到城里来时给我们打个电话。

examples.english: That was around the same time that I met Linda.
examples.chinese: 那差不多就是我遇到琳达的同一时间。

examples.english: Is this the first time you've played pool?
examples.chinese: 你是第一次玩台球吗？

examples.english: Sandra, that's the third time I've asked you to keep quiet.
examples.chinese: 桑德拉，这已经是我第三次叫你保持安静了。

examples.english: Alex won the 100 metres for the fifth time in a row he won five times, and no one else won the race in between.
examples.chinese: 亚历克斯连续五次在100米比赛中获胜。

examples.english: This is my favourite film - I've seen it five times.
examples.chinese: 这部电影我非常喜欢，我已经看过五遍了。

examples.english: It's silly -- I've met him several times, but I can never remember his name.
examples.chinese: 我真傻。我见过他好几次了，但就是记不住他的名字。

examples.english: She's been to Greece a number of times.
examples.chinese: 她去过希腊好几次了。

examples.english: I've heard Jessie play a number of times, and I think he's great.
examples.chinese: 杰西的演奏我听过几次，我觉得他很出色。

examples.english: Every time I met her, she asked me about the children.
examples.chinese: 我每次见到她，她都会向我打听孩子们的情况。

examples.english: Do you remember the time when Dad lost the car keys?
examples.chinese: 你还记得那次爸爸丢了车钥匙的事吗？

examples.english: The witness said that on both occasions he noticed Davis because of his heavily tattooed arms.
examples.chinese: 证人说他两次都注意到了戴维斯，因为他手臂上刺有很多文身。

examples.english: On one occasion, Anna fainted while out shopping with friends.
examples.chinese: 有一次安娜和朋友出去购物时晕倒了。

examples.english: She had met Zahid on a previous occasion.
examples.chinese: 她上次遇到了扎希德。

examples.english: I've suggested that she should move on numerous occasions, but she never takes any notice.
examples.chinese: 我曾无数次提出她应该搬家，可是她从来不肯听。

examples.english: I remember Michael sleeping in your room on several occasions and mom not knowing about it.
examples.chinese: 我记得迈克尔好几次在你房间里睡，妈妈却不知道这件事。

examples.english: The play went well, apart from one embarrassing moment when I dropped a cup.
examples.chinese: 这部戏演得很顺利，除了有一刻发生了尴尬的情况—我把杯子掉了。

examples.english: At several points during the meeting, Adler threatened to walk out.
examples.chinese: 会上阿德勒好几次威胁说要离开会场。

examples.english: My most special moment with dad was when I was announced as the winner of Junior Beauty Contest.
examples.chinese: 我和爸爸在一起最难忘的一刻，是当我被宣布为青少年选美冠军的时候。

examples.english: At that precise moment in time, Binh walked in.
examples.chinese: 恰好就在那个时候，宾走了进来。

centers.english: what hour, day etc something happens
centers.chinese: 某事发生的时刻、日子等

examples.english: Could I have the times of the trains to Birmingham please?
examples.chinese: 请告诉我去伯明翰各班列车的时间好吗？

examples.english: This leaflet lists the dates and times of all the concerts.
examples.chinese: 这张传单上列出了各场音乐会的演出日期和时间。

examples.english: The police are still trying to establish the exact time of her death.
examples.chinese: 警方仍在设法确定她死亡的确切时间。

examples.english: What time did you see the man leave the bus station?
examples.chinese: 你是什么时候看到那个人离开公共汽车站的?

examples.english: What time do you usually start in the mornings?
examples.chinese: 你通常上午什么时候开始?

examples.english: What time is the news on?
examples.chinese: 什么时候播出新闻？

examples.english: The departure times are posted on our website.
examples.chinese: 开车时间已经张贴在我们的网站上。

examples.english: The plane's estimated arrival time is 19:45.
examples.chinese: 这班飞机的预定抵达时间是19:45。

examples.english: We went into a cafe and sat there until closing time.
examples.chinese: 我们走进一家咖啡馆，在那里一直坐到关门。

examples.english: I've got to get this to the video store by closing time.
examples.chinese: 录像店关门前我得把这个送到店里。

examples.english: Check with the museum for opening times at www.musart.co.
examples.chinese: 点击www.musart.co 查询这家博物馆的开放时间。

examples.english: Robbie! It's suppertime!
examples.chinese: 罗比，晚饭时间到了！

examples.english: The winds are pretty strong at this time of year.
examples.chinese: 一年中的这个时候风挺大的。

examples.english: There won't be much traffic on the roads at this time of night.
examples.chinese: 晚上这个时候路上不会有多少车辆。

examples.english: Well, most people had gone to bed by that time of night.
examples.chinese: 嗯，大多数人在晚上的这个时候已经上床睡觉了。

examples.english: She apologized for being late, but by that time I was really annoyed with her.
examples.chinese: 她为迟到表示抱歉，可那时候我对她已经很生气了。

examples.english: Do you know the date when the house was built?
examples.chinese: 你知不知道这幢房子的建造日期?

examples.english: We still haven't received notification of the exam date.
examples.chinese: 我们还没有接到考试日期的通知。

examples.english: Give me the dates of the American War of Independence.
examples.chinese: 告诉我美国独立战争的日期。

examples.english: June 9th is the date of the European elections.
examples.chinese: 6月9日是欧洲大选的日子。

examples.english: We need to arrange a date for the next meeting.
examples.chinese: 我们要为下一次会议安排日期。

examples.english: A date for his release has not yet been agreed.
examples.chinese: 他的释放日期还没有定案。

examples.english: Have they set a date for the wedding yet?
examples.chinese: 他们婚礼的日子定下来了吗？

examples.english: It helps if you provide your birth date and Social Security number.
examples.chinese: 如果你能够提供你的出生日期和社会保障号码会有帮助的。

examples.english: Could I have your name and your date of birth please?
examples.chinese: 请告诉我你的姓名和出生日期好吗?

examples.english: I later received confirmation of my new job in a letter indicating the start date.
examples.chinese: 后来我收到一封我新工作的确认信，信中写明了我开始上班的日期。

examples.english: The closing date for entries is 3 March 2001.
examples.chinese: 参赛的截止日期为2001年3月3日。

examples.english: Key in your credit card details, including the expiration date of the card.
examples.chinese: 键入你信用卡的详细资料，包括有效期限。

examples.english: Are you sure these yoghurts are ok? Have you checked the expiry date?
examples.chinese: 你肯定这些酸奶没问题吗？有没有查看过保质期？

examples.english: ‘Snow White’ had a December release date to capture the Christmas market.
examples.chinese: 《白雪公主》一片的上映日期选在12月份以抢占圣诞节市场。

examples.english: I'd like to return something to your store - what are your hours?
examples.chinese: 我到你店里来退些东西，你们的营业时间是几点?

examples.english: Our telephone hotline is open during regular business hours.
examples.chinese: 我们的热线电话在正常的办公时间内为大家服务。

examples.english: Visiting hours are from 2 to 5 every day.
examples.chinese: 探访病人的时间是每天下午2点到5点。

examples.english: After hours callers can leave a voicemail message.
examples.chinese: 办公时间之后来电者可以留下语音信息。

examples.english: What was Tom doing in the office out of hours?
examples.chinese: 汤姆下班后在办公室里干什么？

examples.english: Sir, I'm sorry to bother you at this hour.
examples.chinese: 先生，我很抱歉在这个时候打扰您。

examples.english: We had to get up at some ungodly hour to catch our train.
examples.chinese: 我们得一大早就起来去赶火车。

examples.english: There's something happening on our street at all hours of the day and night.
examples.chinese: 我们街上任何时候都有事情发生。

examples.english: I hate telemarketers who call during the dinner hour.
examples.chinese: 我很讨厌电话推销员在晚饭时打电话来。

examples.english: The voter survey is crucial to the timing of the election.
examples.chinese: 进行选民民意调查对大选的时间安排是很重要的。

examples.english: He starts work at 10, and finishes at 6:30.
examples.chinese: 他10点开始工作，6点半下班。

examples.english: Would you like to go to the sandwich bar at lunchtime?
examples.chinese: 午饭时你想去那家三明治小吃店吗？

examples.english: I have a hospital appointment at 9.00 am.
examples.chinese: 我预约上午9点看医生。

examples.english: We get a week's holiday at Easter.
examples.chinese: 我们在复活节有一周假期。

examples.english: What are you doing at Christmas?
examples.chinese: 你圣诞节打算干什么?

examples.english: Frank joined the navy at the beginning of the war.
examples.chinese: 弗兰克在战争开始时参加了海军。

examples.english: We get paid at the end of the week.
examples.chinese: 我们在一周的最后一天发工资。

examples.english: The students all do a short test at the start of term.
examples.chinese: 学期开始时所有学生都要参加一个小测验。

examples.english: The team holds a meeting on the first Monday of every month.
examples.chinese: 每个月的第一个星期一小组都要开会。

examples.english: I tried to catch him on the last day of term, but he'd already left.
examples.chinese: 学期的最后一天我尝试抓住他谈谈，可是他已经走了。

examples.english: We're going out for dinner on Friday.
examples.chinese: 我们星期五会出去吃晚饭。

examples.english: Are you doing anything special on Saturday night?
examples.chinese: 星期六晚上你有什么特别安排吗？

examples.english: She was born on May 12, 1913.
examples.chinese: 她出生于1913年5月12日。

examples.english: The course starts on 14 October.
examples.chinese: 这门课程于10月14日开始。

expressions.text: on my birthday/their wedding day/Valentine's day etc

examples.english: Did you call dad on Father's Day?
examples.chinese: 父亲节那天你给爸爸打电话了吗?

examples.english: Aren't you coming here on Christmas Day?
examples.chinese: 圣诞节你不来了吗?

expressions.text: on Thursdays/Fridays etc/ on a Thursday/Friday etc

examples.english: Her husband takes her shopping on a Saturday to Asda.
examples.chinese: 她丈夫每周六带她去阿斯达超级市场购物。

examples.english: We always go to the pub on Fridays.
examples.chinese: 星期五我们总是去小酒馆。

examples.english: I'm usually too tired to cook a meal in the evening.
examples.chinese: 到了晚上我常常是累得做一顿晚饭的力气都没有了。

examples.english: We didn't get to bed until 3 o'clock in the morning.
examples.chinese: 我们直到凌晨3点才上床睡觉。

examples.english: I want to be ready to leave first thing in the morning.
examples.chinese: 我要准备好明天一大早就离开。

examples.english: In 2004, the Olympic Games will be held in Athens.
examples.chinese: 2008年，奥运会将在北京举行。

examples.english: He did a lot of abstract art in the sixties, but he's moved on since then.
examples.chinese: 60年代他画了许多抽象画，但后来他改变了画风。

examples.english: I came to England in the summer of 1995.
examples.chinese: 1995年的夏天我来到英格兰。

examples.english: The series returns in the autumn.
examples.chinese: 这套系列片将于秋季继续播映。

examples.english: ‘How old is Philip now?’ ‘He's four in December’.
examples.chinese: “菲利普现在几岁了？”“到12月份他就4岁了。”

examples.english: Michael left the office 20 minutes ago.
examples.chinese: 迈克尔20分钟前离开了办公室。

examples.english: ‘When did you hurt your back?’ ‘About a fortnight ago.’
examples.chinese: “你什么时候伤了背的？”“大约两周前。”

examples.english: My daughter was married just over a year ago.
examples.chinese: 我女儿一年多前刚结婚。

examples.english: I met your father once, a long time ago.
examples.chinese: 我很久以前见过你父亲一次。

expressions.text: a short time ago/a little while ago

examples.english: Did you see that program about genetics that was on a little while ago?
examples.chinese: 你看刚刚播出的那个有关遗传学的节目了吗？

examples.english: I had my keys a minute ago, and now I can't find them.
examples.chinese: 我的钥匙刚才还在，现在却找不到了。

examples.english: We went down to see a show in London not so long ago.
examples.chinese: 不久前我们到伦敦看演出去了。

examples.english: How long ago was that, Dad?
examples.chinese: 爸爸，那是多久以前发生的?

examples.english: How long ago did you buy the computer?
examples.chinese: 这台电脑你是多久以前买的？

examples.english: On the stroke of midnight, the British flag was lowered for the last time over Delhi.
examples.chinese: 午夜12点整，英国国旗最后一次在德里降下。

examples.english: The judge entered the courtroom at the stroke of nine.
examples.chinese: 9点整法官进入法庭。

centers.english: a list of times of trains, classes, or activities
centers.chinese: 火车、课堂或活动的时间表

examples.english: Teachers will be giving out copies of the new timetable in the first class today.
examples.chinese: 今天的第一节课上老师会分发新的课程表。

examples.english: Train services shown in this timetable are subject to alteration or cancellation at short notice.
examples.chinese: 这张时间表上的火车发车时间会临时变动或被取消。

examples.english: After I'd found my room, I sat down to look carefully at my schedule.
examples.chinese: 我找到自己的房间后，就坐下来仔细看我的时间表。

examples.english: The train schedules are all on the website now.
examples.chinese: 各火车时刻表现已上载至网站上。〔

examples.english: The events have been arranged to match TV schedules.
examples.chinese: 赛事的安排与电视时间表相配合。

examples.english: I'd like a schedule of flights from Boston to New York.
examples.chinese: 我要一张波士顿到纽约的航班时刻表。

examples.english: The President's schedule includes a two-day visit to St Petersburg.
examples.chinese: 总统的日程安排包括到圣彼得斯堡进行两天的访问。

examples.english: The flight was cancelled, and that really messed our schedule up.
examples.chinese: 航班被取消了，那样一来就把我们的日程安排全打乱了。

examples.english: Do you have a schedule for the tour?
examples.chinese: 你有这次旅行的日程安排吗?

examples.english: What's the schedule for today's meeting?
examples.chinese: 今天的会议是怎么安排的？

examples.english: The director was given a budget of $10 million and so far the film seems to be going according to schedule.
examples.chinese: 导演得到1,000万美元的预算；到目前为止影片似乎是按预定的进度在拍摄。

examples.english: I know, we're a week behind schedule already.
examples.chinese: 我知道我们已经比原定计划晚了一周。

examples.english: The building should be completed on schedule.
examples.chinese: 这幢建筑应该能按时建成。

examples.english: It's important that everyone on the project keeps to the schedule.
examples.chinese: 参与这项计划的每一个人都按照预定的进度工作，这是很重要的。

examples.english: Do you have a work schedule for this week, Doreen?
examples.chinese: 多琳，你有没有本周的工作进度表？

examples.english: Various minor ailments can interfere with your training schedule.
examples.chinese: 各种各样的小毛病会影响你的训练安排。

examples.english: She took time out of a busy schedule to talk to us.
examples.chinese: 她从繁忙的日程安排中抽出时间和我们谈话。

examples.english: With this new project in the offing, I'm going to be working to a very tight schedule.
examples.chinese: 随着这个新项目即将上马，我就要按非常紧迫的时间表工作了。

examples.english: Party leaders met to discuss a new constitution and an electoral timetable.
examples.chinese: 政党领袖聚在一起讨论新宪法及大选时间表。

examples.english: Their purpose would be to set a timetable for the conversion of British cars to low-octane fuel.
examples.chinese: 他们的目的是制定出一个时间表，把英国的汽车改成使用低辛烷值燃料的汽车。

examples.english: He gave no indication of a timetable for the approval of the changes.
examples.chinese: 他没有给出批准这些变革的时间表。

centers.english: to arrange a time for something to happen

examples.english: Monday's performance of St Matthew's Passion is scheduled to start at 7.30 pm.
examples.chinese: 星期一《马太受难曲》的演出安排在晚上7点半开始。

examples.english: If you schedule your practice routine to include one exercise a week, you should learn the musical scale pretty quickly.
examples.chinese: 如果你在日常练习中每周安排一次音阶练习，你很快就能学会音阶。

expressions.text: schedule something for tomorrow/next week/Dec 4 etc

examples.english: I've scheduled a meeting for tomorrow. I hope everyone can attend.
examples.chinese: 明天我安排了一次会议，希望每个人都能够出席。

examples.english: The first game is provisionally scheduled for January 26.
examples.chinese: 首场比赛暂定于1月26日举行。

examples.english: The meditation class will be timed so that it does not coincide with the noisier exercise classes.
examples.chinese: 会给冥想班安排一个合适的时间，避免与吵声较大的健身班碰在一起。

examples.english: The release of the document was shrewdly timed.
examples.chinese: 这份文件的公布很合时。

examples.english: Stephen timed his arrival for exactly six o'clock.
examples.chinese: 斯蒂芬定在6点整到达。

examples.english: The first track race is timed for 11.15.
examples.chinese: 第一项径赛安排在11点15分举行。

examples.english: Political commentators are pencilling in July 30th, August 6th or August 13th as possible election dates.
examples.chinese: 政治评论员暂时记下7月30日、8月6日或8月13日为可能的选举日。

examples.english: we'll pencil May 15 in as a reserve date.
examples.chinese: 我们暂定5月15日为备选的日子。

expressions.text: pencil something in for Dec 4/next week etc

examples.english: Greg's pencilled the sale in for December 15 .
examples.chinese: 格雷格把出售日期暂定于12月15日。

examples.english: The band are pencilled in for a show in the King's Hall on January 18.
examples.chinese: 该乐队暂定于1月18日在国王音乐厅演出。

centers.english: how long something continues

examples.english: How long have you been waiting?
examples.chinese: 你等了多久了？

examples.english: I don't know how long the repair will last, but it should get you home.
examples.chinese: 我不知道要修理多长时间，但它应该能让你开了回家。

examples.english: How long are you going to be in the bathroom?
examples.chinese: 你打算在浴室里待多长时间呢？

examples.english: How long have you two known each other?
examples.chinese: 你们两个认识多久了?

examples.english: So how long did you live on Long Island?
examples.chinese: 那么你在长岛住了多久？

expressions.text: for an hour/two days/a long time etc

examples.english: ‘How long did you live in Spain?’ ‘Oh, for about three years.’
examples.chinese: “你在西班牙住了多久？”“噢，大概有三年了。”

examples.english: We seem to have been waiting for ages.
examples.chinese: 我们好像已经等了很久了。

examples.english: We talked for a while.
examples.chinese: 我们谈了一会儿。

examples.english: Omar's been learning English for two years now.
examples.chinese: 奥马尔学英语已有两年了。

examples.english: I only worked there for three months.
examples.chinese: 我只在那里干了三个月。

examples.english: I've had this car since 1992.
examples.chinese: 从1992年起我就开这辆车了。

examples.english: I've been smoking since I was 14.
examples.chinese: 我14岁起就开始吸烟。

examples.english: Graham's become a lot more confident since he finished his training.
examples.chinese: 格雷厄姆自从完成培训后变得自信多了。

examples.english: I saw her this morning, but I haven't seen her since.
examples.chinese: 我今早见到她，但此后就没见过她了。

examples.english: Jack has had a fascination with cars ever since he was four.
examples.chinese: 杰克自四岁起就对汽车着迷。

examples.english: They bought the caravan last summer, and they've had trouble with it ever since.
examples.chinese: 去年夏天他们买了这辆房车，此后它就一直出毛病。

examples.english: David worked as a teacher until 1989.
examples.chinese: 戴维当教师一直干到1989年。

examples.english: I'll be at home until 5:30 if you want to phone me.
examples.chinese: 如果你要打电话给我，我5点半之前一直在家。

examples.english: She polished the car until it shone.
examples.chinese: 她把汽车擦得铮亮。

examples.english: I didn't learn to drive until I was 31.
examples.chinese: 我到31岁才学会开车。

examples.english: The library's only open till five on Saturdays.
examples.chinese: 逢星期六图书馆只开到5点钟。

examples.english: Just wait till I've finished my coffee.
examples.chinese: 等我喝完咖啡再说吧。

examples.english: I have a class Monday from five o'clock till eight o'clock at night.
examples.chinese: 星期一我有一节课，从5点一直上到晚上8点。

examples.english: I lived there from the age of 14 until I went to college.
examples.chinese: 我从14岁起一直住在那里，直至上大学。

examples.english: Max edited the paper from 1950 until he retired in 1989.
examples.chinese: 马克斯从1950年开始做这份报纸的编辑，直到1989年退休。

expressions.text: from May to September/from 9 am to 5 pm etc

examples.english: Eisenhower was President from 1952 to 1956.
examples.chinese: 艾森豪威尔于1952至1956年间任总统。

examples.english: I'm going to use the computer lab from eight to ten Friday morning.
examples.chinese: 星期五上午8点到10点我要用电脑实验室。

examples.english: My plan is to train seriously from January to July.
examples.chinese: 我的计划是从1月到7月认真训练。

expressions.text: May through September/Monday through Friday etc

examples.english: The store is open Monday through Saturday.
examples.chinese: 本商店从星期一至星期六营业。

examples.english: ‘When will you be away?’ ‘The 17th through the 19th.’
examples.chinese: “你什么时候不在？”“17号到19号。”

examples.english: Visit the exhibition of modern art, open every day, 9:30-6:00.
examples.chinese: 请参观现代艺术展览，每天9:30-6:00开放。

examples.english: A special fishing licence is required for the season (May-September).
examples.chinese: 这个季节〔5月到9月〕要申领特别钓鱼许可证。

centers.english: the period of time that something lasts or takes
centers.chinese: 某事持续或所需的时间

examples.english: The noise went on for a considerable length of time.
examples.chinese: 那噪音持续了一段相当长的时间。

examples.english: Make sure that the speakers only talk for a reasonable length of time, so that everyone gets a chance to take part.
examples.chinese: 每位演讲者的发言时间一定要适中；让每个人都有机会参与。

examples.english: Dress the wound quickly, to reduce the length of time it is exposed to infection.
examples.chinese: 赶快包扎伤口，以缩短其暴露于外以致受感染的时间。

expressions.text: the length of time it takes to do something

examples.english: Typically, the length of time it takes an adult to fall asleep is 10 to 15 minutes.
examples.chinese: 成年人入睡所需的时间通常为10到15分钟。

examples.english: Zoe's temper tantrums had increased both in volume and duration.
examples.chinese: 佐伊的脾气发作起来不仅程度更严重，而且时间也持续得更久了。

examples.english: After a long voyage of two years’ duration, he arrived in Canton in 1669.
examples.chinese: 经过两年的漫长航行，他于1669年抵达了广州。

examples.english: These workshops, usually of one or two days’ duration, bring teachers and industrial managers together.
examples.chinese: 这些通常为期一两天的讲习班让教师和企业经理聚首一堂。

examples.english: The doctor will ask you about the duration and frequency of your headaches.
examples.chinese: 医生会问你头痛的持续时间和发作次数。

examples.english: He refused to comment on his salary or the duration of his contract.
examples.chinese: 他拒绝透露自己的工资或者合同期限。

examples.english: It was decided that we would stay with my cousins for the duration of the war.
examples.chinese: 当时决定了战争期间我们就暂住在堂兄妹的家里。

examples.english: Compared to how long it took for the Universe to evolve, our human time scale is tiny.
examples.chinese: 与宇宙演化所需的时间相比较，我们人类的年代太微不足道了。

examples.english: Carbon dioxide is removed from the atmosphere by a number of processes that operate on different time scales.
examples.chinese: 二氧化碳经过一系列的过程从大气层中被除去，这些过程所需要的时间段各有不同。

examples.english: In today's computer industry, the whole time scale of new product development is far shorter than it was 10 years ago.
examples.chinese: 在当今的电脑工业中，新产品开发的整个时间段比十年前短得多了。

centers.english: a short time

examples.english: Can I show you something? It'll only take a minute.
examples.chinese: 我给你看样东西好吗？只需一分钟。

examples.english: Luke thought for a moment and then said: ‘Would you like to come too?’
examples.chinese: 卢克想了一想然后说：“你也愿意来吗？”

examples.english: Can you turn that off a minute for a minute ?
examples.chinese: 你能把它关掉一会儿吗？

examples.english: Yes, I'm coming in a moment.
examples.chinese: 好，我马上就来。

examples.english: Helen was here a minute ago. You've just missed her.
examples.chinese: 海伦刚才还在这里，你恰好和她错过了。

examples.english: If you'd been quiet for a minute, I'd explain what happened.
examples.chinese: 如果你能静一静，我就来解释一下发生了什么事。

examples.english: Just a second - I think it's on the desk upstairs.
examples.chinese: 等一下，我想它在楼上的书桌上。

examples.english: For a second there, I forgot what it was called.
examples.chinese: 在那里我有一会想不起它叫什么了。

examples.english: Hang on, I'll be with you in a sec.
examples.chinese: 等一下，我马上就和你一起去。

examples.english: ‘How long will it take?’ ‘Oh, not long - just a couple of hours.’
examples.chinese: “那要多长时间？”“噢，不用多久，就几个小时。”

examples.english: I saw her not long ago.
examples.chinese: 不久前我见过她。

examples.english: His book was published not long after he died.
examples.chinese: 他去世后不久，他的书就出版了。

examples.english: It wasn't long before Gemma lost all interest in the new puppy.
examples.chinese: 杰玛不久就对那只新来的小狗失去了兴趣。

examples.english: ‘When's the baby due?’ ‘Three weeks, so there's not long to go.’
examples.chinese: “宝宝什么时候出生？”“还有三个星期，所以没多久了。”

examples.english: I'm popping to the shop, I won't be long.
examples.chinese: 我去一下商店，马上就回来。

examples.english: Supper won't be long.
examples.chinese: 晚饭很快就好了。

examples.english: Wait a bit, I've nearly finished.
examples.chinese: 稍等一下，我差不多做完了。

examples.english: I sat down, and after a bit, the phone rang.
examples.chinese: 我坐了下来，过了一会电话铃响了。

examples.english: Do you mind looking after the kids for a bit while I go out?
examples.chinese: 我出去时你能照看一下孩子吗？

examples.english: Bob's only worked here for a short while, about six months I think.
examples.chinese: 鲍勃只在这里工作过很短的时间，我想大约六个月。

examples.english: It always takes a little while to get used to the climate.
examples.chinese: 适应这种气候总要一点点时间。

examples.english: He was on the telly a short while ago.
examples.chinese: 他刚才上了电视。

expressions.text: in/within a short space of time

examples.english: It's amazing how much you can learn in such a short space of time.
examples.chinese: 你在这么短的时间内能学会那么多东西，真了不起。

examples.english: In the brief space of time since the war ended, citizens have managed to rebuild over half the city.
examples.chinese: 自战争结束后短短的一段时间里，市民已经重建了多半个城市。

examples.english: She had gained an awful lot of journalistic experience within a short space of time.
examples.chinese: 她在很短的时间内就积累了相当丰富的新闻工作经验。

centers.english: a long time

examples.english: They've been married for 30 years - that's a long time.
examples.chinese: 他俩结婚已有30年，时间可不短了。

examples.english: It takes me a long time to really trust people.
examples.chinese: 我需要很长时间才能真正信任别人。

examples.english: The house has been empty for a long time.
examples.chinese: 这幢房子已经空了很长的一段时间。

examples.english: Have you been waiting here for a long time?
examples.chinese: 你在这儿等很久了吗？

examples.english: It's the worst cold I've had in a long time.
examples.chinese: 这是我这么久以来最严重的一次感冒。

examples.english: I haven't worn this dress in such a long time.
examples.chinese: 我很久没有穿这件衣服了。

examples.english: He died a long time ago.
examples.chinese: 他很久以前就去世了。

examples.english: The accident happened such a long time ago that I can't remember much about it.
examples.chinese: 这件意外事故过去了那么久，许多细节我都忘了。

expressions.text: a very long time/a long, long time

examples.english: I've had those books for a long, long time.
examples.chinese: 那些书我已经收藏很久很久了。

examples.english: It's very well built and should last a very long time.
examples.chinese: 它建得很好，应该可以用很长时间。

examples.english: It has long been recognized that a high-fat diet can cause heart problems.
examples.chinese: 人们长久以来就认识到高脂饮食会导致心脏病。

examples.english: She's convinced that Grandmother is not going to live long.
examples.chinese: 她相信祖母活不久了。

examples.english: The journey took longer than I thought it would.
examples.chinese: 这次旅程所费的时间比我原先所想的要长。

examples.english: Long after the war, the wreckage of his plane was discovered.
examples.chinese: 战争结束后很久，他的飞机残骸才被找到。

examples.english: She was wearing fake fur long before it became fashionable.
examples.chinese: 在假毛皮成为时尚之前，她早就开始穿了。

examples.english: Have you been working here for long?
examples.chinese: 你在这儿工作很久了吗?

examples.english: The phone rang for so long, I hung up in the end.
examples.chinese: 电话铃声响了很久，最后我把电话挂了。

examples.english: I guess it didn't happen very long ago.
examples.chinese: 我猜这事发生了没多久。

examples.english: Why is it taking so long?
examples.chinese: 为什么要那么长时间？

examples.english: I bet it doesn't take your mom so long to make an apple pie.
examples.chinese: 我敢打赌你妈妈不用花多久就能做个苹果馅饼。

examples.english: It's going to take us all night to finish marking these papers!
examples.chinese: 给这些考卷打分数要花去我们一整夜的时间！〔

examples.english: He's in London all week, and only comes home at the weekends.
examples.chinese: 他整个星期都在伦敦，只是在周末才回家。

examples.english: I've been working all day long.
examples.chinese: 我整天在工作。

examples.english: Susie, you must have been on the phone all night long!
examples.chinese: 苏茜，你肯定一整个晚上都在打电话！

examples.english: It's years since I rode a bike.
examples.chinese: 我有很多年没骑自行车了。

examples.english: My wife had to wait months for a hospital appointment.
examples.chinese: 我妻子等医院的预约要等上好几个月。

examples.english: I lived there for years.
examples.chinese: 我在那里住了很多年。

examples.english: That's one of the best films I've seen in years.
examples.chinese: 那是我多年来看到过的最好的影片之一。

examples.english: It seems like ages since we had a holiday.
examples.chinese: 我们好像很久没去度假了。

examples.english: This software takes ages to load.
examples.chinese: 安装这个软件需要很长时间。

examples.english: It took him ages to guess who it was in the photo.
examples.chinese: 他费了很长时间才猜出照片里的人是谁。

examples.english: I've been waiting here for ages.
examples.chinese: 我在这里等了很久了。

examples.english: ‘When did you last see Barbara?’ ‘Oh, ages ago.’
examples.chinese: “你最后一次看到芭芭拉是什么时候？”“噢，很久以前了。”

examples.english: It's the first time for ages and ages he's taken me out.
examples.chinese: 很久很久了，这是他第一次带我出去。

examples.english: Some of these medicines have been in the stockroom for donkey's years.
examples.chinese: 这些药物有部分在仓库里已经放了很久了。

examples.english: That's been going on for donkey's ages -- didn't you know?
examples.chinese: 那件事已经进行了好久了，你难道不知道？

examples.english: We used to play golf together, but that was donkey's years ago.
examples.chinese: 我们曾经常在一起打高尔夫球，可那是很多年以前的事了。

examples.english: It took me the longest time to figure out how to work the sunroof in this car.
examples.chinese: 我费了很长时间才弄懂怎样开关这辆车的活动车顶。

examples.english: For the longest time, I thought Nathan was Asian.
examples.chinese: 我长久以来都以为内森是亚洲人。

centers.english: a fairly long time

examples.english: He was furious, and it took him a while to calm down.
examples.chinese: 他暴跳如雷，过了好一会才平静下来。

examples.english: It may be some time before the company starts to make a profit.
examples.chinese: 公司可能要过一段时候才开始赢利。

examples.english: We hadn't seen him for a while, and he'd completely changed.
examples.chinese: 我们有一段时间没看见他，他已经完全变了。

examples.english: I've known Paul for some time, and I'm sure he wouldn't have said that.
examples.chinese: 我认识保罗有好一段时间了，我敢肯定他不会说那样的话。

examples.english: After a while, I realized what he meant.
examples.chinese: 过了一会我明白了他的意思。

examples.english: Not a single vehicle passed, but after some time they heard the roar of planes taking off at the airfield.
examples.chinese: 没有一辆车经过，但过了一会儿他们听到飞机从机场起飞的轰鸣声。

examples.english: When she left school, it was quite a while before she found a job.
examples.chinese: 她离开学校后过了相当长的一段时间才找到工作。

examples.english: I stayed in the Stage Coach Inn, but it's been quite some time ago.
examples.chinese: 我曾经住过驿站马车旅馆，不过那是好些时候之前的事了。

examples.english: It's been a while since we last heard from Jo.
examples.chinese: 我们已经有好些时候没有乔的消息了。

examples.english: The team has spent some time since their last defeat on new tactics.
examples.chinese: 自上次失利以来，该队花了不少时间来练习新战术。

examples.english: The cafe was taken over a while ago.
examples.chinese: 这家咖啡馆不久前被人接手了。

examples.english: We arranged the meeting some time ago -- were you not informed?
examples.chinese: 我们前些时候安排了这次会议，你没接到通知吗？

centers.english: a period of time

examples.english: These accounts are drawn up for a period of 52 weeks.
examples.chinese: 这些是为期52个星期的账目。

examples.english: After a brief period of independence, Belorussia came under Soviet rule.
examples.chinese: 白俄罗斯在独立了很短一段时期后受到了苏联的领导。

examples.english: You shouldn't sit in front of a computer screen for long periods without a break.
examples.chinese: 你不该坐在电脑屏幕前长时间不休息。

examples.english: Anne had difficulty holding down a job for any period of time.
examples.chinese: 安妮无法把一份工作保住一段时间。

examples.english: The work had to be completed within a limited period of time.
examples.chinese: 这项工作要在有限的时间内完成。

examples.english: The company expects a growth in profitability over a longer period.
examples.chinese: 这家公司期望在较长的时期内获得利润增长。

examples.english: Then, within a short period, his mother, father, and brother all died.
examples.chinese: 接着，在短时间内他父母和哥哥都相继去世了。

examples.english: The money can be paid back over a five-year period.
examples.chinese: 这笔钱可以在五年内偿还。

examples.english: The researchers observed mothers and their new infants for a three-day period.
