examples.english: You'll be paid more when your training is complete.
examples.chinese: 你培训结束后将得到更高的报酬。

examples.english: Building work should be complete within 20 weeks.
examples.chinese: 建筑工程应于20周内完工。

examples.english: When the mixing process is complete, the mixture is ready to be heated.
examples.chinese: 搅拌完了之后，混合物就可以加热了。

centers.english: to finish something that is difficult or unpleasant
centers.chinese: 完成困难的或不愉快的工作

examples.english: The course was hard, but I wanted to see it through.
examples.chinese: 这门课很难，但我要坚持读完它。

examples.english: Cassidy, aged 83, intends to see the project through to completion.
examples.chinese: 83岁的卡西迪决心要完成这个项目。

expressions.text: get it over with/get it over and done with

examples.english: I'm going to make an appointment at the dentist and get it over with before the holidays.
examples.chinese: 我打算跟牙医约一个时间，放假前把治牙的事尽快了结掉。

examples.english: Let's get the clean-up over and done with.
examples.chinese: 我们现在就把打扫的事了结掉。

examples.english: Campaigners vowed to carry on the struggle to the bitter end.
examples.chinese: 参加运动的人发誓要斗争到底。

examples.english: Despite his injury, Johnson carried on playing on to the bitter end.
examples.chinese: 约翰逊尽管受了伤，但还是坚持比到最后。

examples.english: Eleven girls joined the junior high football team, but only four stuck it out until the end of the season.
examples.chinese: 十一名女孩参加了初中的足球队，但只有四个人坚持到了赛季结束。

examples.english: It's hard to stick with an exercise program you don't enjoy.
examples.chinese: 要把你不喜欢的训练计划坚持到底是困难的。

examples.english: Just go pay the fine and be done with it.
examples.chinese: 去付了罚款，把这事了结掉吧。

examples.english: If that's what you want to do, for heaven's sake do it and have done with it.
examples.chinese: 如果你想那样做，看在老天爷分上你就去做，然后别再烦。

centers.english: when an event, activity, situation etc finishes

examples.english: World War II ended in 1945.
examples.chinese: 第二次世界大战于1945年结束。

examples.english: What time does your class finish?
examples.chinese: 你什么时候下课？

examples.english: How does the story end?
examples.chinese: 这故事的结尾是什么样的？

examples.english: The celebrations didn't finish till after midnight.
examples.chinese: 庆祝活动直到午夜过后才结束。

examples.english: Their marriage finally ended in divorce three years later.
examples.chinese: 他俩的婚姻三年后终于以离婚告终。

examples.english: By the time we arrived, the party was already over.
examples.chinese: 我们到达时聚会已结束了。

examples.english: Right, that's the formal part of the interview over. Is there anything you'd like to ask us?
examples.chinese: 好了，正式的面试到此为止。你有什么要问我们的吗？

examples.english: The game should be all over by 5 o'clock.
examples.chinese: 比赛到5点应该全部结束了。

examples.english: Months of uncertainty came to an end when the final votes were counted.
examples.chinese: 最后清点选票后，几个月来的动荡终于结束。

examples.english: It was already September, and our stay in Zurich was coming to an end.
examples.chinese: 已经是9月份了，我们在苏黎世逗留的日子将近尾声了。

examples.english: The young man stood up, realizing that the audition was at an end.
examples.chinese: 年轻人意识到试演已结束，便站了起来。

examples.english: It is with great sadness that I announce that our marriage is at an end.
examples.chinese: 我很伤心地宣布我们的婚姻已告结束。

centers.english: when a period of time ends

examples.english: The school year ends in June.
examples.chinese: 这学年在6月份结束。

examples.english: Winter was finally ending, and the first flowers of spring had begun to appear.
examples.chinese: 冬天终于要过去了，最早的春花开始绽放。

examples.english: The evening ended cordially with handshakes all round.
examples.chinese: 晚会结束时气氛融融，大家到处在握手。

examples.english: Autumn came to an end with the first snow.
examples.chinese: 下了第一场雪，秋天过去了。

examples.english: A generation of civil war had finally come to an end.
examples.chinese: 历时一代人的内战终于结束了。

examples.english: The long vacation was almost over, and she hadn't done any of the things she'd planned.
examples.chinese: 长长的假期即将结束，她计划的事一件也没做。

examples.english: I think I'm going to lose my temper before this evening is over.
examples.chinese: 我觉得我过不了今晚就要发火了。

examples.english: When does your school break up?
examples.chinese: 你们学校什么时候放假?

examples.english: The kids break up on Wednesday.
examples.chinese: 孩子们星期三放假。

expressions.text: draw to a close/to an end

examples.english: The long hot summer was drawing to an end.
examples.chinese: 漫长炎热的夏天就要过去了。

examples.english: As the class drew to a close, Hanson asked a student to summarize the lesson.
examples.chinese: 快下课前，汉森请一名学生把这一课的内容概述一下。

examples.english: ‘Time's up,’ said the teacher. ‘Stop writing, everyone!’
examples.chinese: “时间到，”老师说道，“大家停下来别写了！”

examples.english: The chairman may be asked to resign before his four-year term is up.
examples.chinese: 主席四年任期结束之前，可能会被要求辞职。

examples.english: We'd almost finished solving the problem when our time ran out.
examples.chinese: 我们都已差不多解决了这个问题，但时间已到。

examples.english: The desperate search for survivors continues, but time is running out.
examples.chinese: 他们继续拼命地寻找幸存者，可时间无多了。

examples.english: I'm sorry, listeners, we have to stop there. We're out of time.
examples.chinese: 各位听众，很抱歉，我们必须到这里结束了。时间到了。

centers.english: when the time in which you can use tickets etc finishes

examples.english: I want to use this train ticket before it runs out.
examples.chinese: 我想把这张火车票在过期前用掉。

examples.english: The lease on the shop runs out soon.
examples.chinese: 这家店的租约很快要到期了。

examples.english: The current treaty runs out at the end of this year.
examples.chinese: 现行条约于今年年底到期。

examples.english: I'm afraid we can't accept this credit card -- it expired last week.
examples.chinese: 恐怕我们不能接受这张信用卡——它上个星期就过期了。

examples.english: Your passport will expire ten years from the issue date.
examples.chinese: 你的护照从签发日起十年后到期。

examples.english: She retired six months before her contract expired.
examples.chinese: 她在合同期满前六个月退休。

examples.english: After the expiration of the trial period for the software, please contact our website.
examples.chinese: 软件试用期过后，请通过我们的网址与我们联系。

centers.english: when something bad has finished

examples.english: There had been a fight in the bar, but when the police got there it was all over.
examples.chinese: 酒吧里发生斗殴，但等警察去到那里时斗殴已结束了。

examples.english: His captors finally released him, and his long ordeal was over.
examples.chinese: 劫持者终于放了他，漫长的苦难终于结束了。

examples.english: In 1963, the White House wrongly predicted that the military action in Vietnam would be over by 1965.
examples.chinese: 1963年，白宫错误地预计在越南的军事行动可于1965年结束。

examples.english: What happened many years ago is over and done with as far as I'm concerned.
examples.chinese: 对我来说多年前的往事已经成为过去。

examples.english: They belonged to a part of her life that was over and done with.
examples.chinese: 他们都属于她生活中已经成为过去的一部分。

examples.english: Because of the measures we have taken, the worst is now behind us.
examples.chinese: 由于我们采取的措施，最糟的情况已过去了。

examples.english: Counselling helped her put the experience behind her.
examples.chinese: 心理咨询帮助她放下了那段经历。

examples.english: Your troubles are all in the past now.
examples.chinese: 你的麻烦现在都已过去了。

examples.english: As far as I am concerned, the matter is closed.
examples.chinese: 对我来说，这事已经了结了。

examples.english: Until we can talk about this in a civil manner, I consider the discussion closed.
examples.chinese: 除非我们好好地谈这件事，否则我就觉得没什么好讨论的了。

centers.english: not finished

examples.english: On her desk was an unfinished letter to her mother.
examples.chinese: 她的书桌上有封未写完的给她母亲的信。

examples.english: To this day, the building remains unfinished.
examples.chinese: 直至今日这幢建筑仍未完工。

examples.english: It is past time for Congress to attend to unfinished business.
examples.chinese: 国会想处理未了结的事务已来不及了。

examples.english: The excavation of the tunnel is still incomplete.
examples.chinese: 隧道的挖掘工作还未完成。

examples.english: Incomplete historical records have made the investigation more difficult.
examples.chinese: 残缺不全的历史记录使调查工作更加困难。

examples.english: The struggle for equal rights is not over yet.
examples.chinese: 争取平等权利的斗争尚未成功。

examples.english: The crisis is not over yet. We are still involved in negotiations.
examples.chinese: 危机还未结束，我们仍在谈判。

centers.english: to use all of something

examples.english: The kids have finished all the ice-cream.
examples.chinese: 孩子们把冰淇淋都吃完了。

examples.english: Wait till I've finished my drink and then we'll go.
examples.chinese: 等我喝完饮料我们就走。

examples.english: Come on, finish your dinner.
examples.chinese: 快点，把饭吃完。

examples.english: We ran out of gas on the freeway last night.
examples.chinese: 昨晚我们在高速公路上时用光了汽油。

examples.english: By the time they got back to the camp, they had nearly run out of water.
examples.chinese: 他们回到营地时，水差不多已喝完了。

examples.english: By 2100, we may have used up all our supplies of natural gas.
examples.chinese: 到2100年时，我们可能已用完了所有的天然气储备。

examples.english: I thought I'd bought plenty of paint, but we used it up before the room was finished.
examples.chinese: 我以为买来的涂料够多的了，没想到这房间未漆完涂料就用完了。

examples.english: What will happen when we have exhausted all our natural resources?
examples.chinese: 我们用完了所有的自然资源后会发生什么事？

examples.english: The organization has exhausted all its funds.
examples.chinese: 该团体已用完了所有资金。

examples.english: Over-intensive farming had exhausted the supply of nutrients in the soil.
examples.chinese: 过度密集的耕作已耗尽了土壤中的养分。

centers.english: when there is nothing left

examples.english: ‘Are there any cookies left?’ ‘No, they're all gone.’
examples.chinese: “还有甜饼吗？”“没了，都吃完了。”

examples.english: Then Cal lost his job and soon our savings were gone.
examples.chinese: 后来卡尔丢了工作，很快我们的储蓄都花光了。

examples.english: I used to feel sorry for her, but my sympathy's all gone now.
examples.chinese: 以前我还为她感到惋惜，可现在我已经对她一点都不同情了。

examples.english: In this area, emergency food aid is likely to be finished within days.
examples.chinese: 这地区的紧急救援食品可能几天之内就要用完了。

examples.english: When that can's finished, there won't be any fuel left.
examples.chinese: 那桶油用完后就再也没有了。

examples.english: ‘Where are the matches?’ ‘We don't have any more.’
examples.chinese: “火柴在哪里？”“没有了。”

expressions.text: there's no more/there aren't any more

examples.english: There's no more sugar. You'll have to get some next time you go out.
examples.chinese: 糖用完了。下次你出门得买些。

examples.english: The store didn't have any more of the dolls, but they might get some in next week.
examples.chinese: 这家商店没有玩具娃娃了，下星期他们可能会进些货。

expressions.text: there is none left/there is not any left

examples.english: Don't eat any more cake or there will be none left for your dad.
examples.chinese: 别再吃蛋糕了，要不你爸爸就没有了。

examples.english: There weren't any dresses left in a size 12.
examples.chinese: 尺码12的连衣裙一件也没有了。

expressions.text: there is no wine/milk/fruit etc left

examples.english: There's no coffee left. Shall I make some more?
examples.chinese: 咖啡全喝完了。要我再煮一些吗？

examples.english: Our supplies had run out and all we could do was wait.
examples.chinese: 供应物品全用完了，我们只能等待。

examples.english: I was in a phone box and my money ran out before I'd finished.
examples.chinese: 我在电话亭里，电话未结束钱币就投完了。

examples.english: The oxygen supply would soon become exhausted.
examples.chinese: 氧气很快就会用完的。

examples.english: All that's left are some barren hillsides and a couple of exhausted mines.
examples.chinese: 余下的只有一些光秃的山坡和几个挖空了的矿井。

centers.english: to not use all of something

examples.english: No you can't have another notepad - you haven't finished that one yet.
examples.chinese: 不，你不能再要一本记事本了—那本你还没用完。

examples.english: Try not to finish your food rations too quickly. We don't know when there will be more.
examples.chinese: 尽量别把配给的食品太快吃完。我们不知道什么时候会再有。

examples.english: Is Tom all right? He left nearly all his dinner.
examples.chinese: 汤姆怎么了？他把饭几乎全剩下了。

examples.english: Always leave enough fuel for the next person to build a fire with.
examples.chinese: 一定要给下一个人留下足够的燃料烧个火。

examples.english: Leave me some space, will you!
examples.chinese: 让点地方给我，行吗？

centers.english: something that is never all used

examples.english: The enemy seemed to have an inexhaustible supply of ammunition.
examples.chinese: 敌人的弹药供应好像用之不竭。

examples.english: What is the source of Armstrong's seemingly inexhaustible wealth?
examples.chinese: 阿姆斯特朗那似乎无穷无尽的财富是哪里来的呢?

examples.english: Scientists are working to create a fuel that would be cheap, clean, and inexhaustible.
examples.chinese: 科学家正努力要发明一种廉价、清洁又取之不尽的燃料。

examples.english: A seemingly endless supply of fireworks lit up the clear night sky.
examples.chinese: 一连串似乎无穷尽的烟火照亮了清朗的夜空。

examples.english: We don't have an endless supply of oil.
examples.chinese: 我们的石油储备不是取之不竭的。

examples.english: He seems to think I have an endless supply of cash.
examples.chinese: 他好像以为我有用不完的现金。

centers.english: to decide that a planned event will not now happen
centers.chinese: 安排在更佳时间做某事

examples.english: Classes were canceled for the day.
examples.chinese: 当天的课取消了。

examples.english: I forgot to cancel my doctor's appointment.
examples.chinese: 我忘记了取消与医生的约会。

examples.english: They were forced to cancel the concert when the conductor became ill.
examples.chinese: 指挥生病，他们被迫取消了那场音乐会。

examples.english: Bad weather led to the cancellation of most flights out of Chicago's O'Hare Airport.
examples.chinese: 恶劣的天气致使芝加哥奥黑尔机场大部分航班被取消。

examples.english: The fighting in the region could lead to the cancellation of next month's elections.
examples.chinese: 该地区的战斗可能会使下月的选举取消。

examples.english: The game was called off due to heavy rain.
examples.chinese: 因为大雨，比赛取消了。

examples.english: Linda may call the wedding off.
examples.chinese: 琳达可能会取消婚礼。

examples.english: I'm afraid the party's off. Nick won't let us use his apartment.
examples.chinese: 很抱歉，这次聚会取消了。尼克不让我们用他的公寓。

examples.english: Myers called me yesterday to tell me that the deal was off.
examples.chinese: 迈尔斯昨天打电话给我说交易取消了。

examples.english: We haven't really got enough money for the trip -- let's just scrub it.
examples.chinese: 这次旅游我们实在是钱不够——就算了吧。

examples.english: Plans for a new stadium have been shelved for now.
examples.chinese: 新体育馆建设计划被搁置了。

examples.english: The city shelved the project due to lack of funding.
examples.chinese: 因缺少资金，该市搁置了那个计划。

centers.english: to show that something is correct or true
centers.chinese: 展示某事是正确或真实的

examples.english: We're sure Jason took the money, but we can't prove it.
examples.chinese: 我们肯定贾森拿走了钱，但无法证实。

examples.english: Until there is evidence to prove any of these claims, we cannot pass judgement.
examples.chinese: 除非有证据来证实这些主张，否则我们不能作出判决。

examples.english: Can you prove that you were at home at the time of the attack?
examples.chinese: 你能否证明袭击案发生时你在家?

examples.english: He wanted to prove that he was just as clever as his sister.
examples.chinese: 他想要证明自己就是与妹妹一样聪明。

examples.english: I would love to prove him wrong.
examples.chinese: 我很想证明他错了。

examples.english: I'm telling the truth, and I can prove it to you.
examples.chinese: 我说的是实说，我可以证明给你看。

examples.english: Don't trust anyone who turns up at your door, unless they can prove who they are.
examples.chinese: 别相信出现在你家门口的人，除非他们能证明自己的身份。

examples.english: His guilt has never been conclusively proven.
examples.chinese: 他的罪行从未被确实证明。

examples.english: The Prime Minister's comments show his ignorance of people's feelings.
examples.chinese: 首相的话表明他对民意一无所知。

examples.english: Research shows that smiling increases the levels of hormones that promote good health.
examples.chinese: 研究表明，微笑能提高促进健康的激素水平。

examples.english: These figures show how serious the company's problems are.
examples.chinese: 这些数据表明该公司问题的严重性。

examples.english: A scientific theory is only ‘true’ until someone shows it to be false or inaccurate.
examples.chinese: 一个科学理论仅仅在某人证明它错误或不精确以前才算是“正确的”。

examples.english: The studies demonstrate a clear link between smoking and heart disease.
examples.chinese: 研究证明吸烟与心脏病的明确关连。

examples.english: The President is anxious to demonstrate that he has a strong foreign policy.
examples.chinese: 总统急于证明他的外交政策很强硬。

examples.english: Try to round off your answer by demonstrating how your old job has prepared you to do the job you are applying for.
examples.chinese: 尽量以证明前一份工作如何为现在申请的工作作好准备来结束回答。

examples.english: Police have found new evidence that confirms his story.
examples.chinese: 警方已发现新的证据来证实他说的话。

examples.english: The discovery seems to confirm that people lived here over 10,000 years ago.
examples.chinese: 此次发现似乎证实，一万多年前此地就有人居住。

examples.english: In July his worst fears were confirmed: he had cancer.
examples.chinese: 7月，他最害怕的事得到证实：他患上了癌症。

examples.english: Do you have any evidence to support these claims?
examples.chinese: 你有证据来支持这些主张吗?

examples.english: The notion that women are worse drivers than men is simply not supported by the facts.
examples.chinese: 女性的驾驶水平低于男性的说法完全没有事实依据。

examples.english: For twenty-five years he painstakingly amassed evidence to support his hypothesis.
examples.chinese: 25年来，他不辞辛劳地收集了大量证据来支持他的假说。

examples.english: When you write a history essay, you should back up all your points with facts.
examples.chinese: 写历史文章时，你应该用史实来证明你所有的论点。

examples.english: They claim they can give us the best deal, but can they back this up with guarantees?
examples.chinese: 他们声称能给予我们最优惠的价钱，但他们能否以保证书来证明这一点呢？

examples.english: Wright was accused of pretending to be injured, and this was backed up by video evidence.
examples.chinese: 赖特被指责假装受伤，这有录像为证。

examples.english: Most of the available evidence bears out the view that students learn better in small classes than in large classes.
examples.chinese: 大多数现有的证据证实了小班上课的教学效果要比大班上课好的看法。

examples.english: My warnings about Jean-Paul were later borne out by his dishonesty.
examples.chinese: 让·保罗不诚实的行为证实了我先前的警告是正确的。

examples.english: Last summer I predicted an increase in terrorist violence, and recent events have borne me out.
examples.chinese: 去年夏天我曾预言暴力恐怖事件会增加，近来发生的事证明我是对的。

examples.english: The authorities claimed they were conspiring to overthrow the government, but offered no evidence to substantiate these claims.
examples.chinese: 当局称他们在密谋推翻政府，但未能提供证据证明这些说法。

examples.english: Allegations made by prisoners are usually only considered when substantiated by the evidence of a prison officer.
examples.chinese: 囚犯的指控通常只有在经监狱官证实的情况下才会被考虑。

examples.english: All the information used in this report has been validated by an independent panel of experts.
examples.chinese: 这份报告中使用的所有资料都已经过一个独立专家小组确证。

examples.english: This is an interesting hypothesis, but all attempts to validate it have so far failed.
examples.chinese: 这是一个有趣的假设，但到目前为止，所有要证明它的努力均告失败。

examples.english: Levine claims that a third car was involved in the accident and witnesses have corroborated this.
examples.chinese: 莱文声称事故涉及第三辆车，目击者已证实了这一点。

examples.english: Professor Carling's findings have been corroborated by more recent research.
examples.chinese: 卡林教授的发现已被近来更多的研究工作所证实。

examples.english: There was no one to corroborate her story about the disturbance in the lounge.
examples.chinese: 她说有人在休息室打架，但无人能够证实。

examples.english: No doctor would order surgery on the basis of a single test result, without corroborating clinical evidence.
examples.chinese: 仅凭一次化验结果而没有临床证据，没有一个医生会要求进行手术。

centers.english: to prove that something is wrong, untrue, or does not exist
centers.chinese: 证明某事是错误的、不真实的或不存在

examples.english: She was able to produce figures that disproved Smith's argument.
examples.chinese: 她能够提出数字驳倒史密斯的论据。

examples.english: The existence of God is a question of faith, and therefore impossible to prove or disprove.
examples.chinese: 上帝是否存在是信仰问题，因此，不可能被证实或驳倒。

examples.english: I knew that he was lying but I had no evidence with which to refute his story.
examples.chinese: 我知道他在撒谎，但我没有证据来驳斥他的谎言。

examples.english: The accusation has been wholly refuted by an in-depth analysis of the evidence.
examples.chinese: 对证据的深入分析完全驳倒了那个指控。

examples.english: In her book she debunks a lot of the claims made by astrologers.
examples.chinese: 她在书中驳斥了许多占星家的断言。

examples.english: Payton wants to debunk the myth that economics is a science.
examples.chinese: 佩顿想揭穿经济学是一门科学的神话。

examples.english: None of the more recent views invalidates Hahnemann's original discoveries or teachings.
examples.chinese: 近来更多的观点都未能推翻哈内曼最早的发现和学说。

examples.english: If we look closely at Professor Thomson's argument, we see that his conclusion is invalidated by a number of factual errors.
examples.chinese: 如果我们仔细研究一下汤姆森教授的论据，我们可以发现其中存在许多事实错误，因此他的结论不能成立。

examples.english: It would not be difficult to demolish a theory that was so obviously a load of rubbish.
examples.chinese: 驳倒明显是一堆垃圾的理论不是件难事。

examples.english: There was a time when the response ‘that's a value judgement’ would have demolished any argument in the educational field.
examples.chinese: 有段时期，一句“那是价值评判”的回答就会驳倒教育界的任何论据。

examples.english: The report explodes the myth that men are bed-hopping rogues.
examples.chinese: 那份报告使所谓男人是拈花惹草、用情不专的坏蛋的观念不攻自破。

examples.english: All the athletes’ drugs tests were negative.
examples.chinese: 所有运动员药品测试的结果都是阴性。

examples.english: a negative pregnancy test
examples.chinese: 阴性的妊娠化验

examples.english: The first brain scan proved negative.
examples.chinese: 第一次脑部扫描显示为阴性。

centers.english: something that proves something is true

examples.english: He was the only person in the room when the money disappeared - what more proof do you want?
examples.chinese: 钱不见时房间里只有他。你还要什么证据?

examples.english: The police knew she was guilty, but they had no proof.
examples.chinese: 警方知道她有罪，但没有证据。

examples.english: You can't drink in bars without some proof of your age.
examples.chinese: 你不证明自己的年龄就不能进酒吧喝酒。

examples.english: There is no proof that he did it.
examples.chinese: 没有证据表明是他干的。

examples.english: It was alleged that he was stealing money from the till, but we never had any conclusive proof.
examples.chinese: 据称他从钱柜里偷钱，但我们从来没有确切的证据。

examples.english: The police did not have enough evidence to charge anybody with the murder.
examples.chinese: 警方没有足够的证据以谋杀罪的罪名控告任何一个人。

examples.english: There is some evidence that a small amount of alcohol is good for you.
examples.chinese: 有证据表明，少量酒精对人有益。

examples.english: evidence of life on other planets
examples.chinese: 其他行星上存在生命的证明

examples.english: There is no scientific evidence to support this theory.
examples.chinese: 没有科学证据支持这个理论。

examples.english: There is strong evidence to suggest that the Great Barrier Reef will have disappeared in 20 years time.
examples.chinese: 强有力的证据表明，澳大利亚大堡礁将在20年内消失。

examples.english: There is not a shred of evidence to support such a theory.
examples.chinese: 丝毫没有证据支持这一理论。

examples.english: Can you produce documentation to support your claim?
examples.chinese: 你能提供支持你说法的文件证据吗？

examples.english: As there is no formal documentation of your business partnership, it has no legal status.
examples.chinese: 因没有能证明你是生意合伙人的正式文件，故此它不具备合法地位。

examples.english: The team is living proof of the old saying that it's not whom you play that counts, but when you play them.
examples.chinese: 常言道“比赛的胜负不在对手是谁而在天时之利”，那支队就是个活证据。

examples.english: We know that English and French speakers can live together in Canada - Montreal is living proof of that.
examples.chinese: 我们都知道，说英语的人和说法语的人在加拿大能共同生活—蒙特利尔就是个活证明。

examples.english: Jordan is living proof that you don't have to conform to the music industry's standards in order to be accepted.
examples.chinese: 不必遵照音乐界的标准也能被接受，乔丹就是个活证明。

examples.english: The acid test of a good leader is the extent to which they select a style to suit the circumstances.
examples.chinese: 考验一位优秀领导人要看他能否因时制宜。

centers.english: to make someone or something arrive late

examples.english: Mr Evans has been delayed but will be joining us shortly.
examples.chinese: 埃文斯先生有事耽搁了，不过很快就会到我们这里来的。

examples.english: Our plane was delayed by fog.
examples.chinese: 我们的飞机因雾推迟了。

examples.english: I mustn't delay you any longer.
examples.chinese: 我不能再耽搁你的时间了。

examples.english: There was an accident on the freeway and we got delayed.
examples.chinese: 高速公路上出了事故，我们被耽搁了。

examples.english: The accident made us late for work.
examples.chinese: 这场事故使我们上班迟到了。

examples.english: I'll let you go - I don't want to make you late for your appointment.
examples.chinese: 我会让你去的—我可不想让你约会迟到。

examples.english: Catching a later train made Frank late getting to the office.
examples.chinese: 弗兰克乘了较晚的一班列车，所以到办公室时迟了。

examples.english: I won't hold you up - I can see you're in a hurry.
examples.chinese: 我不会耽搁你的，看得出你很急。

examples.english: Get a move on, you two! You're holding up the whole queue!
examples.chinese: 往前挪挪，你们两个！你们把所有排队的人都挡住了！

examples.english: We got held up in traffic and missed the show.
examples.chinese: 我们被交通堵塞耽误了时间，错过了那场演出。

examples.english: He should be here by now. What's keeping him?
examples.chinese: 他这会儿应该来了。是什么事拖住他了？

examples.english: I won't detain you for much longer, Miss Reid. There are just a few more questions that I need to ask you.
examples.chinese: 我不会耽误你多久的，里德小姐。我只需要再问你几个问题。

examples.english: Mr Jones should be here, but I'm afraid he's been unavoidably detained.
examples.chinese: 琼斯先生应该在这儿了；但恐怕他是被什么推不开的事耽搁了。

centers.english: to make something happen later or take longer than it should

examples.english: The President's visit had to be delayed because of security problems.
examples.chinese: 因安全问题，总统的访问只得延期了。

examples.english: This latest terrorist attack is bound to delay the peace talks even further.
examples.chinese: 最近的恐怖袭击必然会使和谈进一步延期。

examples.english: The plane's departure was delayed by mechanical problems.
examples.chinese: 这架飞机因机械故障而推迟了起飞时间。

expressions.text: be delayed for 5 hours/2 months etc

examples.english: The opening of the new bridge may be delayed for several months.
examples.chinese: 新桥可能要推迟几个月才启用。

examples.english: Protesters held up work on the new road.
examples.chinese: 抗议者阻延了新路的工程。

examples.english: The peace talks are being held up by continued fighting on the border.
examples.chinese: 和谈被边境上持续不断的战斗所耽搁。

examples.english: They should have finished that job on Friday - what's holding them up?
examples.chinese: 他们应在周五完成那项工作的。什么原因使他们延误了

examples.english: Her stubbornness on this one issue is holding the whole deal up.
examples.chinese: 她在这一问题上的固执使整个交易被拖延了。

examples.english: Your mistake has set us back several weeks.
examples.chinese: 你的错误使我们迟了几个星期。

examples.english: The Transportation Department first announced that the expressway would be completed by 2002, but it has since set the timetable back.
examples.chinese: 最初交通部宣布说这条高速公路将于2002年完工，但后来又把日期推迟了。

examples.english: The start date kept being put back, for a variety of reasons.
examples.chinese: 由于种种原因，出发日期被一再推迟。

examples.english: The project got bogged down in a series of legal disputes.
examples.chinese: 该工程因遇到一连串法律上的争端而停滞不前。

examples.english: Keep the document simple and avoid getting bogged down by complicated formatting.
examples.chinese: 保持这份文件简洁，防止被复杂的形式所妨碍。

centers.english: to deliberately delay someone or something

examples.english: Quit stalling and tell me where she is.
examples.chinese: 别拖延时间了，告诉我她在哪儿。

examples.english: I'm not ready to talk to him yet - go out there and see if you can stall him.
examples.chinese: 我还没准备好和他谈话，出去看看你能否拖延住他。

examples.english: City officials have slowed the development by stalling building permits for the area.
examples.chinese: 市政府官员拖着不签发在该地区的建筑许可证，这就减慢了发展势头。

examples.english: Stop playing for time and give us an answer.
examples.chinese: 别拖时间了，给我们一个答复吧。

examples.english: The rebel's current ceasefire doesn't amount to much more than playing for time.
examples.chinese: 叛乱分子当前的停火只是在拖延时间而已。

examples.english: Some politicians are prepared to use delaying tactics to block the bill.
examples.chinese: 有些政治家打算采用拖延战术来阻挠这一提案。

examples.english: The peace negotiations were being held up by the delaying tactics of France and Great Britain.
examples.chinese: 和平谈判正受到法英两国拖延战术的阻碍。

examples.english: He hesitated and procrastinated for weeks before he finally told her he wanted their relationship to end.
examples.chinese: 他犹豫着拖延了好几个星期，才终于向她开口说想要结束他俩的关系。

examples.english: Certain players are procrastinating over their contracts in order to see how much money they can squeeze out of their clubs.
examples.chinese: 有些球员拖着不签合同以试探到底能从俱乐部挤出多少钱来。

examples.english: She finally agreed to take the job after months of procrastination.
examples.chinese: 拖延了几个月后，她终于同意接受这份工作。

centers.english: a situation in which someone or something is delayed
centers.chinese: 某人或某事被耽搁的情况

examples.english: Any delay in the production process is costly to a company.
examples.chinese: 生产过程中任何耽误对公司来说都要付出很大的代价。

examples.english: The strike is causing long delays at the airport
examples.chinese: 罢工使机场的航班延误了很长时间。

examples.english: After three months’ delay, work finally began on the new building.
examples.chinese: 经过三个月的延误，新建筑终于开始动工了。

examples.english: There have been a lot of complaints about delays in issuing passports.
examples.chinese: 大家对延迟签发护照怨声鼎沸。

examples.english: An accident on the London-Brighton road has caused a major hold-up.
examples.chinese: 在伦敦至布赖顿公路上的一次交通事故引起了严重的堵塞。

examples.english: There's been a hold-up with the builders, so the new office won't be ready for several months.
examples.chinese: 建筑工人有些耽搁，因此新办事处要过几个月才能完工。

examples.english: There's always going to be a bottleneck because only two people review all the applications.
examples.chinese: 只有两个人审阅所有的申请，所以总是难免发生阻滞。

examples.english: If we don't hire more people in production we're going to have a huge bottleneck in a few months.
examples.chinese: 如果我们不雇用更多的生产人员，几个月之后就会出现严重瓶颈。

centers.english: the beginning of something

examples.english: I haven't seen her since the beginning of last year.
examples.chinese: 自去年初我就没见到过她。

examples.english: It was the beginning of a long friendship.
examples.chinese: 从此开始了一段漫长的友谊。

examples.english: This fall's presidential election could mean the beginning of a new era in American politics.
examples.chinese: 今秋的总统大选可能意味着美国政治史上一个新时代的开始。

examples.english: It's so long since I spoke German, I'd have to go right back to the beginning if I took a class in it now.
examples.chinese: 我很久没讲德语了，如果我现在上德语课，就得从头学起。

examples.english: The runners are now lining up for the start of the race.
examples.chinese: 比赛就要开始了，赛跑选手在起跑线上各就各位。

examples.english: Tomorrow marks the start of the presidential election campaign.
examples.chinese: 明天标志着总统竞选活动的开始。

examples.english: They had an exotic meal to celebrate the start of the Chinese New Year.
examples.chinese: 他们为庆祝中国农历新年的来临吃了顿异国风味的饭菜。

examples.english: A pint of vodka at eight o'clock in the morning was not a good start to the day.
examples.chinese: 早上8点就喝下一品脱伏特加来开始一天的生活可不是好习惯。

expressions.text: get off to a good/bad start

examples.english: If we get off to a good start this season, I think the team has a real chance to win the championship.
examples.chinese: 如果我们本赛季开头顺当，我相信球队有很大机会能夺得冠军。

examples.english: AIDS became widespread in the 1980s, but no-one is certain of its origin.
examples.chinese: 20世纪80年代艾滋病开始广泛传播，但没有人确切地知道其起源。

examples.english: He's writing a dictionary that explains the origin of words.
examples.chinese: 他正在编写一部解释词源的辞书。

examples.english: Hughes's book ‘The Fatal Shore’ is a study of the origins of Australia as a British penal colony.
examples.chinese: 休斯的作品《致命海岸》研究了澳大利亚作为英国的罪犯流放地的起源。

examples.english: Advanced computer systems could trace the origin of every gun used in a violent crime.
examples.chinese: 先进的电脑系统可以追查出暴力犯罪案中使用过的每一把枪的来历。

examples.english: Today's ceremony is a modern version of a tradition which has its origins in medieval times.
examples.chinese: 今天的仪式是一种源于中世纪的传统的现代版本。

examples.english: The magazines were organized by country of origin.
examples.chinese: 这些杂志按来源国分类。

examples.english: If you want to learn about working overseas, this book would be a good starting point.
examples.chinese: 如果你想了解在国外工作的情况，这本书是一个很好的起点。

examples.english: Duffy's difficult relationship with her mother was the starting point for her fiction.
examples.chinese: 达菲与她母亲紧张的关系是她小说的基础。

examples.english: The assassination of Archduke Ferdinand is seen as the starting point of the war.
examples.chinese: 斐迪南大公遭刺杀的事件被认为是那次战争的起因。

examples.english: Make sure to check your air conditioning before the onset of hot weather.
examples.chinese: 暑天到来之前一定要检查一下空调。

examples.english: The onset of the Depression meant starvation and suffering for millions of people.
examples.chinese: 大萧条的开始意味着数百万人要挨饿受苦。

examples.english: DiPietro's research shows that an active lifestyle can delay the onset of many diseases common with aging.
examples.chinese: 迪彼得罗的研究显示积极的生活方式能够推迟许多老年常见病的出现。

centers.english: at the beginning

examples.english: At the start it looked as though Italy would win, but Argentina improved as the game went on.
examples.chinese: 起先似乎是意大利队会赢，但随着比赛的进行，阿根廷队越踢越好。

examples.english: She was nervous at the beginning but she settled down as she got further into her speech.
examples.chinese: 演说刚开始时她很紧张，但讲着讲着她就安定下来了。

examples.english: We pay our rent at the beginning of the month.
examples.chinese: 我们月初付房租。

examples.english: For homework tonight, start at the beginning of chapter three and read up to page 98.
examples.chinese: 今晚的家庭作业是从第三章开始读到第98页。

examples.english: At the start of the century, barely 3% of the population was literate.
examples.chinese: 本世纪初，这些人口中识字的还不到3%。

examples.english: Barney was quiet at first, but gradually he became more confident.
examples.chinese: 起先巴尼不声不响的，但后来逐渐变得自信起来。

examples.english: At first I didn't think Nancy and I would get along.
examples.chinese: 一开始我不觉得南希和我能相处得来。

examples.english: They offered her the job, initially on a temporary basis but later as a full member of the staff.
examples.chinese: 起初他们聘请她做临时工，但后来就把她转为正式员工了。

examples.english: My initial impression of Sadie was that she was shy and a little unhappy.
examples.chinese: 萨迪最初给我的印象是害羞并有点不开心。

examples.english: Our employees receive health benefits and $28,000 a year to start with.
examples.chinese: 我们的员工入职时享有医疗福利和年薪28,000美元。

examples.english: Even children who are healthy to begin with wouldn't survive long in these terrible conditions.
examples.chinese: 在如此恶劣的条件下，即使是身体原本很健康的孩子也活不了多久。

examples.english: Originally, they told me I was only going to work 35 hours a week.
examples.chinese: 起初他们告诉我每周只需工作35小时。

examples.english: Two hundred people showed up for the wedding, about 50 more than we originally planned.
examples.chinese: 婚礼上来了200个客人，比我们原先计划的要多出约50人。

examples.english: Sylvia knew at the outset what her ultimate goals were.
examples.chinese: 西尔维娅一开始就知道自己的最终目标是什么。

examples.english: It had been decided at the outset that Theresa would be our spokesperson.
examples.chinese: 一开始就已经决定由特雷莎来做我们的发言人。

centers.english: done or happening at the beginning

examples.english: Simon's initial feeling when he heard about the wedding was surprise.
examples.chinese: 西蒙最初听说这次婚礼时颇感意外。

examples.english: After initial delays, construction on the new library is due to start in two weeks.
examples.chinese: 经过最初的耽搁，新图书馆的建造工程预定于两周后展开。

examples.english: The initial cost of the computer system is more than made up for in terms of eventual profit.
examples.chinese: 这个电脑系统最终的利润将远远大于最初在成本方面的投入。

examples.english: I'll be seeing him early next week.
examples.chinese: 下周初我会见到他。

examples.english: Rangers scored early in the game but fell behind within ten minutes.
examples.chinese: 流浪者队在比赛初期取得入球，但10分钟后落后了。

examples.english: We're planning to go to Barcelona in early September.
examples.chinese: 我们打算9月初去巴塞罗那。

examples.english: He was described as a man in his early thirties between 30 and 33 years old.
examples.chinese: 人们说他是个30岁出头的男人。

examples.english: the story of her early life in India
examples.chinese: 她早年在印度生活的故事

examples.english: The architect's plans are still in the preliminary stages.
examples.chinese: 建筑师的设计仍处于初步阶段。

examples.english: Preliminary market research has shown that most Americans prefer environmentally-friendly products.
examples.chinese: 初步的市场研究显示大部分美国人愿意选用对环境无害的产品。

examples.english: Williams cleared his throat, made a few introductory remarks welcoming everyone, then began his speech.
examples.chinese: 威廉斯清了清嗓子，讲了几句开场白欢迎大家后就开始作演讲。

examples.english: The text has been revised and a new introductory essay has been added for the second edition.
examples.chinese: 第二版的内容经过修订，并加入了一篇新的序文。

examples.english: In the opening chapter, Ramona sits at the breakfast table thinking about the first day of school.
examples.chinese: 在开头的一章里，罗莫娜坐在早餐桌前，想着第一天上学的事。

examples.english: The audience strongly objected to the opening remarks of the president's speech.
examples.chinese: 听众对总统发言的开场白极为不满。

examples.english: Hilary makes a brief appearance in the opening scene, but doesn't have a major part.
examples.chinese: 希拉里在开头的一幕露了一下面，但没有扮演主要角色。

centers.english: the time when something is first used or discovered
centers.chinese: 某物最初被使用或发现时

examples.english: With the arrival of the railroads after the Civil War, more and more people began moving west to California.
examples.chinese: 内战结束后随着铁路的出现，越来越多的人开始向西迁移到了加州。

examples.english: The arrival of convenience foods took much of the hard work out of preparing meals.
examples.chinese: 方便食品的出现大大减少了烧菜做饭的麻烦。

expressions.text: the coming of/ the advent of

examples.english: The Middle East changed dramatically with the coming of Islam 600 years after Christ.
examples.chinese: 公元600年伊斯兰教的出现使中东发生了巨大变化。

examples.english: Before the coming of the railways in the late 1860s these old roads were the only link between towns.
examples.chinese: 在19世纪60年代后期铁路出现之前，这些旧公路便是城镇间唯一的联系。

examples.english: The advent of TV led to major changes in our social and family life.
examples.chinese: 电视的出现使我们的社交与家庭生活起了重大变化。

examples.english: Women workers tended to lose their jobs with the advent of new technology.
examples.chinese: 随着新技术的出现，女工更容易失业。

examples.english: More than anyone else, Elvis Presley was responsible for the birth of rock and roll.
examples.chinese: 埃尔维斯·普雷斯利对于摇滚音乐的诞生所起的作用比任何人都大。

examples.english: The birth of modern science was to fundamentally change people's attitudes towards religion.
examples.chinese: 现代科学的诞生从根本上改变了人们对宗教的态度。

examples.english: People have worshipped gods since the dawn of civilization.
examples.chinese: 自文明发展之初，人类便信奉神明。

examples.english: Ordinary life would never be the same again after the dawn of the Industrial age.
examples.chinese: 工业时代来临之后，日常生活和以往再也不同了。

examples.english: A small group of poets and writers ushered in the dawn of the Romantic era in literature.
examples.chinese: 一小群诗人和作家开创了浪漫主义文学的新纪元。

centers.english: from the beginning

examples.english: Tell me everything that happened, from the beginning.
examples.chinese: 把发生的事全部告诉我，从头讲起。

examples.english: Their marriage has been in trouble from the start.
examples.chinese: 他俩的婚姻一开始就有问题。

examples.english: Right from the start I could tell she didn't like me.
examples.chinese: 从一开始我就知道她不喜欢我。

examples.english: Mark felt very comfortable in his new job, right from the beginning.
examples.chinese: 从一开始马克就对新工作感到很满意。

examples.english: This project has been a complete nightmare from start to finish.
examples.chinese: 这项计划从头到尾是一场噩梦。

examples.english: Eva's been very supportive from the word go.
examples.chinese: 伊娃从一开始就大力支持。

examples.english: The Elfin Theatre Company was doomed to failure from the word go.
examples.chinese: 埃尔芬剧团从一开始就注定搞不好。

examples.english: From day one I knew we'd have a strong team this year.
examples.chinese: 我一开始就知道今年我们能组成一支强队。

examples.english: We've opposed this amendment since day one and we'd be stupid to change our minds now.
examples.chinese: 我们一开始就反对这项修正案，现在改变主意会显得很傻的。

examples.english: The new group had, from the outset, campaigned for an improvement in childcare provision.
examples.chinese: 这个新团体从一开始就发起活动来争取改善儿童看护服务。

examples.english: I was determined from the outset to make the most of going to university.
examples.chinese: 我一进大学就决心要充分利用这个学习的机会。

centers.english: the first part of a story, book, film etc
centers.chinese: 故事、书籍、电影等的第一部分

examples.english: Schoolchildren are taught that stories should have a beginning, a middle and an end.
examples.chinese: 老师教导学生故事应有开头部分、中间部分和结尾部分。

examples.english: The beginning of the movie is very violent.
examples.chinese: 这部影片的开头非常暴力。

examples.english: The author tells us who the killer is at the very beginning of the novel.
examples.chinese: 这本小说的作者一开始就告诉我们谁是杀手。

examples.english: I tried to read ‘Tristram Shandy’ but I couldn't get past the start.
examples.chinese: 我努力想读《项迪传》，但开头部分怎么也读不下去。

examples.english: Not much happens at the start of the film -- don't worry if you're late.
examples.chinese: 影片开头没发生什么事—你迟到了也不必担心。

examples.english: Speakers often give an overview at the start of a lecture and a summary at the end.
examples.chinese: 演讲者经常在讲座开始时作一个概述，结尾时再作一个总结。

examples.english: Children will enjoy this movie, though they may be confused during the first part.
examples.chinese: 小孩子会喜欢这部电影的，虽然他们对第一部分可能不太明白。

examples.english: The first part of this textbook deals with mechanics.
examples.chinese: 这本教科书的第一部分讲述力学。

examples.english: Please turn to the first part of the report, which relates to safety matters.
examples.chinese: 请翻到报告的第一部分，其内容与安全事项有关。

examples.english: After a slow dream-like opening, the play explodes into life.
examples.chinese: 这出戏的开头节奏缓慢、如梦幻一般，之后却突然间变得生动有趣。

examples.english: The opening of Charles Dickens’ ‘Bleak House’ describes a thick London fog.
examples.chinese: 查尔斯·狄更斯的小说《荒凉山庄》的开头部分描述了伦敦的一场浓雾。

centers.english: something that comes at the beginning of a book, speech etc

examples.english: After an introduction by the chairperson, we'll get on with the day's discussions.
examples.chinese: 由主席给大家作介绍之后，我们将进行今天的讨论。

examples.english: None of us know anything about this subject, so we'd appreciate it if you give us a brief intro before you start.
examples.chinese: 大家对这门课一窍不通，所以请你在开始前给我们作一点扼要的介绍。

examples.english: The drummer gave a four-bar intro before the other musicians joined in.
examples.chinese: 鼓手打了一个四小节引子，然后其他的乐手才开始加入。

examples.english: In the introduction to her fascinating book, O'Brien explains how she first became interested in music.
examples.chinese: 奥布赖恩在她那本有趣的书的引言里介绍了她最早是如何开始对音乐感兴趣的。

examples.english: There's a big difference between the document's lengthy preamble and the actual content.
examples.chinese: 该文件的长篇序文与其实际内容有很大出入。

examples.english: The brief prologue sets the scene for what is to follow.
examples.chinese: 这段简短的序言叙述了故事的背景。

examples.english: In his prologue to ‘Faust’, Goethe said some very interesting things about art.
examples.chinese: 歌德在《浮士德》的序篇中对艺术作了一些很有意思的论述。

examples.english: This edition contains a new preface by the author.
examples.chinese: 这个版本中有作者新写的一篇序。

examples.english: Murray agreed to write the preface to Baker's book, as a favor to his old friend.
examples.chinese: 默里同意为贝克的书写篇序，作为给老朋友的帮忙。

centers.english: to come from a particular country, town etc
centers.chinese: 来自某个国家、某个城镇等

expressions.gram: transitive phrasal verb not in progressive/verb phrase not in progressive

examples.english: She comes from Japan.
examples.chinese: 她来自日本。！

examples.english: Where are you from?
examples.chinese: 你是哪里人?

examples.english: My wife's parents and my parents come from the same town.
examples.chinese: 我岳父母和父母都来自同一个城市。

expressions.text: be a native of Tokyo/London/Wales etc

examples.english: Hughes, who is a native of Belfast, often uses the city as a setting for his novels.
examples.chinese: 休斯是贝尔法斯特人，他经常以这座城市做他小说的背景。

examples.english: DeParle is a native of Rockwood, Tennessee.
examples.chinese: 德帕尔是田纳西州罗克伍德人。

examples.english: She's lived in Australia for a long time, but she's Welsh by birth.
examples.chinese: 她在澳大利亚住了很长时间，但她在威尔士出生。

examples.english: They're Russian by birth but they've lived in America for so long that they feel little attachment to their homeland.
examples.chinese: 他们是俄罗斯人，但已经在美国住了很长时间，对故乡的感情很淡了。

examples.english: There are roughly 40 million Americans of Irish ancestry.
examples.chinese: 大约有4,000万美国人有爱尔兰血统。

examples.english: Her fine features suggested she was of Arabic or Indian ancestry.
examples.chinese: 从她标致的五官看来，她可能有阿拉伯或印度血统。

centers.english: the place you come from

examples.english: I haven't been back to my home town since my mother died.
examples.chinese: 自从母亲去世后，我再也没有回过家乡。

examples.english: She hated her home town so much she would never admit where she was from.
examples.chinese: 她很不喜欢自己的故乡，从不会承认她是那里人。

examples.english: We visited the birthplace of Lenin in Ulyanovsk.
examples.chinese: 我们参观了列宁的出生地乌里扬诺夫斯克。

examples.english: Muslims are expected to make at least one pilgrimage to Mecca, Muhammad's birthplace.
examples.chinese: 穆斯林应该去穆罕默德的出生地麦加朝圣至少一次。

examples.english: Forms usually ask you your name, address, nationality and place of birth.
examples.chinese: 填写表格时通常要填上你的姓名、地址、国籍和出生地。

examples.english: She hoped that one day she would return to her place of birth.
examples.chinese: 她希望有一天能回到自己的出生地。

examples.english: It took us about ten years to think of Atlanta as home.
examples.chinese: 我们用了大约十年时间才把亚特兰大看作是自己的家乡。

examples.english: Her home, she said, was in Southern China, but she hadn't been there since she was a child.
examples.chinese: 她说她的家乡在中国南部，但她只是小时候在那儿生活过。

centers.english: to come from a particular family or social group
centers.chinese: 出身于某家庭或社会阶层

expressions.gram: transitive phrasal verb not in progressive/verb phrase not in progressive

examples.english: Most of the people here come from very poor families.
examples.chinese: 这儿的大多数人出身于非常贫困的家庭。

examples.english: She comes from a family of seven kids.
examples.chinese: 她来自一个有七个孩子的家庭。

examples.english: He's from a very upper class background.
examples.chinese: 他的出身非常高贵。

examples.english: She always claimed her family was descended from the ancient Kings of Egypt.
examples.chinese: 她一直声称她们家族是古埃及王室的后裔。

examples.english: The Japanese are thought to be descended from tribes from the north of China.
examples.chinese: 人们认为日本人是中国北方部落的后裔。

examples.english: How quickly kids learn to read will often depend on both their ability and their backgrounds.
examples.chinese: 小孩学会阅读的速度有多快常常取决于他们的能力及家庭背景。

examples.english: Sylvie had always expected that she would marry someone of a similar background to herself.
examples.chinese: 西尔维一直期望自己能嫁给一个门当户对的人。

examples.english: Gary always tried to hide his working class background.
examples.chinese: 加里一直试图隐瞒自己工人阶级的出身背景。

examples.english: Miller questioned her closely, about her present job, her family and her origins.
examples.chinese: 米勒详细地询问了她现在的职业、家庭状况和出身背景。

examples.english: Politicians love to talk about their humble origins because they think it will make them popular with voters.
examples.chinese: 政治家总爱提及他们的卑微出身，因为他们认为这样可以让他们受选民欢迎。

examples.english: Rizzo was a man who never forgot his roots.
examples.chinese: 里佐是个永远没忘自己根的人。

examples.english: Beth went to Israel in search of her roots.
examples.chinese: 贝丝去以色列寻根。

centers.english: to be grown or made in a particular place
centers.chinese: 在某个地方生长或制造

expressions.gram: transitive phrasal verb not in progressive/verb phrase not in progressive

examples.english: Try this bread -- it comes from the bakery on Central Avenue.
examples.chinese: 尝尝这种面包—它是中央大街那家面包房做的。

examples.english: U.S. officials say some 60 percent of the heroin on the streets comes from Myanmar.
examples.chinese: 美国官员称，街头售卖的海洛因约60%来自缅甸。

examples.english: All the medical equipment here is from France.
examples.chinese: 这里所有的医疗器械都是法国生产的。

examples.english: These shoes were made in Italy.
examples.chinese: 这双鞋子是意大利生产的。

examples.english: About 57 percent of the cars and trucks sold in Colombia are made in Colombia.
examples.chinese: 在哥伦比亚销售的汽车和卡车中，大约57%是在哥伦比亚生产的。

examples.english: The label on the bottle said the wine was made in Germany.
examples.chinese: 瓶子标签上写着该酒产自德国。

centers.english: when a sound, smell etc comes from somewhere

expressions.gram: transitive phrasal verb not in passive

examples.english: The wind was coming from the west.
examples.chinese: 风从西方吹来。

examples.english: Coming from outside in the street was the sound of children playing.
examples.chinese: 外面街道上传来孩子们玩耍的声音。

examples.english: There was an awful smell coming from under the sink.
examples.chinese: 洗涤槽下面发出一股恶臭。

expressions.gram: transitive phrasal verb not in passive

examples.english: Smoke emanated from the kitchen window.
examples.chinese: 烟从厨房的窗口飘出来。

examples.english: The President argued that accusations emanating from Congress were not accurate.
examples.chinese: 总统辩称国会的指责不确切。

examples.english: Just as the audience grew quiet, the unmistakable ring of a cellular phone emanated from the last row of the theater.
examples.chinese: 观众刚静下来，明显的手机铃声便从剧院最后一排响起。

examples.english: In the case of an electric shock, turn the power off at its source.
examples.chinese: 如发生触电，要切断电源。

examples.english: The sound came from an unknown source, far away in the distance.
examples.chinese: 这声音从远处某个地方传来。

examples.english: The tank's losing water, but we can't find the source of the leak.
examples.chinese: 水箱在漏水，但是我们找不出是哪里漏。

centers.english: to have developed from something

expressions.gram: transitive phrasal verb not in progressive or passive

examples.english: My idea for the film came from an article I read about West Virginia coal miners.
examples.chinese: 对于这部影片，我的灵感来自读过的一篇描写西弗吉尼亚煤矿工人的文章。

examples.english: The name ‘terrier’ comes from the Latin word ‘terra’ meaning the earth.
examples.chinese: terrier一词来自拉丁语terra，意为地球。

examples.english: The film is based on a popular Bengali novel.
examples.chinese: 这部影片根据一本孟加拉畅销小说改编而成。

examples.english: Overtime pay will be based on the number of hours you work each week.
examples.chinese: 加班工资根据每周工作小时数而定。

examples.english: Your test questions will be based on the work you have done in the past year.
examples.chinese: 测验题目将以你们在过去一年中做的作业为基础。

examples.english: How did the tradition of wearing costumes on Hallowe'en originate?
examples.chinese: 万圣节化装的习俗是怎么来的?

examples.english: Welfare is a program that originated in the 1930s to help widows.
examples.chinese: 福利救济源自20世纪30年代帮助寡妇的一项计划。

examples.english: Buddhism originated in India and came to China in the first century A.D.
examples.chinese: 佛教源于印度，公元1世纪传入中国。

expressions.gram: transitive phrasal verb not in progressive or passive

examples.english: Many phrases in the language go back to early religious writings.
examples.chinese: 这种语言中的许多短语可追溯至早期的宗教文献。

examples.english: Our friendship goes back to our freshman year in college.
examples.chinese: 我们的友谊要追溯到上大学一年级的时候。

examples.english: Jo just refuses to get into a car -- it all goes back to when she had that accident.
examples.chinese: 乔就是拒绝乘车——她出了那场车祸后就一直这样。

examples.english: Modern medicine often has its origins in ancient ways of doing things.
examples.chinese: 现代医学的许多做法都来源于古代。

examples.english: Vaudeville had its origins in French street culture.
examples.chinese: 歌舞杂耍源自法国的街头文化。

examples.english: Many music historians believe that jazz has its roots in blues music.
examples.chinese: 许多音乐史学家认为爵士乐从布鲁斯音乐发展而来。

examples.english: Economic policy in the US has its roots in the free market system.
examples.chinese: 美国的经济政策是从自由市场体制发展而来的。

expressions.gram: verb phrase not in progressive/verb phrase

examples.english: Much of the English language is derived from Latin and Greek.
examples.chinese: 英语很大部分来源于拉丁语和希腊语。

examples.english: About a quarter of the drugs in prescription medicines today are derived from plants.
examples.chinese: 现在的处方药中，有四分之一左右是从植物中提取的。

examples.english: The constitution in this country is not written. It's founded on tradition and precedent.
examples.chinese: 这个国家的宪法不是成文的，而是以传统和判例为基础。

examples.english: White resistance to Civil Rights was founded on age-old fears of democracy.
examples.chinese: 白人对公民权的抵制来源于他们多年来对民主的恐惧。

expressions.gram: transitive verb not in progressive or passive

examples.english: Socialist ideals grew out of an earlier idea that all men are created equal.
examples.chinese: 社会主义理想是从一项早期主张，即人人生来平等发展起来的。

examples.english: The skill of writing grew out of a wish to put speech into a permanent form.
examples.chinese: 书写技术来源于赋予语言以永久形式的愿望。

examples.english: The whole basis of her novel evolved from a chance meeting she had with an old friend.
examples.chinese: 她小说的基础完全来源于她和一个旧友的偶遇。

examples.english: Within years, the site developed from an area of waste ground into a thriving farm.
examples.chinese: 几年来，这里从一块荒地发展成了一个兴旺的农场。

centers.english: the place, situation etc that something comes from
centers.chinese: 作为某事物的来源或发展起点的地方、情况等

examples.english: The rumour is now so widespread, it's difficult to be certain of its origin.
examples.chinese: 谣言现在已传得人尽皆知，很难弄清楚是从哪里传出来的。

examples.english: Astronomers hope new instruments will give them further clues to the origins of the universe.
examples.chinese: 天文学家希望新的仪器会为他们提供更多有关宇宙起源的线索。

examples.english: a book that tries to explain the origin of words and phrases
examples.chinese: 一本旨在解释词汇与短语起源的书

examples.english: They get their money from various sources.
examples.chinese: 他们有多种收入来源。

examples.english: Beans and lentils are a very good source of protein.
examples.chinese: 豆子和扁豆是非常好的蛋白质来源。

examples.english: Most Americans rely on television as their chief source of information.
examples.chinese: 大多数美国人以电视为主要的消息来源。

examples.english: Ancient Athens is generally thought of as the cradle of democracy.
examples.chinese: 古代雅典通常被认为是民主的摇篮。

examples.english: Baghdad, the cradle of civilization
examples.chinese: 巴格达，文明的摇篮

examples.english: New Orleans, the birthplace of jazz
examples.chinese: 新奥尔良，爵士乐的发源地

examples.english: Walden Pond has been called the birthplace of modern environmentalism.
examples.chinese: 瓦尔登湖被称作现代环境保护主义的发源地。

examples.english: Low taxation of the rich is the root of the economic problems in this country.
examples.chinese: 富人低税收是该国经济问题的根源。

examples.english: The love of money is said to be the root of all evil.
examples.chinese: 据说贪财是万恶之源。

centers.english: towards the front

examples.english: She leaned forward and whispered ‘I love you’ in his ear.
examples.chinese: 她往前靠去，在他耳边喃喃低语说“我爱你”。

examples.english: I pushed my way forwards to the front of the crowd in order to get a better view.
examples.chinese: 我一路推挤到人群前面以便看得更清楚些。

examples.english: Bill took two steps forward and shook Mark's hand.
examples.chinese: 比尔上前两步与马克握了手。

examples.english: Sit facing forward with your legs straight out in front of you.
examples.chinese: 面朝前坐好，双腿向前伸直。

examples.english: She had her back towards me, her head bent forwards over a book.
examples.chinese: 她背对着我，低下头看书。

examples.english: Frank's fair hair fell forward into his eyes in a very attractive way.
examples.chinese: 弗兰克的金发向前披下来，漂亮地盖住了他的眼睛。

examples.english: The doctor strode ahead to the end of the corridor, and waited there for the others to catch up.
examples.chinese: 医生大步走到走廊尽头，在那里等着其他人赶上来。

examples.english: He stuck his head out of the window but it was impossible to see ahead through the fog.
examples.chinese: 他把头伸出窗外，可在雾中不可能看到前方。

examples.english: Devraux stared straight ahead, without looking at his son.
examples.chinese: 德夫劳克斯直盯着前方，不看自己的儿子。

examples.english: He walked on without even stopping to say hello.
examples.chinese: 他连停下来打个招呼都没有，直往前走。

examples.english: Keep on in this direction for about 100 metres, and you'll see the bank on your left.
examples.chinese: 继续朝这个方向走约100米，就能看到银行在你左边。

examples.english: Go straight on to the end of this road, then turn left.
examples.chinese: 直走到这条路的尽头，然后左转。

examples.english: We wandered slowly onwards, pausing now and again to admire the view.
examples.chinese: 我们慢慢地信步向前走去，不时停下来看看风景。

examples.english: Traffic police stood at various points, waving the motorists onward.
examples.chinese: 交警站在许多地方，打着手势让司机往前开。

centers.english: to move forward

examples.english: The plane slowly advanced down the runway and then paused, ready for take-off.
examples.chinese: 飞机慢慢沿着跑道往前进，然后停下准备起飞。

examples.english: Villagers hid in the hills as the troops advanced.
examples.chinese: 军队前进时，村民们躲在山里。

examples.english: In early 1940 the army began to advance across France.
examples.chinese: 1940年年初，部队开始横贯法国推进。

examples.english: Could you guys at the front move up a bit?
examples.chinese: 前排的人能否往前移一下？

examples.english: The bank clerks seemed to be working really slowly as I moved up the line.
examples.chinese: 我在排队往前走时，各银行职员的动作似乎慢极了。

examples.english: Suddenly a car moved up alongside Joseph and the driver shouted something at him.
examples.chinese: 突然一辆汽车开到约瑟夫身旁，那司机朝着他吼了几句。

examples.english: The Rolls Royce slowly nosed through the crowds, and drew up outside the hotel.
examples.chinese: 这辆劳斯莱斯慢慢地驶过人群停在饭店外面。

examples.english: A ship was nosing its way through the small fishing boats in the harbour.
examples.chinese: 轮船小心翼翼地在港湾里的小渔船中穿行。

examples.english: The new barriers are designed to give way if spectators surge forward too violently.
examples.chinese: 这些新的障碍物被设计成当观众往前挤得厉害时能够被推倒。

examples.english: Demonstrators surged through the streets, demanding the President's resignation.
examples.chinese: 示威者从街道上蜂拥而过，要求总统辞职。

centers.english: not young

examples.english: She wanted to have a baby before she was too old.
examples.chinese: 她想趁年龄还不算太大时生个孩子。

examples.english: For the first time in my life, I feel old.
examples.chinese: 我有生以来第一次觉得自己老了。

examples.english: An old man was in the park feeding the pigeons.
examples.chinese: 一位老人在公园里喂鸽子。

examples.english: She shouldn't marry him - he's much too old for her.
examples.chinese: 她不能嫁给他—一他对她来说太老了。

examples.english: A group of elderly ladies sat drinking coffee in the cafeteria.
examples.chinese: 一群老太太坐在餐厅里喝咖啡。

examples.english: An elderly Englishwoman was seated next to me on the plane.
examples.chinese: 飞机上我的旁边坐着一位英国老太太。

examples.english: A few decades ago, the average cruise ship passenger was elderly, affluent, and retired. Not anymore.
examples.chinese: 几十年前，邮轮的乘客一般都是年长富裕的退休人士，现在不再如此了。

examples.english: The bar was fill with ageing hippies.
examples.chinese: 酒吧里全是上了年纪的嬉皮士。

examples.english: These days, most of the houses in the Hollywood Hills are owned by aging movie stars and rich businessmen.
examples.chinese: 如今好莱坞山的大多数房子都是那些上了年纪的影星和有钱的商人所拥有的。

examples.english: He's not just old, he's ancient.
examples.chinese: 他不只是老了，而且是个老古董了。

examples.english: Mum looks absolutely ancient in this picture.
examples.chinese: 这张照片中妈妈看上去简直就像个老古董。

examples.english: Cal is getting on a bit and doesn't play much golf anymore.
examples.chinese: 凯尔有点上年纪了，不再经常打高尔夫球了。

examples.english: Ethel's getting on in years now -- she must be in her late 60s.
examples.chinese: 埃塞尔现在老了一肯定快70了。

expressions.text: not be as young as you were

examples.english: We do go out sometimes, but not very often. I guess we're not as young as we used to be.
examples.chinese: 我们有时会出去，但不常出去。我想我们已不再年轻了。

examples.english: ‘I'm not as young as I once was,’ concedes the cigar-chomping, 48-year-old Mr. Tiant.
examples.chinese: “我已不如从前了。”48岁的泰恩特先生叼着雪茄承认道。

examples.english: Her face looked old and wrinkled in the morning light.
examples.chinese: 晨光下，她看上去很苍老，满脸皱纹。

examples.english: At the far end of the market, a wrinkled old woman sat smoking a pipe.
examples.chinese: 在市场的另一头，一位满脸皱纹的老太太坐在那儿抽烟斗。

examples.english: He barely recognized her wizened face and haggard features.
examples.chinese: 他几乎认不出她那形容憔悴、满是皱纹的脸了。

examples.english: The door was opened by a wizened old man clutching a walking stick.
examples.chinese: 一位手拄拐杖的干瘪老汉把门打开。

examples.english: The condition predominantly affects middle-aged or elderly females.
examples.chinese: 这种疾病主要见于中老年妇女。

examples.english: a middle-aged businessman
examples.chinese: 中年商人

centers.english: older than someone else

examples.english: I have one older brother and two younger brothers.
examples.chinese: 我有一个哥哥、两个弟弟。

examples.english: People say that older people need less sleep.
examples.chinese: 人们说年纪大的人需要的睡眠较少。

examples.english: Donna's husband's a lot older than she is.
examples.chinese: 唐娜的丈夫比她大很多。

examples.english: Wright's elder sister is also an actor.
examples.chinese: 赖特的姐姐也是一名演员。

examples.english: John's elder brother died in a boating accident.
examples.chinese: 约翰的哥哥死于一宗划船意外。

examples.english: I shared a bedroom with my eldest sister.
examples.chinese: 我和大姐睡一个房间。

examples.english: Their eldest son, Howard, is an administrator at Castle Park High School.
examples.chinese: 他们的大儿子霍华德是城堡公园中学的一名行政人员。

examples.english: Rosie was the eldest of our four daughters.
examples.chinese: 我四个女儿中，罗茜是老大。

examples.english: Did you know that the oldest woman in America is 110 years old?
examples.chinese: 你知道吗？美国年纪最大的女士有110岁了。

examples.english: Tonya, our oldest daughter, got married in April.
examples.chinese: 我们的大女儿托尼娅在4月份结婚了。

examples.english: Respect your elders.
examples.chinese: 要尊敬长辈。

examples.english: You shouldn't talk to your elders like that!
examples.chinese: 你不应该对长辈那样说话！

centers.english: too old to do something

examples.english: Talbot's past it -- he should have given up playing basketball long ago.
examples.chinese: 塔尔博特年纪太大—他早就该放弃打篮球了。

examples.english: I'm starting to think I'm past it -- I'm not nearly as quick as I used to be.
examples.chinese: 我开始觉得自己年老不中用了一我不如以往灵活了。

examples.english: By that time, many in government viewed De Gaulle as over the hill.
examples.chinese: 那个时候，政府里有许多人认为戴高乐已经老而无用了。

examples.english: According to the survey, many employers regard staff over the age of 45 as over the hill.
examples.chinese: 根据这次调查，许多雇主认为45岁以上的员工已老了不中用了。

expressions.text: be a bit long in the tooth/be a little long in the tooth

examples.english: A lot of the top English players are getting a bit long in the tooth.
examples.chinese: 英国许多顶级球员年纪都已太大了一些。

centers.english: to become or start to look old

examples.english: Aunt Bertha's getting old now, and she needs someone to take care of her.
examples.chinese: 伯莎姨妈现在年纪越来越大，需要有人照顾。

examples.english: She wanted to grow old gracefully, and retire to a cottage in the country.
examples.chinese: 她想优雅地老去，躲到一个乡村小屋里安度晚年。

examples.english: I couldn't believe how much she had aged.
examples.chinese: 我不敢相信她老了那么多。

examples.english: She noticed for the first time how Frederick had aged.
examples.chinese: 她第一次发现弗雷德里克老了很多。

examples.english: Western men tend to age more quickly than Japanese men.
examples.chinese: 西方男性一般比日本男性衰老得快。

examples.english: Our society is full of negative attitudes towards ageing and old people.
examples.chinese: 我们的社会对老年问题和老年人都充满负面的态度。

examples.english: Some memory loss is a normal part of the aging process.
examples.chinese: 衰老过程中失去部分记忆是正常现象。

examples.english: His hair was white and he showed other signs of premature ageing.
examples.chinese: 他头发白了，还有别的早衰现象。

examples.english: She's still very beautiful, but she's starting to show her age now.
examples.chinese: 她仍旧很漂亮，但已经开始显老了。

examples.english: This is probably showing my age, but I remember when popcorn cost 25 cents and came in those little white paper bags.
examples.chinese: 这么说也许会使我显得很老，但我记得那个时候爆米花25美分一包，用那种白色的小纸袋包装。

centers.english: an old person

examples.english: The old lady was rather deaf.
examples.chinese: 那老太太耳朵很背。

examples.english: When the militia was called up, old men and boys were drafted as well.
examples.chinese: 召集民兵的时候，老老少少的男人都被征入伍。

examples.english: Charles wondered if he was becoming a dirty old man.
examples.chinese: 查尔斯怀疑自己是不是变成一个老色鬼了。

examples.english: My grandfather was an old-fashioned, bigoted, grumpy old man.
examples.chinese: 我祖父是个守旧、偏执、满腹牢骚的老人。

examples.english: The old and the sick were the first to be evacuated.
examples.chinese: 老人和病人最早被疏散。

examples.english: Right now, only 6 percent of the elderly in the United States receive public assistance.
examples.chinese: 目前，美国只有6%的老人得到政府援助。

examples.english: The programs have been highly successful at reducing poverty rates among the elderly.
examples.chinese: 这些计划非常奏效，大大降低了老年人的贫困率。

examples.english: Admission prices are £6 for adults, £5 for senior citizens and £3 for children.
examples.chinese: 入场费成人六英镑，老年人五英镑，儿童三英镑。

examples.english: Many seniors have very active lives.
examples.chinese: 许多老年人生活非常活跃。

examples.english: Many pensioners cannot afford to heat their homes in winter.
examples.chinese: 许多领养老金的人冬天时家里用不起暖气。

examples.english: Old age pensioners can travel free on the buses.
examples.chinese: 领养老金的人可免费乘坐公共汽车。

examples.english: The company specializes in holidays for retired people.
examples.chinese: 这家公司专门为退休人士安排度假。

examples.english: Our neighbours were an old retired couple.
examples.chinese: 我们的邻居是一对退休的老夫妇。

examples.english: Among those attending was a retired federal judge from Philadelphia named Bennett Mayall.
examples.chinese: 出席的还有一位从费城来的退休联邦法官，名叫贝内特·梅奥尔。

examples.english: Florida is the perfect place for retirees.
examples.chinese: 佛罗里达是退休人士的理想居住地。

examples.english: What can I do for you, old timer?
examples.chinese: 要我帮忙吗，老家伙?

examples.english: The three-day event is a chance for old timers to get together and swap war stories.
examples.chinese: 这三天的活动是老人家聚在一起讲述各自的战争经历的好机会。

centers.english: relating to old people

examples.english: Geriatric hospitals are often severely under-staffed.
examples.chinese: 老年医院里经常出现严重的人手不足问题。

examples.english: The clinic specializes in geriatric medicine.
examples.chinese: 这家诊所专门治疗老年病。

examples.english: the grey power movement in Britain
examples.chinese: 英国的老人权力运动

examples.english: Conservatives have started to realize that they cannot take the grey vote for granted.
examples.chinese: 保守党开始认识到，不能想当然地认为能得到老年群体的选票。

centers.english: the time when someone is old

examples.english: She's a little forgetful, but that comes with old age.
examples.chinese: 她有点健忘，但那是年纪大了的缘故。

examples.english: the problems of old age
examples.chinese: 老年问题

examples.english: By now, both were in extreme old age.
examples.chinese: 如今，他们俩都已是风烛残年。

examples.english: Thurmond is as mean in his dotage as he was in his younger days.
examples.chinese: 到了晚年，瑟蒙德的吝啬也不减当年。

centers.english: not new

examples.english: Sue was wearing jeans and an old blue jacket.
examples.chinese: 休穿着牛仔裤和一件蓝色的旧夹克。

examples.english: What she loved most about the old house was its privacy and spaciousness.
examples.chinese: 这老房子她最喜欢的地方是有私密性，而且非常宽敞。

examples.english: The Luna Baglioni is one of the oldest hotels in Venice.
examples.chinese: 巴利奥尼月亮酒店是威尼斯最古老的酒店之一。

examples.english: Rome is famous for its ancient monuments.
examples.chinese: 罗马以古迹闻名。

examples.english: an ancient Greek vase
examples.chinese: 古希腊花瓶

examples.english: the pyramids of ancient Egypt
examples.chinese: 古埃及金字塔

examples.english: The ancient Chinese believed that we are born with a finite amount of energy in our bodies called chi.
examples.chinese: 中国古人认为人与生俱来有一股有限的能力，称做“气”。

examples.english: The vine is an age-old symbol of peace and prosperity.
examples.chinese: 葡萄藤是个由来已久的象征和平与繁荣的标志。

examples.english: man's age-old fear of snakes
examples.chinese: 人对蛇自古已有的恐惧

examples.english: This refrigerator is ancient -- it's time we bought a new one.
examples.chinese: 这冰箱是个老古董—我们该买台新的了。

examples.english: Doc drives an ancient Ford convertible.
examples.chinese: 多克开一辆很旧的福特敞篷汽车。

examples.english: ‘I like your sweater.’ ‘Oh, thanks. It's years old -- I've had it since I was a teenager.’
examples.chinese: “我喜欢你这件毛衣。”“噢，谢谢你。这件毛衣好多年了—我十几岁的时候就开始穿它。”

expressions.text: be as old as the hills

examples.english: That story is as old as the hills!
examples.chinese: 那故事老掉牙了！

centers.english: when something has been used before

examples.english: My parents are giving us their old sofa.
examples.chinese: 我父母要把他们的旧沙发送给我们。

examples.english: Do you have any old magazines the kids can cut up?
examples.chinese: 你有没有什么旧的杂志让孩子剪剪？

examples.english: I was the youngest one in the family, so I had to wear my sisters’ old clothes.
examples.chinese: 我是家里最小的孩子，所以不得不穿姐姐们的旧衣服。

examples.english: Max spent the whole afternoon looking around a second-hand book store.
examples.chinese: 马克斯整个下午都在逛一家旧书店。

examples.english: Do you know where I can buy a second-hand bicycle?
examples.chinese: 你知道哪里可以买二手的自行车吗？

examples.english: second-hand clothing
examples.chinese: 二手衣服

examples.english: ‘Is that table new?’ ‘No, we got it second-hand.’
examples.chinese: “那张桌子是新的吗？”“不是，我们是买二手的。”

examples.english: He made his money buying and selling used cars.
examples.chinese: 他靠买卖旧车赚钱。

examples.english: This huge Portland bookshop is crammed with more than 1 million new and used books organized into 122 subject areas.
examples.chinese: 波特兰的这家大型书店塞得满满当当，共有新旧书籍一百多万册，分成122个主题区。

centers.english: old and valuable

examples.english: a lovely antique desk
examples.chinese: 漂亮的古董几案

examples.english: Jacobs collects antique fountain pens.
examples.chinese: 雅各布斯收藏古董钢笔。

examples.english: ‘A lot of people have never been in an open car,’ says Mike Jacobsen, a computer programmer, who has four vintage convertibles.
examples.chinese: “许多人从未坐过敞篷汽车。”迈克·雅各布森说道。迈克是一名电脑程序员，拥有四辆老式的敞篷汽车。

examples.english: They lunched on lobster and strawberries, accompanied by a fine vintage champagne.
examples.chinese: 他们午饭吃了龙虾和草莓，佐餐的是上品陈年香槟。

examples.english: The house is full of valuable antiques.
examples.chinese: 屋子里摆满了珍贵的古董。

examples.english: While some of the people attending were looking to decorate their own houses, most appeared to be antique dealers.
examples.chinese: 出席的人当中有部分是因为要装饰自己的居室，而大部分人似乎都是做古董交易的。

centers.english: clothes/styles/words

examples.english: I don't wear that skirt now - it looks so old-fashioned.
examples.chinese: 我现在不穿那条裙子了—看上去太过时了。

examples.english: ‘Wireless’ is an old-fashioned word for radio.
examples.chinese: wireless〔无线电〕是radio〔收音机〕的旧称。

examples.english: Albert was a tall, gangling man with long blond hair, like an old-fashioned rock star's.
examples.chinese: 艾伯特是个笨手笨脚、又高又瘦的人，留着金色长发，就像一个老派的摇滚歌星。

examples.english: Just look at the hairstyles in this photo -- they're so dated!
examples.chinese: 就看这照片上的发型—太过时了！

examples.english: The song was a big hit last year, but it's already starting to sound dated.
examples.chinese: 这首歌去年还非常流行，但现在听起来已经开始有点过时了。

examples.english: It was said that coal was on the way out and would be replaced by nuclear energy.
examples.chinese: 大家都说，煤逐渐被淘汰，将由核能取而代之。

examples.english: When I was in highschool disco was already on the way out.
examples.chinese: 我上高中的时候，迪斯科已经开始过时了。

centers.english: machines/equipment

examples.english: He rides one of those old-fashioned bikes with high handlebars.
examples.chinese: 他骑的是那种老式的自行车，车把手很高。

examples.english: A lot of the machines at the factory are very old-fashioned.
examples.chinese: 工厂里的许多机器都很过时了。

examples.english: Old-fashioned ceiling fans have been making a comeback as a cheap and reliable alternative to air conditioning.
examples.chinese: 老式的吊扇又流行了起来，它价钱廉宜、性能可靠，是空调之外的另一种选择。

examples.english: It is hard to run a business with outdated equipment.
examples.chinese: 设备陈旧的公司很难经营。

examples.english: a rebel army, equipped only with outdated Russian weapons
examples.chinese: 只配备了陈旧的俄制武器的一支叛军

examples.english: The old 5¼ inch floppy disks are now obsolete.
examples.chinese: 51/4英寸的老式软盘现在已被淘汰了。

examples.english: a new type of ‘Network Computer’, which could make existing PCs obsolete within five years
examples.chinese: 一种新的“网络电脑”，它可使现时的个人电脑在五年之内被淘汰

examples.english: My mother's antiquated vacuum cleaner still works, believe it or not.
examples.chinese: 信不信由你，我母亲那台老掉牙的吸尘器居然还能用。

examples.english: Hospitals suffer from inadequate facilities, antiquated equipment and shortages of medical supplies.
examples.chinese: 医院面临的问题是设施不足、设备陈旧、医疗物资短缺。

centers.english: opinions/methods/systems

examples.english: In those days, people believed that divorce was morally wrong, but this now seems very old-fashioned.
examples.chinese: 那个时候，人们认为离婚是有违道德的，但现在这种想法似乎很过时了。

examples.english: He has some very old-fashioned ideas about women.
examples.chinese: 他在女性问题上，有些思想非常守旧。

examples.english: Outdated laws and regulations are failing to keep crime on the Internet in check.
examples.chinese: 陈旧的法律法规不能制止网络犯罪。

examples.english: Outdated textbooks, decrepit buildings, overcrowded classrooms - the list of problems is long and growing.
examples.chinese: 教科书过时、教学楼破旧、教室拥挤——问题源源不断。

examples.english: The image of the civil service as a male, middle class bastion is now outdated.
examples.chinese: 政府部门是中产阶级男性的堡垒，这种形象现在已不合时宜了。

examples.english: The views of many of the senior professors reflect outmoded concepts and ideas.
examples.chinese: 许多资深教授的观点反映了陈腐的思想观念。

examples.english: The government's outmoded attitudes are dragging the whole country back into the nineteenth century.
examples.chinese: 政府落后的思想正在把整个国家拖回到19世纪去。

examples.english: The local people still use traditional farming methods which have been used for hundreds of years.
examples.chinese: 当地人仍在使用已经沿用了几百年的传统耕种方法。

examples.english: the traditional idea that a woman's place is in the home
examples.chinese: 女主内的传统思想

examples.english: Tom went to a very traditional boys’ school.
examples.chinese: 汤姆上的是一所非常传统的男子学校。

examples.english: Smoking has become very unfashionable in the last ten years.
examples.chinese: 在过去的十年里吸烟已不再流行。

expressions.text: it is unfashionable to do something

examples.english: It's unfashionable these days to say you want to get married and give up your job, isn't it?
examples.chinese: 现在说你想结婚而放弃工作，过时了吧？

centers.english: books/information

examples.english: The map we had with us was completely out of date.
examples.chinese: 我们带的地图完全过时了。

examples.english: an out-of-date guidebook
examples.chinese: 一本过时的旅行指南

centers.english: places

examples.english: In many ways the village is a very old-fashioned sort of place.
examples.chinese: 这个村子在很多方面是个很老派的地方。

examples.english: Cromer is a charmingly old-fashioned resort that has changed little over the years.
examples.chinese: 克罗默是个古雅的度假胜地，多年来几乎没有什么改变。

examples.english: I like your kitchen - it's very olde worlde.
examples.chinese: 我喜欢你的厨房，非常古色古香。

examples.english: a picturesque village with an ancient church, and plenty of olde worlde tea rooms
examples.chinese: 一座风景如画的村子，有一座古老的教堂和许多古雅的茶室

examples.english: That restaurant is still stuck in some kind of late-seventies time-warp.
examples.chinese: 那家饭店仍然有点70年代末的风格。

examples.english: The country had little contact with the outside world, and remained caught in something of a time-warp.
examples.chinese: 这个国家很少与外界接触，仍然停留在过去的某个时代。

centers.english: people

examples.english: Mr Griffiths is a real old-fashioned teacher who still believes that learning lessons by heart is the best method.
examples.chinese: 格利菲斯先生是一位非常老派的教师，仍然认为背诵课文是最好的方法。

examples.english: My Dad was very old-fashioned and didn't approve of me going to nightclubs with my friends.
examples.chinese: 我爸爸思想非常守旧，不赞成我和朋友上夜总会。

examples.english: You've got to get over it, honey - you've got to stop living in the past.
examples.chinese: 你得想开一点，亲爱的—你不能老生活在过去呀。

examples.english: Critics say Buchanan is living in the past, and remind him that the 1950s was a time when women were shackled to the kitchen, and African-Americans held back by discrimination.
examples.chinese: 批评者说布坎南老是生活在过去，并提醒他说，在20世纪50年代那个时候，妇女被困在厨房里，非裔美国人则因种族歧视受到了羁绊。

examples.english: People in these parts tend to be way behind the times when it comes to issues such as women's rights.
examples.chinese: 在妇女权利等问题上，这些地方的人都是远远落后于时代。

examples.english: Once the giants of British retailing, they are now seen as being behind the times.
examples.chinese: 这些曾经是英国零售业巨头的商家，现在被视为落后于时代了。

examples.english: My aunt's very straitlaced - she'd be shocked if you mentioned sex.
examples.chinese: 我姨妈非常古板，如果你提起性方面的事，她会很震惊。

examples.english: They lost touch with Hermine after she married a very straightlaced Lutheran minister, and disappeared from the social scene.
examples.chinese: 赫米奥娜嫁给一位非常古板的路德派牧师之后，就从社交圈里消失了，他们就和她失去了联系。

examples.english: Don't be such a fuddy duddy!
examples.chinese: 别那么保守！

examples.english: The election broadcast made the President look like a fuddy duddy with ridiculously old-fashioned ideas.
examples.chinese: 转播竞选的节目把总统弄得像个思想保守得可笑的老古董。

examples.english: She has some rather fuddy-duddy ideas about what is proper music.
examples.chinese: 对于什么是真正的音乐，她的想法相当守旧。

examples.english: The old fogies all sit together and talk about the old days.
examples.chinese: 这些老家伙全都坐在一起聊着过去。

examples.english: This country is being run by a bunch of old fogies -- we need some fresh blood, people with initiative.
examples.chinese: 治理这个国家的是一帮老家伙—我们需要一些新鲜血液，需要具有创新精神的人。

examples.english: Inevitably, the revolution is affecting the old guard much more than the rest of us.
examples.chinese: 革命对那些保守派的影响，必然比对我们要大得多。

examples.english: The party's old guard have their own candidate for leader.
examples.chinese: 党内的保守派有自己的领导人选。

examples.english: I'm something of a traditionalist myself, I'd much rather use pen and paper than a word-processor.
examples.chinese: 我自己是那种传统的人，我宁愿用钢笔和纸，也不用文字处理器。

examples.english: There are still many traditionalists in the church who strongly oppose the idea of women priests.
examples.chinese: 教会里仍有许多保守的人，他们强烈反对妇女当牧师。

centers.english: extremely old-fashioned

examples.english: The plumbing in this house is medieval!
examples.chinese: 这屋子的水管太陈旧了！

examples.english: This so-called accounting system is positively medieval.
examples.chinese: 这种所谓的财务制度实在是非常落后。

examples.english: Their washing machine looks like it came out of the ark.
examples.chinese: 他们的洗衣机简直像件老古董。

examples.english: Her views on social policy are embarrassing -- really out of the ark.
examples.chinese: 她在社会政策方面的观点很让人难堪—非常过时。

examples.english: The Health Service has become a dinosaur. It needs radical reform if it is to survive.
examples.chinese: 规模庞大的社会医疗卫生服务已过时了，若要继续存在下去就需要进行彻底的变革。

examples.english: The line-up includes a number of rock-n-roll dinosaurs who should have hung up their guitars long ago.
examples.chinese: 参加演出的还有几个早该放下吉他退出舞台的过气摇滚乐团。

examples.english: The harvest festival celebrations in the town are an anachronism since almost everyone who lives there nowadays works in an office.
examples.chinese: 镇上的庆丰节活动已不合时宜了，因为现在几乎所有人都在办公室工作。

examples.english: Many people believe that the role of the Royal Family in Britain is anachronistic.
examples.chinese: 许多人都认为英国皇室的角色已经不合时宜了。

examples.english: The text was full of archaic spellings.
examples.chinese: 文章中所用的都是旧式的拼写法。

examples.english: The laws that decide who owns items discovered on an archeological exploration are ridiculously archaic.
examples.chinese: 判定考古发现的物品所有权归属的法例已经非常陈旧了。

examples.english: They were living in a Dickensian apartment block without proper heating or running water.
examples.chinese: 他们住在一个像狄更斯笔下所描绘的公寓里，没有正常的暖气和自来水供应。！

examples.english: The working conditions in the factory were positively Dickensian.
examples.chinese: 那家工厂的工作环境极其恶劣。

examples.english: Huge amounts of aid will be needed if this society is ever to drag itself out of the dark ages.
examples.chinese: 这个社会若要脱离落后的状态便需要大量的援助。

examples.english: My brother still doesn't like the idea of having a woman boss - he's stuck in the dark ages!
examples.chinese: 我哥哥还是不喜欢有女上司—一他的思想太落伍了！

centers.english: old-fashioned in a pleasant way

examples.english: The town has a lovely old-fashioned charm about it.
examples.chinese: 这小镇有一种古朴的韵味。

examples.english: He was a nice, old-fashioned gentleman who would hold open the door for you or offer to carry your bags.
examples.chinese: 他是一位友善的老派绅士，会给你开门或主动帮你拎袋子。

examples.english: good old-fashioned home cooking
examples.chinese: 美味老派的家常菜

examples.english: We stayed in a quaint little fishing village in Cornwall.
examples.chinese: 我们住在康沃尔一个古色古香的小渔村里。

examples.english: quaint country cottages
examples.chinese: 古雅的乡间别墅

examples.english: Stigler scoffed at the quaint idea of university as a place where a professor and a small group of students can sit in a study and discuss great thoughts.
examples.chinese: 有些人认为，大学是教授带着几名学生坐在书房里讨论伟大思想的地方。施蒂格勒对这种奇特的想法嗤之以鼻。

centers.english: recently made or produced

examples.english: They pulled down the movie theater and built a new health club on the site.
examples.chinese: 他们把电影院拆了，在原址建了一个新的健身会所。

examples.english: the new issue of ‘Time’ magazine
examples.chinese: 新一期的《时代周刊》

examples.english: Porsche's newest sports car will be unveiled at next week's Motor Show.
examples.chinese: 保时捷最新的跑车将在下周的车展上推出。

examples.english: Apparently there's going to be a brand new ‘James Bond’ movie out in the spring.
examples.chinese: 看来，今春会有一部全新的“詹姆斯·邦德”电影问世。

examples.english: By the time we'd finished painting the boat, it looked as good as new.
examples.chinese: 等到我们把船漆好了，船看上去就像新的一样。

examples.english: Have you seen Spielberg's latest movie?
examples.chinese: 你看过斯皮尔伯格最新的电影了吗？
