examples.english: the latest fashions from the Paris catwalks
examples.chinese: 来自巴黎时装界的最新时装

examples.english: REM's new album is just out.
examples.chinese: REM乐队的新专辑刚刚推出。

examples.english: The recent movie version of the book was not a big success.
examples.chinese: 这本书最近出的电影版不是很成功。

examples.english: There will be an exhibition of his most recent work at the Tate Gallery, starting this Saturday.
examples.chinese: 本周六起，泰特画廊将展出他最新的作品。

examples.english: A recent study of Open University graduates found that students aged 60 - 65 had better results than any other age group.
examples.chinese: 最近一次对开放大学毕业生所作的调查发现，年龄在60-65岁之间的学生成绩优于其他任何一个年龄群。

examples.english: People were queuing up for the new Harry Potter book to arrive - hot off the press.
examples.chinese: 人们排队等着《哈利·波特》新书上架—刚刚出版的。

centers.english: recently bought, or not used before
centers.chinese: 最近购买的，或以前没有使用过的

examples.english: New and second-hand books for sale.
examples.chinese: 新书和二手书均有出售。

examples.english: Do you like my new dress?
examples.chinese: 你喜欢我的新裙子吗？

examples.english: That's a nice jacket - is it new?
examples.chinese: 那件外套很不错—是新的吗?

examples.english: I'd like to get a video camera but I can't afford to buy one new.
examples.chinese: 我想买一台摄像机，但是我买不起新的。

examples.english: My brother's just bought a brand new BMW.
examples.chinese: 我弟弟刚买了一辆崭新的宝马。

examples.english: When did you buy this sofa? It looks completely brand new.
examples.chinese: 这沙发你是什么时候买的？看上去是全新的。

examples.english: You'll have to start again on a fresh sheet of paper.
examples.chinese: 你得用一张白纸重新写过。

examples.english: Please start each new question on a fresh page.
examples.chinese: 每个新的问题都请用新的一页写。

examples.english: The service at the hotel was amazing. We even had fresh towels every morning.
examples.chinese: 那酒店的服务真是好极了，我们甚至每天早上都有干净的毛巾使用。

examples.english: I'm just going to have a shower and put on some fresh clothes.
examples.chinese: 我这就去洗个澡，换上干净的衣服。

centers.english: food and drink that is new and still tastes good
centers.chinese: 新鲜的、味道仍然很好的食物和饮料

examples.english: Fresh fish tastes completely different to fish that has been frozen.
examples.chinese: 新鲜的鱼味道和冷冻的鱼截然不同。

examples.english: Do you think this meat smells fresh?
examples.chinese: 你觉得这肉味道新鲜吗？

examples.english: The restaurant claims that all the vegetables used in its recipes are picked fresh from the garden every day.
examples.chinese: 这家餐厅称，他们菜肴中所用的蔬菜，全是每天从菜园里新鲜采摘来的。

examples.english: freshly baked bread
examples.chinese: 新出炉的面包

examples.english: I'm not sure that these eggs are still okay.
examples.chinese: 我不知道这些蛋是否还能吃。

examples.english: The milk looked all right, but when I tasted it, it was horrible.
examples.chinese: 这牛奶看上去可以，可是我尝了一尝，味道非常糟糕。

examples.english: It's been kept in the refrigerator, so it should still be okay to eat.
examples.chinese: 这东西一直放在冰箱里，所以应该还可以吃。

centers.english: instead of the one that you had before
centers.chinese: 不是你以前所拥有的那个

examples.english: Don't forget to give me your new address.
examples.chinese: 不要忘了告诉我你的新地址。

examples.english: Have you met Keith's new girlfriend?
examples.chinese: 你见过基思的新女朋友了吗？

examples.english: After the divorce, she went off to Canada to start a new life.
examples.chinese: 离婚之后，她去了加拿大开始新的生活。

examples.english: After ten years with the same firm I decided it was time to look for another job.
examples.chinese: 在同一家公司工作了十年之后，我决定该换另一个工作了。

examples.english: If you don't like one doctor, you can ask to see another.
examples.chinese: 如果你不喜欢一个医生，可以要求换另一个。

examples.english: I'll have to replace my car soon - this one's done 130,000 miles.
examples.chinese: 不久我得换辆汽车了——这一辆已经开了130,000英里。

examples.english: The roof was in such bad condition that it needed to be completely replaced.
examples.chinese: 屋顶非常残破，需要全部换掉。

examples.english: They're replacing the old windows with modern ones.
examples.chinese: 他们正用新式的窗户替换旧窗户。

examples.english: Shall I make a fresh pot of coffee? This one's cold.
examples.chinese: 我重新沏壶咖啡好吗？这一壶凉了。

examples.english: It's surprising how a fresh coat of paint can improve the appearance of a room.
examples.chinese: 出人意料地，房间重新刷一层油漆看上去就大不一样了。

examples.english: The camp had almost run out of food when helicopters arrived with fresh supplies.
examples.chinese: 营里的食品差不多已经耗尽了，这时直升机运来了新鲜的补给。

centers.english: new ideas or ways of doing things

examples.english: Does anyone have any new ideas?
examples.chinese: 谁有新的想法吗？

examples.english: The hospital is doing a lot of research into new ways of treating asthma.
examples.chinese: 这家医院在进行大量的研究，寻找治疗哮喘的新方法。

examples.english: It's vital that we find new methods of producing and conserving energy.
examples.chinese: 我们必须找到新的方法生产和节约能源，这是很重要的。

examples.english: My job is to think up creative and original advertising ideas
examples.chinese: 我的工作是构想出有创意、独特的广告意念。

examples.english: Woolf's writing was completely original - nothing like it had ever been done before.
examples.chinese: 吴尔夫的作品完全是独创的一—是前所未有的。

examples.english: a jazz musician with a completely original style
examples.chinese: 有完全独创风格的爵士音乐家

examples.english: I was impressed by the highly original design of the house.
examples.chinese: 那房子非常独特的设计令我印象深刻。

examples.english: Einstein's revolutionary theories made people look at the universe in a completely new way.
examples.chinese: 爱因斯坦的革命性理论使人们用一种全新的方法来看宇宙。

examples.english: revolutionary technology for producing cheap, pollution-free energy
examples.chinese: 生产便宜的无污染能源的革新技术

examples.english: The new treatment for cancer is considered revolutionary.
examples.chinese: 这种治疗癌症的新方法被认为是具有革命性的。

examples.english: The city has introduced an innovative system of traffic control.
examples.chinese: 该城市引进了一套创新的交通管理体系。

examples.english: When it was first introduced, the electric car was described as one of the ten most innovative products of the year.
examples.chinese: 电动汽车刚刚推出的时候，被形容为当年最创新的十大产品之一。

examples.english: The idea for the programme ‘Big Brother’ was highly innovative.
examples.chinese: “老大哥”计划是一个很有革新精神的构思。

examples.english: The kids-only Internet service is a great innovation which will help parents control their children's access to the Internet.
examples.chinese: 儿童限入的互联网服务是一项伟大的新概念，可帮助家长限制儿童上网。

examples.english: All the latest technological innovations of cinema were used to create the special effects.
examples.chinese: 最近所有的电影技术革新都用来创造特别效果。

examples.english: What exactly will the impact of all these communication innovations be?
examples.chinese: 所有这些通讯上的革新，将具体产生哪些影响？

examples.english: We need a fresh approach to this problem.
examples.chinese: 我们需要一个新方法来解决这个问题。

examples.english: The negotiations won't make any progress unless one of the sides puts forward fresh proposals.
examples.chinese: 除非其中一方提出新的建议，否则谈判不会有任何进展。

examples.english: Toy manufacturers are always on the lookout for fresh ideas.
examples.chinese: 玩具制造商总是留意有什么新的点子。

examples.english: Scientists have come up with a novel way of catching fish.
examples.chinese: 科学家想出了一种新颖的捕鱼方法。

examples.english: Tonight's TV news will be presented in a novel format.
examples.chinese: 今晚的电视新闻将以一种新颖的形式播报。

examples.english: I spent six months living in a monastery in northern India, which was a novel experience.
examples.chinese: 我在印度北部的一个寺院里住了六个月，那是从未有过的一次经历。

examples.english: Retail analysts say that electronic shopping remains a novelty for most people
examples.chinese: 零售业分析人士称，电子购物在多数人眼中仍是新鲜事物。

expressions.text: it is a novelty for somebody to do something

examples.english: It was a novelty for people at college to see a student with two kids.
examples.chinese: 在大学里看到有两个孩子的学生是件新鲜事。

examples.english: Fast-food restaurants like McDonald's are still something of a novelty in Moscow.
examples.chinese: 像麦当劳一类的快餐店在莫斯科仍是新鲜事物。

examples.english: I was still enjoying the novelty of being married, and referring to Jenny as ‘my wife’.
examples.chinese: 我还在细味着新婚和称珍妮为“我太太”的新鲜感。

examples.english: I loved driving to work at first, but the novelty soon wore off.
examples.chinese: 我开始时喜欢开车去上班，但新鲜感很快就过去了。

examples.english: Moore's pioneering work on semiconductors has made him perhaps the most famous figure in Silicon Valley.
examples.chinese: 穆尔对半导体的开拓性工作使他成了硅谷可能最有名气的人物。

examples.english: Pioneering research shows that the experiences of childhood help form the brain's circuits for music and maths, language and emotion.
examples.chinese: 一些开创性研究发现，童年的经历帮助开发大脑中音乐和数学、语言和情感的区域。

examples.english: The science of cybernetics is still in its infancy.
examples.chinese: 控制论科学仍处于起步阶段。

examples.english: These rockets were built at a time when space technology was in its infancy.
examples.chinese: 这些火箭是在航天技术仍处于初级阶段的时候制造的。

centers.english: something that has just been discovered

examples.english: Scientists have found a new oilfield off the coast of Norway.
examples.chinese: 科学家在挪威海岸附近发现了一个新油田。

examples.english: Her lawyers have come up with new evidence that may prove her innocence.
examples.chinese: 她的律师找到了一些可以证明她无罪的新证据。

examples.english: Important new discoveries in the field of radiology may lead to a breakthrough in the treatment of cancer.
examples.chinese: 放射学领域的重要新发现可能会给癌症治疗带来突破。

examples.english: The newly discovered planets around distant stars are similar to Jupiter in size.
examples.chinese: 远处星球附近新发现的一些行星和木星差不多大小。

examples.english: Howard was working on the translation of a newly discovered novel by Jules Verne.
examples.chinese: 霍华德在翻译一本新近发现的儒勒·凡尔纳的小说。

examples.english: Newly discovered evidence showed that there had been a miscarriage of justice.
examples.chinese: 有新发现的证据表明存在着司法不公。

examples.english: Police say they are still hoping for fresh information about the missing girl.
examples.chinese: 警方说他们仍在盼望有失踪女孩的新消息。

examples.english: The judge told the court that the fresh evidence could be of considerable significance.
examples.chinese: 法官在法庭上说，这个新的证据可能有相当重大的意义。

centers.english: someone who has just started a new job, school etc
centers.chinese: 刚刚加入新工作、新学校等的人

examples.english: You're new here, aren't you?
examples.chinese: 你是新来的吧？

examples.english: All new employees are given training.
examples.chinese: 所有新来的雇员都要接受培训。

examples.english: Children who are new to the school may need extra help.
examples.chinese: 新入学的孩子可能需要特别的帮助。

examples.english: We don't expect you to work as fast as everyone else, while you're still new to the job.
examples.chinese: 你刚刚做这工作，我们不要求你干得和大家一样快。

examples.english: Our club membership is flourishing - we've had a huge number of new recruits this year.
examples.chinese: 我们的俱乐部很兴旺一今年招募了大量的新会员。

examples.english: The inhabitants of these remote mountain villages tend to be very suspicious of newcomers.
examples.chinese: 这些偏远山村的居民往往对外来的人疑心重重。

examples.english: Our team will include some familiar faces as well as a few newcomers.
examples.chinese: 我们的队里将有一些是熟悉的面孔，也有一些新来的人。

examples.english: Although she's a newcomer to the sport, she's already very successful.
examples.chinese: 虽然她在这项运动上是新手，但已经非常成功了。

examples.english: I was fifty and a comparative newcomer to computers.
examples.chinese: 我那时候50岁，在电脑方面相对来说是个新手。

examples.english: Jim, this is our new arrival, Lyndsay. She'll be taking over from Bob.
examples.chinese: 吉姆，这是我们公司新来的林赛，她将接手鲍勃的工作。

examples.english: 1200 new arrivals, including small children and babies, were left sitting on the pavement outside the embassy.
examples.chinese: 1,200名新来的人，包括年幼的儿童、婴儿，给留下坐在使馆外的人行道上。

examples.english: Gwyn's children, Craig and Laura, are thrilled with the new arrival.
examples.chinese: 格温的两个孩子克雷格和劳拉因为新添的宝宝而兴奋不已。

examples.english: The people I stayed with were very kind, so I didn't feel like a stranger for long.
examples.chinese: 我住的那家人非常友好，不久我便没有了陌生的感觉。

examples.english: Many of the farming families have lived here for hundreds of years, and tend to treat everyone else as strangers.
examples.chinese: 许多农户在这里生活了几百年，总认为别人都是外乡人。

examples.english: You can't expect teachers fresh from college to deal with large classes of difficult children.
examples.chinese: 你不能指望从大学刚刚毕业的老师去对付一大班棘手的儿童。

examples.english: We were under the command of a young lieutenant who was fresh out of officer training school.
examples.chinese: 指挥我们的是一个刚从军官培训学校里出来的年轻中尉。

examples.english: It was rookie coach, Ray Rhodes, who got the most credit for keeping the team in check.
examples.chinese: 管束好这支球队，功劳最大的是新教练雷·罗兹。

examples.english: a rookie cop
examples.chinese: 一名新警察

examples.english: I was eighteen years old and a freshman at Harvard.
examples.chinese: 那年我十八岁，是哈佛大学的新生。

examples.english: a freshers’ party
examples.chinese: 一年级新生聚会

examples.english: freshers’ week
examples.chinese: 迎新周

examples.english: The program is simple to use, even for newbies.
examples.chinese: 这个程序简单易用，即使新手也会用。

examples.english: They seem to be expecting everyone over 50 to step aside and make way for new blood.
examples.chinese: 他们好像是希望超过50岁的人都靠边去让位给新人。

examples.english: After its membership halved in the past year, leaving mainly diehard right-wingers behind, the party now desperately needs new blood.
examples.chinese: 这个党在去年成员减半，留下的主要是一些死硬的右翼分子，现在他们急需注入新鲜血液。

centers.english: experiences and feelings that you have never had before
centers.chinese: 以前从未有过的体验和感觉

examples.english: When I first left home, I enjoyed the new feeling of independence.
examples.chinese: 我第一次离家的时候，很喜欢这种独立的新感觉。

examples.english: Living in the city was a whole new experience for Philip.
examples.chinese: 大城市的生活对菲利普来说是一种全新的体验。

examples.english: Encouraged by their success, the rebel forces advanced with newfound confidence.
examples.chinese: 叛军因那次成功士气大增，建立起新的信心继续推进。

examples.english: She went back to her work full of newfound enthusiasm.
examples.chinese: 她满怀新的热情回去工作。

examples.english: When I retired, it took me a while to enjoy my newfound freedom.
examples.chinese: 我在退休之后，过了一段时间才开始享受我新获得的自由。

centers.english: a new government/company/country

examples.english: Within weeks of the election, the new government announced big tax cuts.
examples.chinese: 新政府当选后不出几个星期就宣布大幅减税。

examples.english: Thousands of new businesses are set up each year.
examples.chinese: 每年都有上千家新公司成立。

examples.english: one of Europe's newest TV stations
examples.chinese: 欧洲最新的电视台之一

examples.english: Most banks are keen to loan money to promising young businesses.
examples.chinese: 大多数银行都急于贷款给大有前途的新公司。

examples.english: ‘Impact’ is a lively young company which specializes in public relations.
examples.chinese: 鹰柏公司是一家充满活力的新公司，专门从事公关业务。

examples.english: As a country, Zimbabwe is still quite young.
examples.chinese: 作为一个国家，津巴布韦还很年轻。

examples.english: Several start-up Net companies saw their share prices rocket in the first few years, only to see them plunge as the recession hit.
examples.chinese: 一些新兴的网络公司在头几年里股价飙升，可是经济一衰退，股价就狂泻不止。

examples.english: There were 4000 start-ups in Silicon Valley in 1998.
examples.chinese: 1998年，硅谷有4,000家新成立的公司。

centers.english: modern machines/buildings/methods
centers.chinese: 现代化的机器/建筑/方法

examples.english: Seattle has a very modern public transportation system.
examples.chinese: 西雅图拥有很现代化的公共运输系统。

examples.english: The company occupies a bright, modern office building in the heart of the city.
examples.chinese: 这家公司在市中心有一幢朝气蓬勃的现代化办公大楼。

examples.english: Many criticisms have been made of modern farming methods.
examples.chinese: 对现代化农业方式有许多的批评意见。

examples.english: the horrors of modern warfare
examples.chinese: 现代化战争的恐怖

examples.english: The car is equipped with all the latest gadgets.
examples.chinese: 这款汽车配备了所有最先进的装置。

examples.english: The latest model can print 15 pages every minute.
examples.chinese: 最新的型号能够每分钟打印15页纸。

examples.english: You'll have a chance to try out the latest in kitchen equipment.
examples.chinese: 你将有机会试用一下最新式的厨房设备。

examples.english: The operation will be performed using the very latest microsurgery techniques.
examples.chinese: 这次手术将采用最先进的显微外科技术。

examples.english: The hospital has the most up-to-date equipment in Europe.
examples.chinese: 这家医院拥有全欧洲最先进的设备。

examples.english: up-to-date training methods
examples.chinese: 最新式的训练方法

examples.english: The futuristic sports stadium is the pride of the city.
examples.chinese: 这座未来派风格的运动场是该市的骄傲。

examples.english: The car, with its sleek futuristic styling, certainly looks impressive.
examples.chinese: 这辆汽车优美圆润的未来派风格给人印象十分深刻。

examples.english: The company recently moved to their new state-of-the-art building in central London.
examples.chinese: 该公司最近搬入了它位于伦敦市中心的最新式大楼里。

examples.english: Using state-of-the-art technology, scientists are able to pinpoint the exact age of archaeological finds.
examples.chinese: 使用最先进的技术，科学家能够确定考古发现的确切年代。

examples.english: Her latest indulgence is a luxury state-of-the-art yacht that she keeps at St Tropez.
examples.chinese: 她近来沉迷于她停在圣特鲁佩斯的那艘设备最先进的豪华游艇。

centers.english: modern art/literature/music/fashion
centers.chinese: 现代艺术/文学/音乐/时尚

examples.english: I like both modern dance and classical ballet.
examples.chinese: 现代舞和古典芭蕾我都喜欢。

examples.english: Your work was my first route into an understanding of modern art.
examples.chinese: 你的作品是我理解现代派艺术的入门途径。

examples.english: Composers like Philip Glass have made contemporary music more popular.
examples.chinese: 菲利普·格拉斯这一类作曲家使现代音乐更普及了。

examples.english: I'm not very impressed by the works of many contemporary artists.
examples.chinese: 我对许多当代艺术家的作品没有什么好感。

examples.english: She assured me that big sweaters were the latest fashion.
examples.chinese: 她向我保证宽松套衫是最时髦的款式。

examples.english: They stock the latest in designer footwear.
examples.chinese: 他们备有最新款式的名家设计的鞋子。

examples.english: Although she likes avant-garde music, Lydia also plays classical guitar and piano.
examples.chinese: 尽管莉迪娅喜欢前卫音乐，可她也弹奏古典吉他和钢琴。

examples.english: His paintings are rather too avant-garde for my tastes.
examples.chinese: 他的画对我的欣赏口味来说太前卫了。

examples.english: an exhibition of work by avant-garde artists and sculptors
examples.chinese: 前卫艺术家和雕塑家的作品展览

centers.english: modern ideas/ways of thinking

examples.english: They're a very modern couple -- he stays at home with the kids and she goes out to work.
examples.chinese: 他们俩是非常新潮的一对一他留在家中照看孩子，而她则外出工作。

examples.english: The school is very modern in its approach to sex education.
examples.chinese: 该校在性教育的方法上非常新潮。

examples.english: She went to a progressive private school where the pupils could choose which lessons to attend.
examples.chinese: 她上了一所很新派的私立学校，那里的学生可以自选课程。

examples.english: the government's progressive policies for dealing with inner city problems
examples.chinese: 政府在处理旧城区问题上采取的先进政策

examples.english: We like to think we're a forward-looking company that isn't afraid to use new ideas.
examples.chinese: 我们认为我们是一家不怕使用新观点的有远见的公司。

examples.english: We need more forward-looking political thinking.
examples.chinese: 我们需要更有远见的政治思想。

examples.english: Fortuna is a young, go-ahead computer company based in Düsseldorf.
examples.chinese: 福尔图纳是家新兴的开拓型电脑公司，总部设在杜塞尔多夫。

examples.english: I'm not keen on having a mobile phone, but I suppose we must all move with the times.
examples.chinese: 我不热衷于买手机，可我认为我们都得跟上时代潮流。

examples.english: This is a town that has changed with the times and now provides every vacation facility you could wish for.
examples.chinese: 这个镇已经跟上了时代步伐，现在它提供的度假设施真是应有尽有。

centers.english: to make something more modern

examples.english: The school has just updated all its computer equipment.
examples.chinese: 这所学校刚更新了所有的电脑设备。

examples.english: Nursing staff were sent on training courses to update their skills.
examples.chinese: 护理人员被送去参加培训课程以更新他们的护理技巧。

examples.english: It was an old farmhouse that had been modernized by the previous owner.
examples.chinese: 那原是一间旧农舍，前一家户主把它现代化了。

examples.english: Our aim was to modernize the health service, and we succeeded.
examples.chinese: 我们的目标是要将医疗保健服务现代化，而且我们已经成功了。

examples.english: The system needs bringing up to date.
examples.chinese: 这系统需要更新。

examples.english: All the history textbooks we use have been revised and brought up to date.
examples.chinese: 我们使用的所有历史教科书都已经过修订更新。

centers.english: only a short time ago

examples.english: The President has recently returned from a five day tour of South America.
examples.chinese: 总统在南美洲进行了为期五天的访问，最近刚刚回来。

examples.english: a new species of plant that was only recently discovered in southern Brazil
examples.chinese: 最近才在巴西南部发现的植物新品种

examples.english: He lived in Boston until quite recently.
examples.chinese: 直到最近为止他一直住在波士顿。

examples.english: Until recently, commercial fishermen had been allowed to shoot sea lions if they tried to steal their catch.
examples.chinese: 直至最近，商业渔民才获准在海狮打算偷吃他们的渔获的情况下将其射杀。

examples.english: ‘When did she go back to Italy?’ ‘Oh, very recently - just a couple of days ago.’
examples.chinese: “她什么时候回意大利的？”“噢，最近，就几天前。”

examples.english: As recently as the mid sixties, Nelson Rockefeller was considered unsuitable for the presidency because he had once been divorced.
examples.chinese: 在60年代中期这么近的年代，尼尔森·洛克菲勒仍被认为因为离过婚而不适合当总统。

examples.english: a recently published textbook
examples.chinese: 最近出版的教科书

examples.english: the recently industrialized countries of Southeast Asia
examples.chinese: 最近进入工业化的东南亚国家

examples.english: Not long ago, computers were crude, unreliable machines, used by only a few experts.
examples.chinese: 不久以前，电脑还是只有少数专家使用的既简陋又不可靠的机器。

examples.english: Not long ago I asked a friend what her children gave her for her birthday. ‘Peace,’ she said. ‘They went out for the day.’
examples.chinese: 不久前我问一位朋友她的孩子给了她什么样的生日礼物。“清静，”她说，“那天他们出去了。”

examples.english: There was a time not so long ago when everyone felt confident about investing in property.
examples.chinese: 不久前有段时间大家都对地产投资有信心。

examples.english: So what is the government's reaction to this news? A short time ago our political correspondent Jon Lander spoke to the Foreign Secretary, Robin Cook.
examples.chinese: 那么政府对此消息有什么反应？我们的政治记者乔恩·兰德不久前刚与外交大臣罗宾·库克交谈过。

examples.english: The red wolf survived until a short time ago in east Texas, but is now believed extinct in the wild.
examples.chinese: 直至不久前，红狼还在得克萨斯东部生活，现在据说在野生环境下已经灭绝了。

examples.english: Seeing the tramp, Thomas remembered how he himself had been poor only a short time ago.
examples.chinese: 看到这个流浪汉，托马斯想起了就在不久前他自己还是多么的贫穷。

examples.english: A newly married couple have moved into the house next door.
examples.chinese: 一对新婚夫妇住进了隔壁的房子。

examples.english: The group meets regularly in the newly built Chinese community center.
examples.chinese: 这个小组定期在新近建成的华人社区中心聚会。

examples.english: Mr Chandler is now director of the company's newly formed publishing division.
examples.chinese: 钱德勒先生现在是新近成立的出版部的经理。

examples.english: There's a pot of freshly made coffee on the kitchen table.
examples.chinese: 餐桌上有一壶刚刚冲好的咖啡。

examples.english: Add one clove of freshly crushed garlic.
examples.chinese: 加上一瓣刚刚捣碎的大蒜。

examples.english: Someone had placed a bunch of freshly cut roses on her desk.
examples.chinese: 有人在她桌上放了一束刚刚剪下的玫瑰。

examples.english: At the beginning of term the school looked bright and clean with its freshly painted walls and polished floors.
examples.chinese: 学期刚开始，学校里的墙壁刚刚粉刷一新，地板也刚擦亮过，看上去又明亮又清洁。

examples.english: I met Lucy the other day outside Budgens.
examples.chinese: 前几天我在巴珍斯超市外碰到露西。

examples.english: Well, did my dad tell you what happened to me in the car the other day?
examples.chinese: 哎，我爸爸有没有告诉你前几天我在车里发生的事？

examples.english: I can't believe this weather - it was freezing just the other day!
examples.chinese: 我真搞不懂这天气，前两天还冷得要命！

examples.english: ‘Is there a Mrs Lambert staying at the hotel?’ ‘Yes, she checked in a short while ago.’
examples.chinese: “有个兰伯特夫人住在这家旅馆吗？”“有，她刚刚办好入住手续。”

examples.english: Bobby's attorney gave me a call just a little while ago, to talk about the terms of the will.
examples.chinese: 博比的律师刚刚打电话给我，谈了谈遗嘱的条款。

examples.english: I broke my leg a little while back when I fell off a horse.
examples.chinese: 前不久我从马上摔下来，折断了腿。

centers.english: happening over a period of time up to the present
centers.chinese: 在直到目前为止的一段时间内发生的

examples.english: Her school work has been much better recently.
examples.chinese: 近来她的功课进步多了。

examples.english: I haven't been feeling well recently.
examples.chinese: 最近我身体不好。

examples.english: Just recently I've been thinking about changing my job.
examples.chinese: 就在最近我在考虑换工作。

examples.english: More recently, banks have offered customers the opportunity to change to PC or telephone banking.
examples.chinese: 最近银行为客户提供了改为使用个人电脑或电话理财的服务。

examples.english: The company went through a bad time last year, but lately things have been improving.
examples.chinese: 去年公司很不景气，不过最近情况开始好转了。

examples.english: I've been really busy lately, so I haven't been out much.
examples.chinese: 近来我非常忙，所以不大外出。

examples.english: I don't know what's come over Angela lately -- she's so moody.
examples.chinese: 我不知道安杰拉最近出什么事了她情绪这么低落。

expressions.text: in the last/past few weeks/months etc

examples.english: Things have changed quite dramatically in the past few months.
examples.chinese: 最近几个月情况发生了相当富于戏剧性的变化。

examples.english: I've been thinking about Kevin a lot in the last few days. I wonder how he's getting on?
examples.chinese: 近几天我经常想到凯文，不知道他怎么样了?

examples.english: In the past few years, 30,000 of these high-rise housing units have been torn down.
examples.chinese: 近几年来这些高层建筑物中有三万幢被拆毁了。

examples.english: In recent months there have been rumors of at least two attempted coups.
examples.chinese: 最近几个月以来有传闻说至少发生了两次未遂的政变。

examples.english: Illicit drug use - notably marijuana - has been increasing in recent years, especially among the young.
examples.chinese: 近年来使用违禁药品—特别是大麻—的人数在增加，尤其是青年人。

centers.english: words for describing an event that has happened recently
centers.chinese: 描述最近发生的某一事件的词语

examples.english: He hadn't completely recovered from his recent illness.
examples.chinese: 他最近生了病，还未完全康复。

examples.english: A recent report said that small amounts of alcohol are good for the health.
examples.chinese: 最近有报道说少量饮酒对健康有益。

examples.english: The team returned to a heroes’ welcome after their recent success in the European Championships.
examples.chinese: 球队最近在欧洲锦标赛上得胜归来，受到了英雄般的欢迎。

examples.english: In her latest movie she plays an LA cop.
examples.chinese: 在最近的一部影片中，她扮演一名洛杉矶警察。

examples.english: The latest attempt to reach a peace settlement ended in failure.
examples.chinese: 最近一次和平解决的尝试以失败告终。

examples.english: This is the latest in a series of Mafia killings.
examples.chinese: 这是黑手党一连串谋杀事件中最近的一次。

centers.english: words for describing news or information that is recent
centers.chinese: 描述最新的消息或信息的词语

examples.english: Tune into Radio 5 Live for the latest news and sport.
examples.chinese: 调到电台实况五台收听最新的新闻和体育报道。

examples.english: For the latest information visit the German National Tourist Office website at htt//www.germany-tourism.de.
examples.chinese: 要了解最新信息，可浏览德国国家旅游局网站，网址是：http://www.germany-tourism.de。

examples.english: The girls spent the evening catching up on the latest gossip.
examples.chinese: 女孩子们整个晚上都在聊一些最近流传的闲言碎语。

examples.english: Have you heard the latest? Nicky's getting married.
examples.chinese: 你听说最新消息了吗？尼基要结婚了。

examples.english: Is this map up-to-date? It doesn't seem to show the new road.
examples.chinese: 这张地图是最新的吗？好像没有标出这条新路。

examples.english: Foreign embassies or consulates in the United States can provide up-to-date information on their countries.
examples.chinese: 在美国的外国大使馆或领事馆可以提供关于他们自己国家的最新信息。

examples.english: Visit www.sportsfanatic.com for up-to-the-minute results and sports news.
examples.chinese: 进入www.sportsfanatic.com可看到最新的比赛结果和体育新闻。

examples.english: A computer link with Wall Street gives traders up-to-the-minute market data worldwide.
examples.chinese: 与华尔街进行电脑联网使证券交易人士了解全世界的最新市场情况。

centers.english: adult

examples.english: The cost of the trip is $59 for adults and $30 for children.
examples.chinese: 旅行费用是成年人59美元，儿童30美元。

examples.english: Since I left school, my parents have started to treat me like an adult.
examples.chinese: 自从我离开学校后，父母就开始把我当大人看待了。

examples.english: Children cannot be admitted to the museum unless they are accompanied by an adult.
examples.chinese: 小孩没有大人陪同不得进入博物馆。

examples.english: The book is intended for adult readers.
examples.chinese: 这本书是给成年读者看的。

examples.english: Over 30% of the adult population were illiterate.
examples.chinese: 百分之三十以上的成年人不识字。

examples.english: The government has announced plans to increase spending on adult education.
examples.chinese: 政府已宣布计划增加成人教育的开支。

examples.english: Grown-ups are so boring! All they ever do is talk!
examples.chinese: 大人真无聊！他们总是说个没完！

examples.english: At home there was always a grown-up to turn to if you were in trouble.
examples.chinese: 如果你碰到什么麻烦，家里总有一个大人可以依靠。

examples.english: She has three grown-up sons.
examples.chinese: 她有三个已经成年的儿子。

examples.english: Our children are all grown-up now.
examples.chinese: 我们的孩子现在都已长大成人。

examples.english: This was the first grown-up party she'd ever been to.
examples.chinese: 这是她参加的第一个成人聚会。

examples.english: Elsie had never seen a grown man cry before.
examples.chinese: 埃尔茜以前从没见过一个成年男子哭。

examples.english: He' s a grown man - he should be able to cook for himself!
examples.chinese: 他是个成年人—应该能自己做饭了！

examples.english: She's crazy -- a grown woman letting a girl order her around like that.
examples.chinese: 她真可笑—一个成年女人竟然让一个小女孩那样差来遣去的。

examples.english: A full-grown blue whale may be up to 30 metres long.
examples.chinese: 一头成年的蓝鲸可能会长达30米。

examples.english: Many of these animals die before they are fully grown.
examples.chinese: 这些动物有许多还未成年就死了。

examples.english: Will my tank be big enough for all these fish when they are fully grown?
examples.chinese: 等到这些鱼完全长成，我的鱼缸还能都装得下吗？

centers.english: to become an adult

examples.english: What do you want to be when you grow up?
examples.chinese: 你长大了想干什么？

examples.english: We plan to go and live in Florida when the children have all grown up.
examples.chinese: 我们打算等到孩子们全部长大就搬到佛罗里达去住。

examples.english: Girls tend to mature more quickly than boys, both physically and emotionally.
examples.chinese: 女孩子不管在生理上还是感情上都往往比男孩子成熟得快。

examples.english: The fly matures in only seven days.
examples.chinese: 这种蝇七天就能成熟。

examples.english: Emma will inherit a fortune when she comes of age.
examples.chinese: 埃玛成年后将继承一笔财产。

examples.english: They planned to marry as soon as she came of age.
examples.chinese: 他们打算等她一满法定年龄就结婚。

centers.english: the time when someone is an adult

examples.english: He has spent most of his adult life in the States.
examples.chinese: 他成年后大部分时间是在美国度过的。

examples.english: Children with the disease have little chance of surviving to adulthood.
examples.chinese: 患有这种疾病的儿童几乎没有可能活到成年。

examples.english: Nowadays young people want to leave home as soon as they reach adulthood.
examples.chinese: 如今的年轻人一到成年便想离家。

examples.english: The plant reaches maturity after two years.
examples.chinese: 这种植物两年后就到达成熟期。

examples.english: Sharks take 10 years to reach maturity.
examples.chinese: 鲨鱼要十年才成年。

centers.english: when people, animals, or plants get bigger
centers.chinese: 人、动物或植物成长起来

examples.english: Tom has really grown since I last saw him.
examples.chinese: 自从我上次见到汤姆以来，他长大了很多。

examples.english: The fish are kept in tanks until they have grown enough to be released into the river.
examples.chinese: 鱼在鱼池里养，直至大到可以放进河里去。

expressions.text: grow one metre/two centimetres/six inches etc

examples.english: Amy grew 6 inches last year.
examples.chinese: 埃米去年长高了6英寸。

examples.english: Within a few years, these saplings will grow into tall trees.
examples.chinese: 不出几年，这些幼苗就会长成大树。

expressions.text: grow to ten inches/two metres/70 feet etc

examples.english: The Eastern White Pine often grows to 200 feet.
examples.chinese: 北美白松一般能长到200英尺。

expressions.text: grow to a height/length/width etc of

examples.english: Sunflowers can grow to a height of ten feet.
examples.chinese: 向日葵可以长到10英尺高。

examples.english: A healthy diet is necessary for a child's normal growth.
examples.chinese: 健康的饮食对于一个孩子的正常发育来说是必需的。

examples.english: The baby develops very quickly during the first few weeks of pregnancy.
examples.chinese: 怀孕的头几个星期，宝宝发育得非常快。

examples.english: In less that 12 weeks the chicks will develop into adult birds.
examples.chinese: 不到12周，小鸡就会发育成熟。

examples.english: All the children are weighed and measured regularly to check their development.
examples.chinese: 所有儿童都定期测量体重和身高，检查发育情况。

examples.english: Eleanor's getting bigger, isn't she? I hardly recognised her.
examples.chinese: 埃莉诺真是长大了，我差一点认不出她来。

expressions.text: get bigger and bigger/taller and taller

examples.english: The grass got taller and taller over the summer.
examples.chinese: 夏天，草越长越高。

examples.english: Jo's shot up since I last saw her.
examples.chinese: 自从我上次见到乔以来，她长高了许多。

examples.english: In May the plants all start to shoot up.
examples.chinese: 到了5月，花草树木都开始迅速生长。

examples.english: I sowed lots of poppies, but they haven't come up yet.
examples.chinese: 我种了许多罂粟，但是还没有长出来。

examples.english: The weeds keep coming up year after year.
examples.chinese: 杂草一年年不停地长出来。

examples.english: As the plant grows, the roots also increase in size.
examples.chinese: 植物生长时，根也随之长大。

examples.english: If the tumour is not removed, it will increase in size and may cause a blockage.
examples.chinese: 肿瘤如果不切除，就会越来越大，可能阻塞血管。

examples.english: A tree takes many years to mature.
examples.chinese: 一棵树要经许多年才完全长成。

examples.english: In the hot weather the fruit matured quickly.
examples.chinese: 在炎热的天气里，水果成熟得很快。

centers.english: someone or something that has finished growing

examples.english: A fully grown elephant can weigh several tons.
examples.chinese: 一头完全成年的大象可以重达好几吨。

examples.english: Jim was six foot at the age of fourteen, even before he was fully grown.
examples.chinese: 吉姆在14岁还没有完全发育的时候就有6英尺高了。

examples.english: The shrubs were transplanted fully grown from other parts of the country.
examples.chinese: 这些灌木是在完全长成后从该国其他地区移栽过来的。

examples.english: The disease can be very serious in adult animals.
examples.chinese: 这种疾病在成年动物身上会很严重。

examples.english: It was thought that the skull was too small and light to belong to an adult male.
examples.chinese: 有人认为，这个头骨太小太轻，不是属于成年男性的。

examples.english: Soon the skin of the pupa splits open, and the fully-formed adult butterfly emerges.
examples.chinese: 不久，蛹皮裂开，完全成形的蝴蝶成虫破蛹而出。

examples.english: The house has a lovely garden surrounded by mature oak trees.
examples.chinese: 这房子有一座美丽的花园，花园四周有成熟的橡树环抱。

examples.english: A hen is a mature female chicken, more than ten months old.
examples.chinese: 母鸡是十个月以上、发育成熟的雌性鸡。

centers.english: to make plants grow

examples.english: Farmers in this area grow mainly wheat.
examples.chinese: 这地区的农民主要种植小麦。

examples.english: It's very satisfying growing your own vegetables.
examples.chinese: 自己种植蔬菜很有满足感。

examples.english: Wild flowers are quick and easy to grow from seed.
examples.chinese: 用花籽栽种野花又快又容易。

examples.english: Nearer the coast, huge areas of land are given over to cultivating tomatoes.
examples.chinese: 靠近海岸的地方，大片大片的土地被用来种植番茄。

examples.english: Gradually it was found more profitable to cultivate vines and olives rather than grain.
examples.chinese: 渐渐地，人们发现种葡萄和橄榄树比种谷物利润更大。

examples.english: Population growth is causing people to clear more woodland so that they can cultivate the land.
examples.chinese: 人口的增长使人们砍伐了更多的林地用来开垦耕地。

examples.english: In the mountains, the higher rainfall allows for the cultivation of some cereals.
examples.chinese: 山区里雨水较多，可以种植一些谷类作物。

examples.english: Wild strawberries are smaller than the cultivated variety.
examples.chinese: 野草莓比人工种植的草莓小。

examples.english: Last year we raised a good crop of onions.
examples.chinese: 去年我们种了很多洋葱。

examples.english: Tomato plants can be raised from seed in a heated greenhouse.
examples.chinese: 番茄可以用种子放在加热温室里培植。

expressions.text: have green fingers /have a green thum

examples.english: He had green fingers, my grandfather. He could grow anything.
examples.chinese: 我祖父很会侍花弄草，他什么都会种。！

examples.english: The flower show season is upon us, and whether you have a green thumb or not, you should take a look at your garden.
examples.chinese: 就要到花展季节了，不管你是否擅长园艺，都应该照看一下你的花园。

centers.english: to put seeds or young plants into the ground
centers.chinese: 把种子或幼苗种在土里

examples.english: Before you plant the seeds, prepare the soil carefully.
examples.chinese: 在播种之前，要仔细翻整好土壤。

examples.english: They planted an oak tree in the middle of the field.
examples.chinese: 他们在田地中央种了一棵橡树。

examples.english: Towards the end of March, the potatoes can be planted outside in the ground.
examples.chinese: 接近3月底的时候，马铃薯可以种在外面的地里。

examples.english: If you want an early crop, you should sow in September.
examples.chinese: 如果你想早点收获，应该在9月播种。

examples.english: Sow the seeds in rows about 20 centimetres apart.
examples.chinese: 一行行播下种子，每行间距约20厘米。

examples.english: The ground was still too waterlogged for sowing rice.
examples.chinese: 土地仍旧积水太多，不能种稻子。

centers.english: the amount of something that is grown in one season
centers.chinese: 某物在一个季节里长出的数量

examples.english: The rain was so bad this year that he lost the whole crop of barley.
examples.chinese: 今年的雨水太多，他的大麦全无收成。〔

examples.english: With high-yield varieties of rice the farmers can grow two or three crops a year.
examples.chinese: 有了各种高产量的稻，农民一年可以种两季或三季。

examples.english: Indian farmers have doubled their output of cereal crops like wheat.
examples.chinese: 印度的农民已经把小麦等谷类作物的产量增加了一倍。

examples.english: The famine was caused by drought, which led to widespread crop failure.
examples.chinese: 这次饥荒是干旱导致庄稼普遍歉收引起的。

examples.english: Thanks to the lovely weather we had a bumper crop of peaches and nectarines this year.
examples.chinese: 多亏了好天气，我们今年的桃子和油桃大丰收。

examples.english: The harvest is usually ready in July or August.
examples.chinese: 庄稼一般在7月或8月可以收割。

examples.english: The heavy frosts had ended hopes of a good harvest that year.
examples.chinese: 那年严重的霜冻打破了人们丰收的希望。

examples.english: This year's olive harvest was the best since the war.
examples.chinese: 自那场战争以来，今年橄榄的收成是最好的。

examples.english: As a result of several bumper harvests, the country now has a grain surplus.
examples.chinese: 因为有了多次的大丰收，这个国家的谷物过剩。

examples.english: Even the youngest children would come and help to get the harvest in.
examples.chinese: 即使是最小的孩子也会来帮忙收割庄稼。

centers.english: land where the soil is good for growing plants

examples.english: This shrub likes sun and water as well as a fertile well-drained soil.
examples.chinese: 这种灌木喜欢阳光和水，还喜欢肥沃、排水良好的土壤。

examples.english: Farmers left the rocky hills of New England for the fertile plains of the Middle West.
examples.chinese: 农民们离开了新英格兰多岩石的山丘，到中西部肥沃的平原去。

examples.english: The valley was fertile, and a good crop was a near certainty.
examples.chinese: 这个山谷土地肥沃，丰收几乎是笃定的。

examples.english: Native American tribes migrated to the region, exploiting the fertility of the soil.
examples.chinese: 北美土著部落迁徙到这个地区，开发这片肥沃的土壤。

examples.english: Potato plants are easy to grow and do not require rich soil.
examples.chinese: 马铃薯容易种植，不需要肥沃的土壤。

examples.english: the rich farmland of the Ukraine
examples.chinese: 乌克兰肥沃的农田

examples.english: The soil in this area is rich in nitrogen.
examples.chinese: 这个地区的土壤含丰富的氮。

centers.english: land where the soil is not good for growing plants
centers.chinese: 不适合种植植物的土地

examples.english: Most herbs grow fairly well in dry, poor soil.
examples.chinese: 多数草本植物在干燥、贫瘠的土壤里也能长得很好。

examples.english: The land around here is poor because of years of intensive farming.
examples.chinese: 由于长年的密集耕作，这一带的土地很贫瘠。

examples.english: The soil is very poor in minerals and needs some fertilizer.
examples.chinese: 土壤里矿物质含量很少，需要施肥。

examples.english: Intense heat had created a completely barren landscape, almost like the moon.
examples.chinese: 酷热造成了一片不毛之地，几乎就像月球上一样。

examples.english: the rocky, barren slopes of the mountain
examples.chinese: 荒瘠多石的山坡

centers.english: now, at this time

examples.english: If we leave now we'll be there before dark.
examples.chinese: 如果我们现在出发，天黑之前可以到达。

examples.english: It's not raining now, but they said it might rain later.
examples.chinese: 现在没在下雨，但预报说稍后可能要下雨。

examples.english: He used to coach high school basketball but now he's a realtor.
examples.chinese: 他以前是中学篮球教练，但现在是房地产经纪人。

examples.english: Students are to be in their seats by 8:00 from now on.
examples.chinese: 从现在起，学生必须在8点钟之前入座。

examples.english: From now on, the U.S. government will rely on a new method to measure economic growth.
examples.chinese: 从现在起，美国政府将使用新的方法测算经济增长率。

examples.english: He's only three and he's already reading.
examples.chinese: 他才三岁，但已经识字了。

examples.english: ‘Should I tell Kay?’ ‘She already knows.’
examples.chinese: “我应该告诉凯吗？”“她已经知道了。”

examples.english: The show has already started.
examples.chinese: 演出已经开始了。

examples.english: Don't buy any more toys for the kids -- they've got plenty already.
examples.chinese: 不要再给孩子们买玩具了—已经够多了。

examples.english: Was the apartment empty when you moved in or was it already furnished?
examples.chinese: 你搬进来住的时候，公寓是空的，还是已经配好家具了？

examples.english: The firm currently employs 113 people.
examples.chinese: 公司目前有113名员工。

examples.english: Currently, the most a senior nurse can earn is £16,000.
examples.chinese: 现时，一位资深的护士最多能挣16,000英镑。

examples.english: Ms. Kelly is currently assisting another customer. May I help you?
examples.chinese: 凯莉女士这会儿正在帮助另一位顾客，我来帮你好吗？

examples.english: I'm working in a restaurant at the moment.
examples.chinese: 我目前在一家餐厅工作。

examples.english: Miss Hellman is away from her desk at the moment - can I have her call you back?
examples.chinese: 赫尔曼小姐这会儿不在她的座位上一我让她回电话给你好吗？

examples.english: The official currency is the crown, presently about 30 to the dollar.
examples.chinese: 法定货币是克朗，目前大约是30克朗兑1美元。

examples.english: The money available for public libraries will be less in future than at present.
examples.chinese: 以后可供公共图书馆运用的资金要比现在的少了。

examples.english: We do not envisage any changes in the tax structure at the present time.
examples.chinese: 我们目前不打算对征税结构作任何改变。

examples.english: I need a new car but right now I can't afford one.
examples.chinese: 我需要买一辆新车，但现在买不起。

examples.english: She's in Amsterdam right now but she should be in Paris by tomorrow night.
examples.chinese: 她现在在阿姆斯特丹，但明天晚上应该在巴黎。

examples.english: Sorry, I'm busy just now - can I call you later?
examples.chinese: 对不起，我现在忙着一过会儿打电话给你好吗？

examples.english: I have no further questions at this time, your honor.
examples.chinese: 现在我没有问题了，法官大人。

examples.english: ‘Do you have any health insurance?’ ‘Not at this time.’
examples.chinese: “你有健康保险吗？”“现在没有。”

expressions.text: at this time of day/night/year etc

examples.english: What are you doing out at this time of night?
examples.chinese: 晚上这个时候你在外面干什么?

examples.english: Gas prices always go up at this time of year.
examples.chinese: 每年这个时候油价总要上涨。

centers.english: now, not in the past

examples.english: We used to be good friends but I don't see very much of her now.
examples.chinese: 我们以前是好朋友，但现在我不常见到她了。

examples.english: Julie has moved to a new school and she's much happier now.
examples.chinese: 朱莉转到了一所新的学校，现在开心多了。

examples.english: It seems you're not allowed to smoke anywhere nowadays.
examples.chinese: 现在好像哪儿都不能抽烟。

examples.english: Children can't play in the street these days - the traffic's too bad.
examples.chinese: 现在孩子们都不能在街上玩了—车来车往太可怕了。

examples.english: Nowadays, you hardly ever seen anyone wearing a tie to work.
examples.chinese: 现在很少看到有人戴领带上班了。

examples.english: Today, only a few of these beautiful animals survive.
examples.chinese: 今天，这种美丽的动物已所剩无几了。

examples.english: Couples today are much more likely to marry in their 30s.
examples.chinese: 现在的恋人更多是在三十出头的时候结婚。

examples.english: The cost to install solar panels has dropped from $20 a watt in 1980 to as little as $5 today.
examples.chinese: 安装太阳能电池板的费用从1980年的每瓦20美元下降至今天只需5美元。

examples.english: It's not right, in this day and age, that people all over the world are still starving.
examples.chinese: 在如今这个时代，世界各地还有人在挨饿，这是不合理的。

examples.english: It's amazing that you can still find a house for under $100,000 in this day and age.
examples.chinese: 如今这个年代你还能找到十万美元以下的房子，真是难以相信啊。

centers.english: until now

examples.english: There haven't been any problems so far.
examples.chinese: 到目前为止没有出现什么问题。

examples.english: This is the hottest day we've had so far this summer.
examples.chinese: 今天是今年夏天到现在为止最热的一天。

examples.english: We've raised twelve thousand dollars so far, and we expect to reach our goal by the end of next week.
examples.chinese: 到现在为止我们已经筹到了12,000美元，希望到下星期结束的时候能达到目标。

examples.english: He's been studying French for five years, and still can't speak the language.
examples.chinese: 他学了五年法语了，还是不会说。

examples.english: Are you still going out with that guy you met at Heather's party?
examples.chinese: 你仍然跟在希瑟的聚会上认识的那个家伙交往吗？

examples.english: Has the new washing machine arrived yet?
examples.chinese: 新洗衣机送到了没有？

examples.english: I haven't been to the new exhibit yet, but I hope to this weekend.
examples.chinese: 我还没有去过新的展览会，希望这个周末能去。

examples.english: ‘Have you finished your homework?’ ‘Not yet.’
examples.chinese: “你做完功课了吗？”“还没有。”

examples.english: He hasn't gotten much time off from work up to now, so he's really looking forward to his vacation.
examples.chinese: 到现在为止他都忙于工作，没有多少休息的时间，所以热切盼望着这次度假的到来。

examples.english: Until now, there has been no effective treatment for this disease.
examples.chinese: 到现在为止，这种疾病还没有找到有效的治疗方法。

expressions.text: up to the present day/until the present day

examples.english: These two companies have dominated the industry from the end of World War II until the present day.
examples.chinese: 从第二次世界大战结束一直到今天，这两家公司都主导着这个行业。

examples.english: The beauty of Yosemite has inspired artists from Bierstadt's time right up to the present day.
examples.chinese: 约塞米蒂的美启发了从比兹塔特时代到今天一代又一代的艺术家。

centers.english: existing, happening, or relating to now
centers.chinese: 现存的，现在发生的，或与现在有关的

examples.english: Arnaud lived in Los Angeles before moving to his present home in New York.
examples.chinese: 阿诺搬来纽约现在的家之前住在洛杉矶。

examples.english: He warned that the present situation could get much worse.
examples.chinese: 他警告说现在这情况可能会变得更严重。

examples.english: The existing building is too small, and there are plans to replace it within the next five years.
examples.chinese: 现在的这栋楼太小，计划五年之内重建。

examples.english: Many people feel that the existing law discriminates against women.
examples.chinese: 许多人觉得现有的法律歧视女性。

examples.english: In the current economic situation, switching careers may not be such a good idea.
examples.chinese: 按照目前的经济形势，改行转业不是很明智的做法。

examples.english: Coca-Cola's current advertising campaign
examples.chinese: 可口可乐公司目前正在进行的广告活动

examples.english: The aim is to reduce current pollution levels in the Black Sea.
examples.chinese: 目的是要减轻黑海现在的污染程度。

examples.english: According to one economist, at the current growth rate, China will have the largest economy in the world by 2030.
examples.chinese: 有经济学家称，中国按照目前的发展速度，到2030年将成为世界上最大的经济强国。

examples.english: The first computers were extremely slow by today's standards.
examples.chinese: 按现在的标准看，早期的电脑速度极慢。

examples.english: The teenagers of today have a different attitude to sex.
examples.chinese: 现在的青少年性观念不同了。

examples.english: Modern-day equipment has made mining much safer than it was.
examples.chinese: 现代的设备使采矿比过去安全多了。

examples.english: There is no modern-day racing driver who could be compared with Fangio.
examples.chinese: 现代的赛车手没有人能和范吉奥相比。

examples.english: Prussia reached its zenith in 1795, encompassing most of northern Germany and present-day Poland.
examples.chinese: 1795年普鲁士达到了鼎盛时期，版图覆盖德国北部和今波兰的大部分地区。

examples.english: I don't like modern architecture at all.
examples.chinese: 我一点也不喜欢现代建筑。

examples.english: The pyramids are a remarkable piece of engineering, even judged by modern standards.
examples.chinese: 即使用现代的标准来衡量，金字塔也仍然是一项辉煌的工程。

examples.english: The most compelling work in the modern British theater is being created in the smaller and non-profit theaters.
examples.chinese: 现代英国戏剧最扣人心弦的作品正在一些非营利的小剧场中诞生。

examples.english: Contemporary Indian cinema has its roots in folk culture.
examples.chinese: 当代印度电影源于民间文化。

examples.english: the declining importance of religion in contemporary societies
examples.chinese: 当代社会中宗教的式微

examples.english: It's an old story but it has a topical message.
examples.chinese: 这是个老生常谈的故事，但是它具有当前关注的信息。

examples.english: In the 1970s, he recorded topical songs about Watergate and the Vietnam War.
examples.chinese: 20世纪70年代，他灌录了一些关于水门事件和越战这些热门话题的歌曲。

examples.english: The editor thinks that if an article isn't topical it isn't worth publishing.
examples.chinese: 编辑认为，如果一篇文章不具有时事性，就不值得发表。

examples.english: Romer portrayed himself as a latter-day Robin Hood who took money and gave it to the underprivileged.
examples.chinese: 罗默把自己说成是劫富济贫的现代罗宾汉。

centers.english: happening now, but likely to change
centers.chinese: 现在如此，但以后可能会发生变化

examples.english: Leave the groceries there for now - I'll put them away later.
examples.chinese: 这些食品杂货先放那儿吧—我回头再收拾。

examples.english: For the time being he can stay here, but I want that dog out of here by the end of the week.
examples.chinese: 他暂时可住这儿，但我希望那条狗在周末之前离开。

examples.english: For the moment the city seems quiet, but the fighting could start again at any time.
examples.chinese: 城里目前好像很平静，不过战斗随时都可能再次爆发。

examples.english: ‘How's your apartment?’ ‘It's fine for the moment, but I'd rather live nearer town.’
examples.chinese: “你的公寓怎么样？”“目前还不错，不过我更喜欢住得离镇上近些。”

examples.english: Assuming for the moment that you did get the job, where would you live?
examples.chinese: 暂时假设你得到了这份工作，你会住哪里？

examples.english: As of now, there is no cure for multiple sclerosis.
examples.chinese: 目前多发性硬化症尚无治疗方法。

examples.english: My plan, as of now, is to graduate in May then start looking for a job in the fall.
examples.chinese: 我现在的计划是，5月份毕业，然后到秋天开始找工作。

examples.english: It is assumed, for the present, that the meeting will go ahead.
examples.chinese: 暂时还是认为会议要继续下去的。

examples.english: A reduction in interest rates seems highly unlikely for the present.
examples.chinese: 目前调低利率的可能性似乎极低。

examples.english: Payday is not until next week, but if you need any money in the meanwhile, let me know.
examples.chinese: 下个星期才是发薪日，这期间你需要钱的话就跟我说。

examples.english: You probably won't receive the contract until Thursday but I can fax you a copy in the meantime.
examples.chinese: 你可能要到星期四才能收到合同，但我可以先传真一份给你。

examples.english: The flight will be announced soon. Meanwhile, please remain seated.
examples.chinese: 航班将马上作出宣布，在此期间，请大家在座位上坐好。

centers.english: when something does not happen now

examples.english: He no longer felt sure that he was right.
examples.chinese: 他不再确信自己是正确的了。

examples.english: The bridge had collapsed, and it was no longer possible to cross the river.
examples.chinese: 桥坍塌了，再也过不了河了。

examples.english: Alex doesn't work here any more.
examples.chinese: 亚历克斯已不在这儿工作了。

examples.english: Do what you like. I don't care any more!
examples.chinese: 你爱做什么就做什么，我再也不在乎了！

examples.english: At one time doctors recommended red meat as part of a healthy diet but not any more.
examples.chinese: 医生曾一度建议吃红肉，认为这是健康饮食的一部分，但是现在他们不这么认为了。

examples.english: When I was younger I spent hours lying out in the sun but not now.
examples.chinese: 我年轻的时候经常在阳光底下躺上好几个小时，但现在不这样做了。

examples.english: People used to respect teachers, but they don't now.
examples.chinese: 人们过去都尊敬老师，但是现在不了。

centers.english: ways of saying that one thing happens after another
centers.chinese: 表示一事接着另一事发生的说法

examples.english: We scraped all the old paint off the bike and then repainted it bright red.
examples.chinese: 我们把自行车上的旧漆都刮掉了，然后重新把它漆成了鲜红色。

examples.english: Fry the onions gently, and then add the meat and cook for a few minutes.
examples.chinese: 把洋葱稍稍炒一下，然后放进肉烧几分钟。

examples.english: First you need to collect all the information and make detailed notes. Then you can start to actually write your essay.
examples.chinese: 首先你得收集所有资料并详细地做好笔记，然后就能开始正式动笔写文章。

examples.english: Everyone started fighting and someone threw a bottle. I forget what happened next.
examples.chinese: 大家都开始打起来，有人扔了一个瓶子。接下来的事我就记不起来了。

examples.english: Which of the candidates shall we interview next?
examples.chinese: 我们接下来要面试哪个应聘者？

examples.english: First you need to select the text you want to move. Next, click on the ‘Move’ command at the top of the screen.
examples.chinese: 首先你要选好想要移动的内容，然后点击屏幕顶端的“移动”指令。

examples.english: England had a man sent off in the first half, and after that the England team never really looked as though they could win the game.
examples.chinese: 上半场英格兰队有一人被罚下场，那以后英格兰队看上去就再也不像能赢那场比赛了。

examples.english: The exhaust pipe fell off the car just as we were leaving, and after that it was just one disaster after another!
examples.chinese: 我们正要离开时车子的排气管掉了，然后灾祸就接二连三地发生了！

centers.english: at a particular time in the past

examples.english: She thought back over her early married life; everything had been so different then.
examples.chinese: 她回想起自己刚结婚时的生活，那时候一切都大不相同。

examples.english: They were living in the country then, on a farm.
examples.chinese: 那时候他们住在乡村的一座农场里。

examples.english: These days it's OK for women to smoke in public, but then it was unheard of.
examples.chinese: 现在女人能在公众场合抽烟，但那时候这是闻所未闻的。

examples.english: Bob sat down and read the letter again slowly. Then and only then did it begin to sink in that Stella was really dead.
examples.chinese: 鲍勃坐下来又慢慢地读那封信。这时，也只有这时，他才开始明白斯特拉真的已经去世了。

examples.english: I sat down at my desk and got out a pile of reports to read. Just then, the phone rang.
examples.chinese: 我坐在书桌前拿出一叠报告来看，就在此时电话铃响了。

examples.english: At that time, he was married to a woman called Jody.
examples.chinese: 那时候，他跟一个叫乔迪的女人结了婚。

examples.english: I was offered a job in New York, but at the time I didn't want to move so far away from my family.
examples.chinese: 我得到了一份在纽约的工作，但那时候我不愿意搬得离家那么远。

examples.english: The accepted view at that time was that women should remain in the home and not go out to work.
examples.chinese: 那时候普遍接受的看法是女人应该留在家里，不可以出去工作。

examples.english: I can't remember exactly what he said, but I do remember thinking it was very funny at the time.
examples.chinese: 我不怎么记得他确切是怎样说的，但我确实记得当时感到他的话很滑稽。

examples.english: We used to get paid £2 a week. That was a lot of money in those days.
examples.chinese: 我们过去的薪水是一周两英镑，那时候这可是一大笔钱。

examples.english: In those days there was no proper road, just an old stony track through the woods.
examples.chinese: 那时候没有一条像样的路，只有一条旧的石子小道穿过树林。

examples.english: Back then, most people left school at fourteen and started work.
examples.chinese: 那时候，大多数人都是14岁便离开学校开始工作的。

examples.english: I remember thinking, back then, that I would never get married.
examples.chinese: 我记得当年我以为自己永远不会结婚了。

examples.english: Miles got up to make his speech, and at that point several of the guests quietly slipped out of the room.
examples.chinese: 迈尔斯站起来准备演讲，就在此时有几位嘉宾悄悄溜出了房间。

examples.english: I thought he was dead. At that point, everything seemed hopeless.
examples.chinese: 我以为他死了，那一刻一切看起来都毫无希望。

examples.english: At that moment there was a knock on the door.
examples.chinese: 就在那时有人敲门。

examples.english: Fortunately, Jorge appeared at that moment and was able to help us load things into the van.
examples.chinese: 幸好乔治在那时候出现了，他帮我们把东西搬上小货车。

examples.english: Just at that moment, the police arrived.
examples.chinese: 就在那时候，警察来了。

examples.english: At that stage I lacked the experience to apply for a management post.
examples.chinese: 在那时期，我没有足够的经验去申请管理职位。

examples.english: At that stage in the inquiry, the police still hoped that Maria might be alive.
examples.chinese: 在调查的那个阶段，警方仍希望玛丽亚可能还活着。

centers.english: at a particular time in the future

examples.english: Wait until you've had your dinner, then you can go out to play.
examples.chinese: 等到吃完晚饭之后你才可以出去玩。

examples.english: Just wait until July -- all the exams will be over by then.
examples.chinese: 一直等到7月吧—到那时所有的考试都结束了。

examples.english: We're not getting a new car until June, so this one will have to do us until then.
examples.chinese: 我们要到6月份才能拿到新车，所以在此之前我们得用这辆车。

examples.english: We'll probably see you again when we get to Budapest -- until then goodbye and good luck!
examples.chinese: 我们很可能要在到了布达佩斯以后再和你见面—在此之前，再见，祝你好运！

examples.english: Both sides must forget about the past. Then and only then can there be peace.
examples.chinese: 双方都必须不计前嫌，这样，也只有这样，才会有和平。

examples.english: At 7:45 the lights will go out in the hall, and at that point all the actors will move into their positions on the stage.
examples.chinese: 到7时45分大厅里的灯光会熄灭，在那时候所有的演员都会走到舞台上各就各位。

examples.english: The exams will be finished by the end of June. At that stage you can make a decision about which subjects to study next year.
examples.chinese: 考试将于6月底前结束，那时候你就可以决定下一年要修读哪些学科。

examples.english: I have to go at 6 pm, but by that time we should have got through most of the work.
examples.chinese: 我必须在下午6点走，但到那时候我们应该已经完成大部分工作了。

examples.english: The Connellys go to Africa in April, by which time they hope to have sold their house.
examples.chinese: 康奈利一家4月份到非洲去，他们希望届时已经把房子卖掉了。

centers.english: in a short time from now or from a particular time
centers.chinese: 从现在或某个时候起不久以后

examples.english: It'll soon be Christmas.
examples.chinese: 很快就是圣诞节了。

examples.english: Driving in the city was hard at first, but she soon got used to it.
examples.chinese: 在城里开车一开始很难，但她很快就适应了。

examples.english: Why wasn't I told about this sooner?
examples.chinese: 为什么不早告诉我这事？

examples.english: Please reply as soon as possible.
examples.chinese: 请尽快回复。

examples.english: I came as soon as I could.
examples.chinese: 我尽快就来了。

examples.english: We need to get him to a hospital, and the sooner the better.
examples.chinese: 我们需要送他去医院，越快越好。

examples.english: They set off soon after breakfast.
examples.chinese: 他们吃完早餐不久就出发了。

examples.english: Those two will be getting married before long.
examples.chinese: 那两位不久将要结婚了。

examples.english: Her eyelids began to droop and before long she was fast asleep.
examples.chinese: 她的眼皮开始下垂，不久就酣睡了起来。

examples.english: We apologize for the delay -- the train will be leaving shortly.
examples.chinese: 很抱歉我们延误了，现在火车马上就要出发。

examples.english: The President will shortly be on his way to Italy for a trade conference.
examples.chinese: 总统即将前往意大利出席一个贸易会议。

examples.english: Her last novel was published shortly after her death.
examples.chinese: 她的最后一部小说是她死后不久发表的。

expressions.text: in the near future/in the not too distant future

examples.english: She doesn't have a driver's license, but is hoping to pass her test in the near future.
examples.chinese: 她没有驾驶执照，但是希望不久就能通过驾驶考试。

examples.english: A new health club is to be built here in the not too distant future.
examples.chinese: 在不久的将来，这里会兴建一个新的健身俱乐部。

examples.english: Dinner won't be long.
examples.chinese: 晚饭快预备好了。

examples.english: ‘When's Dad coming home?’ ‘He won't be long.’
examples.chinese: “爸爸什么时候回家？”“快了。”

examples.english: It won't be long before we're off on vacation.
examples.chinese: 我们不久就要去度假了。

examples.english: They started playing together in June 1961, and it wasn't long before they got a recording contract.
examples.chinese: 他们于1961年6月开始一起演唱，不久以后就拿到了一份录音合同。

examples.english: Alex was knocked to the ground, but he quickly recovered.
examples.chinese: 阿历克斯被撞倒在地上，但很快就恢复了过来。

examples.english: Fortunately, India quickly returned to calm after Mrs Gandhi's death.
examples.chinese: 所幸的是，甘地夫人逝世以后，印度很快就恢复了平静。

centers.english: very soon

expressions.text: in no time/in no time at all

examples.english: Don't worry - you'll be back to normal in no time.
examples.chinese: 别担心，你很快就会恢复正常的。

examples.english: In no time at all he had built up a big following among the local black community.
examples.chinese: 没多久，他就在当地的黑人社区中建立了一支庞大的追随队伍。

examples.english: The coffee will be ready in a minute.
examples.chinese: 咖啡一会儿就准备好。

examples.english: Don't keep nagging me - I'll do it in a minute!
examples.chinese: 别缠着我了，我一会儿就去做！

examples.english: We will return to the subject of tax in a moment.
examples.chinese: 我们一会儿再来谈税务问题。

examples.english: My father's due to arrive any minute now.
examples.chinese: 我父亲随时都有可能到。

examples.english: Any moment now the final whistle will be blown.
examples.chinese: 最后的哨声随时都会吹响。

examples.english: If she hasn't had the baby already, she's going to have it any time now.
examples.chinese: 她即使现在还没有生孩子，也是随时都会生孩子的。

examples.english: The letter should be with you any day now.
examples.chinese: 你这几天应该能收到信。

examples.english: His ship was due back from the Pacific any day now.
examples.chinese: 他的船将在这几天从太平洋返航。

examples.english: He could have another heart attack at any moment.
examples.chinese: 他的心脏病任何时候都有可能复发。

examples.english: We knew that war might break out at any moment.
examples.chinese: 我们知道战争可能随时爆发。

examples.english: The car looked as though it would fall apart at any minute.
examples.chinese: 那辆车看上去好像随时都会散架似的。

examples.english: Mr Ewing will see you momentarily, sir.
examples.chinese: 尤因先生马上见你，先生。

examples.english: You'll be fully recovered before you know it.
examples.chinese: 在不知不觉中你就会完全康复过来。

examples.english: You offer to iron his shirt and before you know it, he expects you to do all the housework.
examples.chinese: 你主动给他烫一次衬衫，他很快就会指望你做全部的家务。

centers.english: to be going to happen soon

examples.english: I'm pretty busy right now -- I have exams coming up next week.
examples.chinese: 我现在很忙—下个星期就要考试了。

examples.english: With Christmas coming up, we didn't have much spare money.
examples.chinese: 圣诞节即将来临，我们没有很多闲钱。

examples.english: A solution to the problem now seems in sight.
examples.chinese: 似乎已看到问题的解决办法了。

examples.english: The end of the economic nightmare is still nowhere in sight.
examples.chinese: 经济梦魇还不见有尽头。

expressions.text: be around the corner/ be round the corner

examples.english: In life, you never quite know what's around the corner.
examples.chinese: 人生总是难料。

examples.english: He continues to hint that the end of his playing career may be round the corner.
examples.chinese: 他继续暗示说马上要结束他的足球生涯。

examples.english: They keep telling us that better economic times are just around the corner.
examples.chinese: 他们总是告诉我们说，一个更好的经济时代即将到来。

examples.english: Appeals are common when a general election is in the offing.
examples.chinese: 大选在即，民众呼声如潮。

examples.english: According to the company, these deals had been in the offing for some time.
examples.chinese: 根据公司所说，这几桩生意已经酝酿了一段时间了。

examples.english: Soon it became clear to everyone that war was imminent.
examples.chinese: 很快大家都明白，战争已迫在眉睫。

examples.english: With the election imminent, Churchill returned to London.
examples.chinese: 大选在即，丘吉尔回到了伦敦。

examples.english: Some of the buildings were in a state of imminent collapse.
examples.chinese: 有些大楼已摇摇欲坠。

examples.english: The child was in imminent danger of falling into the water.
examples.chinese: 那小孩随时都有掉进水里的危险。

examples.english: Dixon was convinced he could win the forthcoming election.
examples.chinese: 狄克逊确信自己能在这次即将举行的选举中获胜。

examples.english: The matter will be discussed at the forthcoming general meeting.
examples.chinese: 这件事要在即将召开的大会上讨论。

examples.english: Forthcoming attractions include a magician and a quiz competition.
examples.chinese: 接下来的精彩节目是魔术表演和智力竞答。

examples.english: The space program will be reviewed during the upcoming congressional session.
examples.chinese: 这个太空计划将在即将召开的国会大会上予以审议。

examples.english: He was preparing the federal budget for the upcoming fiscal year.
examples.chinese: 他在做下一个财政年度的联邦预算。

centers.english: when something unpleasant is going to happen soon
centers.chinese: 令人不快的事情即将发生

examples.english: As the day of my interview loomed, I became increasingly nervous.
examples.chinese: 面试一天一天逼近，我越来越紧张了。

examples.english: With the prospect of bankruptcy looming, life is getting tough for small businesses.
examples.chinese: 小企业面临着破产的可能，它们的日子越来越艰难了。

expressions.gram: transitive phrasal verb not in passive

examples.english: The threat of nuclear war hangs over mankind.
examples.chinese: 核战争威胁着人类。

examples.english: With the court case hanging over us, we couldn't enjoy our vacation.
examples.chinese: 官司临头，我们不能享受我们的假期了。

examples.english: Union bosses fear that a strike is brewing in the coal industry.
examples.chinese: 工会的领袖们担心煤矿工业正在酝酿罢工。

examples.english: A major political row over the European question had been brewing for some time.
examples.chinese: 就欧洲问题的一场政治争论已酝酿了一段时间。

examples.english: Extra troops were usually a sign of an impending attack.
examples.chinese: 派遣增援部队通常是即将发动进攻的迹象。

examples.english: We were sorry to hear about Arlene's impending divorce.
examples.chinese: 听说阿琳快要离婚，我们很难过。

examples.english: warnings of an impending ecological disaster
examples.chinese: 面临生态灾难的警告

centers.english: when something happens after a long time

examples.english: After a lot of questioning, James finally admitted he had taken the car.
examples.chinese: 经过一再盘问，詹姆斯终于承认他开走了那辆车。

examples.english: In the end, I decided that the best thing to do was to ask Billy for help.
examples.chinese: 最后我拿定主意：最好是请比利帮忙。

examples.english: The plane eventually arrived at 6:30 - over three hours late.
examples.chinese: 飞机最终在6：30到达，迟到了三个多小时。

examples.english: I'm really glad that Ken's found a job at last.
examples.chinese: 我很高兴肯终于找到了工作。

examples.english: At last the rain stopped and the players came back on the field.
examples.chinese: 雨终于停了，选手们又回到了球场上。

examples.english: At long last he was able to see his family again.
examples.chinese: 久别之后他终于又能见到家人了。

examples.english: Sooner or later this would end up in the papers, and I would be out of a job.
examples.chinese: 这件事迟早会被报纸披露出来，到时候我就要失业了。

examples.english: I'm sure Brian will turn up sooner or later.
examples.chinese: 我肯定布赖恩早晚会露面的。

examples.english: He is worried that sooner or later his business will fail.
examples.chinese: 他担心自己的生意迟早会失败。

examples.english: They're bound to find a cure for cancer one day.
examples.chinese: 他们迟早会找到治疗癌症的方法。

examples.english: I knew that we would meet again one day.
examples.chinese: 我早知道我们有一天会再相见的。

examples.english: One day ordinary people will be able to travel in space.
examples.chinese: 总有一天普通人也能去太空旅行的。

examples.english: She started as an office junior, and in time became director of the whole company.
examples.chinese: 她刚开始是办公室小职员，后来成了公司的董事。

examples.english: Jarvis was a strange man, but in time I got to like him.
examples.chinese: 贾维斯是个奇怪的人，但我逐渐地喜欢上了他。

expressions.gram: intransitive phrasal verb not in progressive

examples.english: Forbes ended up in prison for not paying his taxes.
examples.chinese: 福布斯因未付税结果进了监狱。

examples.english: The sweater that my mum knitted ended up twice the size it should have been.
examples.chinese: 我妈织的那件毛衣结果比本该织的尺寸大了一倍。

examples.english: We ended up having to postpone our vacation.
examples.chinese: 到后来我们只得推迟了假期。

examples.english: Our chess game finally ended up as a draw.
examples.chinese: 我们那盘棋结果下成了和局。

centers.english: when someone always does something or something always happens
centers.chinese: 某人总是做某事，或某事总是发生

examples.english: I always say my prayers before I go to bed.
examples.chinese: 我睡觉前总要做祷告。

examples.english: She was always ready to listen to my problems.
examples.chinese: 她总是乐于倾听我的烦恼。

examples.english: Why do you always blame me for everything?
examples.chinese: 你怎么老是什么事情都来怪我？

examples.english: He always has sandwiches for his lunch.
examples.chinese: 他中午总是吃三明治。

examples.english: My dad's always telling me I should get my hair cut.
examples.chinese: 我爸爸老是叫我去理发。

examples.english: My brother is almost always late.
examples.chinese: 我弟弟几乎每次都要迟到。

examples.english: My neck hurts every time I turn my head.
examples.chinese: 我每次转头脖子都要痛。

examples.english: Every time we talk about money, we get into an argument.
examples.chinese: 我们每次谈到钱都要吵架。

examples.english: It seems like every time I play basketball, I get hurt.
examples.chinese: 我好像每次一打篮球就要受伤。

examples.english: He calls Nancy whenever he's in town.
examples.chinese: 他每次进城都去看望南希。

examples.english: Feel free to use my computer whenever you need to.
examples.chinese: 你什么时候需要电脑，就随便用我的吧。

examples.english: I try to use public transport whenever possible.
examples.chinese: 我尽可能使用公共交通工具。

examples.english: Thousands of tourists visit Spain every year.
examples.chinese: 每年都有成千上万的游客到西班牙观光。

examples.english: We go to the movies almost every Saturday night.
examples.chinese: 我们几乎每个星期六晚上都去看电影。

examples.english: Every year on her birthday, Jackie throws a big party at the Vineyard House.
examples.chinese: 杰基每年生日都会在葡萄庄园举行大型聚会。

examples.english: My mother goes to church every week without fail.
examples.chinese: 我母亲每个星期都必定去做礼拜。

examples.english: You must take the medication every day without fail.
examples.chinese: 你必须每天服这药。

centers.english: happening all the time, without stopping or changing
centers.chinese: 不停止地或不变地一直在发生

examples.english: The temperature of the lake is always below fifty-five degrees.
examples.chinese: 湖里的水温总在55度以下。

examples.english: Ron is always in a bad mood in the morning.
examples.chinese: 罗恩早上的时候总是没有好心情。

examples.english: Our upstairs neighbor always keeps to himself. We hardly know him at all.
examples.chinese: 我们楼上的邻居总是不和别人往来，我们根本不了解他。

examples.english: Gabrielle talks about her kids all the time.
examples.chinese: 加布丽埃勒老是说起她的孩子。

examples.english: The couple upstairs argue all the time.
examples.chinese: 楼上那对夫妻老是吵架。

examples.english: I don't have to wear my glasses all the time - just for reading.
examples.chinese: 我不需要一直戴眼镜—只在阅读的时候戴。

examples.english: He talked about himself the whole time I was with him.
examples.chinese: 我和他在一起的时候，他总是讲他自己。

examples.english: We realized that Duncan had been standing there the whole time.
examples.chinese: 我们发现邓肯一直都站在那里。

examples.english: Carry your passport with you at all times.
examples.chinese: 请随时带好护照。

examples.english: Keep your hotel door locked at all times.
examples.chinese: 任何时候都要锁好酒店客房门。

examples.english: Shelly constantly tries to impress her boss.
examples.chinese: 谢利经常想令老板对她留下印象。

examples.english: She constantly criticizes my cooking.
examples.chinese: 她总是批评我莱烧得不好。

examples.english: The patient must be kept under constant supervision.
examples.chinese: 那病人必须一直受到监护。

examples.english: The rains are constant in winter.
examples.chinese: 冬天多雨。

examples.english: Hardy was permanently banned from professional figure skating.
examples.chinese: 哈迪被终生禁止参加职业花样滑冰比赛。

examples.english: It's such a dangerous neighborhood that the windows of some stores are permanently barricaded.
examples.chinese: 这个街区很不安全，有些商店窗户都钉死了。

examples.english: The country seems to be in a permanent state of crisis.
examples.chinese: 这个国家好像永远都有危机。

examples.english: High unemployment rates are a perennial problem in several European countries.
examples.chinese: 失业率高是一些欧洲国家长期的问题。

examples.english: Severe and unpredictable weather is a perennial danger for mountain climbers.
examples.chinese: 天气恶劣多变历来是对登山队员的一大威胁。

examples.english: I'd like to thank you all for your unfailing love and support.
examples.chinese: 我想感谢大家始终如一的关爱和支持。

examples.english: Peter's unfailing humour made him popular with his fellow workers.
examples.chinese: 彼得一贯的幽默使他在同事当中很受欢迎。

examples.english: Julia became irritated by the child's incessant talking.
examples.chinese: 朱莉娅对这孩子没完没了地说话变得很不耐烦。

examples.english: The incessant buzz of conversation filled the student cafeteria.
examples.chinese: 学生餐厅里充满嗡嗡的谈话声，没完没了。

examples.english: Michael smokes incessantly.
examples.chinese: 迈克尔一刻不停地抽烟。

examples.english: Henry did the same thing, day in and day out, for over thirty years.
examples.chinese: 亨利三十多年来日复一日地干同一个工作。

examples.english: Investigators are working day in, day out to determine the cause of the crash.
examples.chinese: 调查人员天天都在工作，以找出交通事故的起因。

examples.english: It seems like we've been going to meetings morning, noon, and night lately.
examples.chinese: 最近我们好像一天到晚都在开会。

examples.english: We're here to help you 24/7.
examples.chinese: 我们随时在此帮助你。

examples.english: The deadline is next week, so everyone in the office is working 24/7.
examples.chinese: 最后期限是下个星期，所以办公室里人人都在没日没夜地工作。

centers.english: during the whole of an event or period of time
centers.chinese: 在某一事件的整个过程中，或在整段时间中

examples.english: I couldn't really enjoy my holiday because I was sick all the time I was there.
examples.chinese: 假期里我玩得不大开心，因为我在那里一直生病。

examples.english: All the time I was talking to him he just sat and stared at the television.
examples.chinese: 我在和他说话，他就一直坐着盯着电视机看。

examples.english: Lester was sickly all through his childhood.
examples.chinese: 莱斯特童年时体弱多病。

examples.english: Yvonne lived in Switzerland throughout the war.
examples.chinese: 伊冯娜战时住在瑞士。

examples.english: It often rains here all day long.
examples.chinese: 这里经常整天下雨。

examples.english: The music coming from the apartment upstairs kept me awake all night long.
examples.chinese: 楼上传来的音乐吵得我整夜没睡。

examples.english: I spent over an hour looking for my keys, and they were in my purse all along.
examples.chinese: 我花了一个多小时找钥匙，原来它们一直就在我的钱包里。

examples.english: He realized that she'd been right all along.
examples.chinese: 他意识到她自始至终都是对的。

expressions.text: from start to finish/from beginning to end

examples.english: It was an awful day at work - problems from start to finish.
examples.chinese: 那天上班糟透了，从头到尾都问题不断。

examples.english: The whole thing was a disaster from beginning to end.
examples.chinese: 这整件事从头到尾都糟糕透了。

centers.english: when something will always happen or always continue
centers.chinese: 某事总是发生或总在持续

examples.english: I'll always remember the day we first met.
examples.chinese: 我会永远记得我们初次相遇的那一天。

examples.english: She said she would always love him.
examples.chinese: 她说她会永远爱他。

examples.english: I'd like to stay here forever.
examples.chinese: 我希望永远都能留在这里。

examples.english: The memory of that awful day is forever etched in my mind.
examples.chinese: 那一天的可怕记忆永远印在我的脑海里。

examples.english: The accident has left Hanson permanently disabled.
examples.chinese: 这次事故使汉森终身残疾。

examples.english: Thirteen students were permanently expelled from the school.
examples.chinese: 13名学生被学校永久开除。

examples.english: It was a beautiful day, and Ellie wanted it to go on for ever and ever.
examples.chinese: 那一天真美好，埃莉希望永远都这样。

examples.english: The injury may keep him out of football for good.
examples.chinese: 这次受伤可能使他一辈子无法踢足球。

examples.english: I'd like to stay in Colorado for good.
examples.chinese: 我想永远都住在科罗拉多。

examples.english: He's given it to me for keeps.
examples.chinese: 他把这个送给我了。

examples.english: The actions of those who died in the Great War will be remembered for all time.
examples.chinese: 一次大战中死难者的事迹，我们将永志不忘。

examples.english: There's no such thing as a job for life any more.
examples.chinese: 一辈子只守一份工作，这种事情现在不会再有了。

examples.english: The abuse left him scarred for life.
examples.chinese: 这样的虐待给他留下了终身的疤痕。

examples.english: You will regret this until your dying day.
examples.chinese: 你一辈子都会后悔的。

examples.english: I will remember your kindness to my dying day.
examples.chinese: 你的好意，我永生不忘。

centers.english: when something has always happened or always been true
centers.chinese: 某事一直发生或一直是这样

examples.english: I've always admired Sean Connery.
examples.chinese: 我向来很佩服肖恩·纳里。

examples.english: Sylvia has always hated her nose.
examples.chinese: 西尔维娅一向讨厌她的鼻子。

expressions.text: for as long as you can remember

examples.english: The Watsons have lived on our street for as long as I can remember.
examples.chinese: 沃森一家在我的记忆里一直都住在我们这条街上。

examples.english: The recipe is one that my mom has been making for as long as I can remember.
examples.chinese: 在我的记忆里，妈妈一直用的是这个烹调法。

examples.english: The Agaw people have inhabited that region since time immemorial.
examples.chinese: 阿高人自古以来就居住在那个地区。

centers.english: remaining or continuing forever

examples.english: The car accident has caused permanent damage to her eyesight.
examples.chinese: 那次车祸对她的视力造成永久的损害。

examples.english: Most police departments keep a permanent record of all violent crimes committed in their area.
examples.chinese: 多数警察部门都给辖区内的所有暴力犯罪事件作永久记录。

examples.english: The possibility of eternal life is a principal belief of many religions.
examples.chinese: 存在永生是许多宗教的主要信仰。

examples.english: the search for eternal youth
examples.chinese: 追求永葆青春

examples.english: If you can do this for me I will be eternally grateful.
examples.chinese: 如果你能为我做成此事，我将感激不尽。

examples.english: life everlasting
examples.chinese: 永生

examples.english: the Buddhist's search for everlasting peace
examples.chinese: 佛教徒对永恒平静的追寻

examples.english: For many working mothers, balancing the demands of children and job is a perpetual challenge.
examples.chinese: 对于许多在职母亲来说，在孩子和工作的需要之间把握好平衡，是一种永远的挑战。

examples.english: Her husband's perpetual jealousy strongly affected their marriage.
examples.chinese: 她丈夫没完没了的嫉妒大大影响了他们的婚姻。

examples.english: To Miguel, the boredom of married life seemed never-ending.
examples.chinese: 对于米格尔来说，婚后的生活好像永远都是这样单调乏味。

examples.english: Keeping the house neat and clean is a never-ending battle.
examples.chinese: 要把家里保持整洁是永远都忙不完的。

examples.english: It's difficult to really imagine an infinite universe.
examples.chinese: 很难真的想象出一个无限的宇宙。

examples.english: She was a woman of seemingly infinite patience.
examples.chinese: 她好像有无限的耐心。

centers.english: at any time in the past or future
centers.chinese: 在过去或将来的任何时候·

examples.english: Have you ever bought any of their products?
examples.chinese: 你买过他们的什么产品吗?

examples.english: When he left, Bartlett didn't know if he'd ever see Alaska again.
examples.chinese: 巴特利特离开的时候不知道自己是否还能再见到阿拉斯加。

examples.english: I don't think I'll ever get used to that feeling of excitement before a show.
examples.chinese: 演出前的那种紧张心情，我想我永远也适应不了。

examples.english: Have you ever been on a ship like this before?
examples.chinese: 你以前乘坐过这样的船吗？

examples.english: That was the biggest mistake I ever made.
examples.chinese: 那是我犯过的最大的一个错误。

examples.english: Within a few years of the two World Wars, the standard of living of Western European countries was higher than ever before.
examples.chinese: 两次世界大战后的几年里，西欧国家的生活水平达到了前所未有的程度。

examples.english: ‘Of course, no one should have to suffer at any time,’ said the general gruffly, ‘but things are different in times of war.’
examples.chinese: “当然，在任何时候都没有人是必须吃苦的，”将军不客气地说，“但是战争时期就不一样了。”

examples.english: Have you at any time met with the defendant?
examples.chinese: 你是否曾遇见过被告？

expressions.text: at any time in history/in our existence etc

examples.english: There are more single parents today than at any time in history.
examples.chinese: 今天，单亲父母比历史上任何时候都多。

examples.english: Robinson has won more matches than any coach in history.
examples.chinese: 鲁宾逊比历史上任何一位教练赢得的比赛都要多。

examples.english: His arrest ended the longest manhunt in history.
examples.chinese: 他的被捕结束了这次历史上历时最长的追捕行动。

examples.english: Spielberg then went on to direct ‘Close Encounters of the Third Kind’, which became one of the highest earning films in history.
examples.chinese: 斯皮尔伯格接着又导演了《第三类接触》，这是历史上创最高票房纪录的影片之一。

examples.english: It was the first attempt in history to assemble representatives of all the major regions.
examples.chinese: 把所有主要地区的代表都召集起来，这在历史上还是第一次。

examples.english: I've never owned a gun in my life.
examples.chinese: 我这辈子没拥有过枪。

examples.english: Susan felt she had never worked so hard in her life as she did that day.
examples.chinese: 苏珊感到她这一生从来没有像那天那样卖力过。

examples.english: He knew that this was one of the saddest things he'd ever have to do in his life.
examples.chinese: 他知道，这是他一生中所做过的最伤心的事之一。

examples.english: For the first time in his life, Yossarian prayed.
examples.chinese: 约塞连这辈子第一次做了祷告。

examples.english: Fleetwood Mac's ‘Rumours’ is one of the best-selling rock albums of all time.
examples.chinese: 弗利特伍德·马克的《谣言》是有史以来最畅销的摇滚专辑之一。

examples.english: My favourite joke of all time is the one about the donkey who goes to the doctor and says ...
examples.chinese: 我一直以来最喜欢的一个笑话是讲一头驴子跑去看医生，它说…

examples.english: a list of the 100 Most Influential Women of All Time
examples.chinese: 历史上最有影响力的100位女性名录

centers.english: NEVER

examples.english: ‘Have you ever been to Paris?’ ‘No, never.’
examples.chinese: “你去过巴黎吗？”“没有，从来没有去过。”

examples.english: Ali had never seen snow before.
examples.chinese: 阿里以前从来没见过雪。

examples.english: The view was spectacular - I'll never forget it.
examples.chinese: 那风景美丽极了—我永生难忘。

examples.english: He walks right past me and never even says ‘hello’.
examples.chinese: 他就从我身边走过，从来都不打招呼。
