examples.english: The crops had failed, and once more, famine threatened the region.
examples.chinese: 作物歉收，饥荒再一次威胁着这个地区。

examples.english: Once again, I must remind you of the seriousness of the problems we face.
examples.chinese: 我必须再一次提醒你我们所面临的问题的严重性。

examples.english: The cost of living is once more on the increase.
examples.chinese: 生活费又在上涨。

examples.english: Once again, the City Council has decided to ignore the interests of the taxpayers.
examples.chinese: 市议会再一次决定置纳税人的利益于不顾。

examples.english: Yet again, I was forced to ask my parents for money.
examples.chinese: 我再一次被迫向父母要钱。

examples.english: The opening of the new museum has been delayed yet again.
examples.chinese: 新博物馆的启用一拖再拖。

examples.english: Yet again, you're late turning in your assignment.
examples.chinese: 你的作业又迟交了。

examples.english: It was the last day of their vacation and it was raining yet again.
examples.chinese: 那是他们假期的最后一天，天又是下着雨。

examples.english: Can we practise the last part just once more?
examples.chinese: 我们就再练一次最后一部分好吗?

examples.english: I'm going to ask you just one more time: where did you get this money?
examples.chinese: 我最后再问你一次：你这钱是从哪里来的？

examples.english: She wanted to see her grandfather once more before he died.
examples.chinese: 她想在祖父去世之前再看他一眼。

examples.english: I think we need to take a fresh look at the problem.
examples.chinese: 我想我们需要重新考虑一下这个问题。

examples.english: The army is planning a fresh attempt to regain control of the capital.
examples.chinese: 军队正在计划重新发动进攻收复首都。

examples.english: ‘Sue, Steve's on the phone asking for you.’ ‘Oh, not again!’
examples.chinese: “休，史蒂夫来电话找你。”“噢，别又来了！”

examples.english: ‘Not again!’ said Anna, as the word CANCELLED appeared next to her flight number for the third time.
examples.chinese: “别又这样！”安娜说。她的航班编号旁边已是第三次显示“取消”了。

centers.english: to do something again

expressions.text: do something again/ do something over

examples.english: I'd like you to do this exercise again.
examples.chinese: 这道习题我要你重做一遍。

examples.english: She spilt coffee on the application form and had to do it all again.
examples.chinese: 她把咖啡泼到了申请表上，所以不得不重写一遍。

examples.english: I'm afraid you'll have to do it over.
examples.chinese: 恐怕你得重做一遍了。

examples.english: Holmes repeated the experiment several times and got the same results.
examples.chinese: 福尔摩斯把这个实验反复做了好几次，都得出一样的结果。

examples.english: Repeat this exercise ten times every day, and you'll soon have firmer, more muscular thighs.
examples.chinese: 这个运动每天重复十次，不久便可拥有一双更加紧实健壮的大腿。

examples.english: I can't read a word of this - you'll have to redo it.
examples.chinese: 我一个字都看不清楚—你得重写一遍。

examples.english: The wallpaper came off and we had to redo the whole thing.
examples.chinese: 墙纸脱落了，我们只得全部重贴。

examples.english: Julie's had to retake her driving test at least three times.
examples.chinese: 朱莉的驾驶考试至少已重考三次了。

examples.english: He decided to retake the course and try to get a higher grade.
examples.chinese: 他决定重考这门课，想把分数考得高一些。

examples.english: The exam is in June. Retakes will be held in September.
examples.chinese: 考试是在6月份，补考将在9月份进行。

examples.english: At the police station they asked me the same questions all over again.
examples.chinese: 在警局里他们又再问了我同样的问题。

examples.english: The prospect of writing the report all over again made me feel completely depressed.
examples.chinese: 这份报告可能要重新再写一遍，这使我非常沮丧。

examples.english: The computer crashed and deleted all my work - I had to start the essay all over again.
examples.chinese: 电脑瘫痪了，把我做的所有东西都删掉了—我只得重新再写那篇论文。

examples.english: ‘You've been drinking again, haven't you!’ ‘Oh God, here we go again.’
examples.chinese: “你是不是又喝酒了！”“我的天，又来了。”

centers.english: to start doing something again

expressions.text: go back to/return to/get back to

examples.english: After she hung up the phone, she went back to her knitting.
examples.chinese: 她挂了电话，继续编织。

examples.english: He took a drink, wiped his forehead and returned to his digging.
examples.chinese: 他喝了点东西，擦了擦额头，然后继续挖。

examples.english: OK, lunch break's over - time to get back to work.
examples.chinese: 好了，午间休息时间过了—该回去工作了。

centers.english: to start talking about something again

expressions.text: go back to/get back to/return to

examples.english: I'll go back to your question in a few minutes.
examples.chinese: 我过几分钟再来回答你的问题。

examples.english: But getting back to what the real estate agent said, do you think we could get more for the house if we had it painted first?
examples.chinese: 现在回到房产经纪人说的话，你说我们要是先把房子粉刷一下，价钱就能卖得更高吗?

examples.english: I think we can return to this argument later.
examples.chinese: 我想我们可以以后再讨论这个论点。

centers.english: happening or doing something many times
centers.chinese: 多次发生或多次做某事

examples.english: I've told you again and again - don't play ball near the windows.
examples.chinese: 我一再告诉你—不要靠近窗边玩球。

examples.english: They hit him again and again until he was unconscious.
examples.chinese: 他们一次又一次地打他，直到他失去了知觉。

examples.english: This kind of ignorance is something that I see again and again.
examples.chinese: 这一类的无知行为，我屡见不鲜。

examples.english: Motorists used the roads despite repeated warnings of snow.
examples.chinese: 汽车司机不理会多次积雪警告，还是开车上路。

examples.english: Repeated attempts to fix the satellite have failed.
examples.chinese: 修复卫星的数次努力都以失败告终。

examples.english: Flooding is a recurrent problem in countries such as Bangladesh.
examples.chinese: 在孟加拉国等一些国家，水患是个经常出现的问题。

examples.english: a recurrent infection
examples.chinese: 反复感染

examples.english: Men trying to escape from the women who love them is a recurrent theme in Greene's novels.
examples.chinese: 男人试图摆脱深爱自己的女人，这是格林的小说中反复出现的一个主题。

examples.english: I have this recurring dream in which my teeth are black and rotted.
examples.chinese: 我反复做这个梦，梦见我的牙齿黑黑的，都蛀掉了。

examples.english: I've told him over and over again not to call me at work, but he won't listen.
examples.chinese: 我一再地告诉他，叫他不要在我上班的时候打电话给我，可他就是不听。

examples.english: She practised the lines over and over again until they were word perfect.
examples.chinese: 她一遍遍地练习台词，直到滚瓜烂熟。

centers.english: on or on top of something
centers.chinese: 在某物上面或在某物之上

examples.english: Richard put the letter down on the table.
examples.chinese: 理查德把信放在桌子上。

examples.english: Neil Armstrong was the first person ever to set foot on the Moon.
examples.chinese: 尼尔·阿姆斯特朗是第一个登上月球的人。

examples.english: There weren't enough chairs so I had to sit on the floor.
examples.chinese: 椅子不够，我只好席地而坐。

examples.english: Four bottles of wine were standing on the shelf.
examples.chinese: 架子上放着四瓶酒。

examples.english: On top of the church was a large illuminated cross.
examples.chinese: 教堂顶上是一个巨大的发光十字架。

examples.english: The plane crashed on top of Sugarbush Mountain, in Vermont.
examples.chinese: 飞机在佛蒙特州舒格布什山顶失事。

expressions.text: one on top of the other

examples.english: Joey stacked the crates one on top of the other.
examples.chinese: 乔伊把那些板条箱一个个摞起来。

examples.english: Nancy walked onto the stage and took the microphone in her hand.
examples.chinese: 南希走上舞台接过麦克风。

examples.english: Spoon the mixture onto the top of the cake and spread it evenly.
examples.chinese: 用匙把混合料舀到蛋糕上面均匀地涂开。

examples.english: There was a white sheet over the victim's body.
examples.chinese: 受害者的尸体上盖着一块白布。

examples.english: She wore a coat over her sweater.
examples.chinese: 她在毛衣外面穿了件外套。

examples.english: She put a blanket over the child's legs to keep him warm.
examples.chinese: 她给孩子腿上盖了块毯子，使他暖和。

examples.english: He spilled beer all over my feet.
examples.chinese: 他把啤酒都洒在我脚上。

examples.english: There were toys all over the floor.
examples.chinese: 地上到处是玩具。

centers.english: to be on the surface of water

examples.english: Ice is less dense than water, which is why it floats.
examples.chinese: 冰的密度小于水，所以会浮在水上。

examples.english: Annie was floating on her back in the water.
examples.chinese: 安妮脸朝上地浮在水上。

examples.english: They could see something pale and white floating in the water.
examples.chinese: 他们看到一个灰白色的东西在水中漂浮。

expressions.text: float on water/the surface/the river etc

examples.english: a cup of coffee with black bits floating on the surface
examples.chinese: 上面浮着些黑点的一杯咖啡

examples.english: The empty boat floated off down the river.
examples.chinese: 那空空的小船随着河水漂走了。

examples.english: Floating plants are useful because they shade the surface of the water.
examples.chinese: 浮水植物有助荫蔽水面。

examples.english: a massive floating platform
examples.chinese: 大型浮台

examples.english: I moved my hands and feet slightly to stay afloat.
examples.chinese: 我轻轻摆动手脚使自己浮在水面上。

examples.english: Those in the water tried to hold on to the boats that were still afloat.
examples.chinese: 那些掉在水里的人拼命想攀住仍未下沉的船只。

centers.english: since a particular time or event in the past
centers.chinese: 自从过去的某一时间或某一事件以后

examples.english: I've had this car since 1992.
examples.chinese: 我从1992年就有了这辆车。

examples.english: She hasn't had a night out since she had the baby.
examples.chinese: 她有了孩子之后，夜里就没有出去过了。！

examples.english: The turkey must be done by now - it's been in the oven since 11 o'clock.
examples.chinese: 火鸡现在肯定熟了——11点就放进烤炉了。

examples.english: I saw her early this morning, but I haven't seen her since.
examples.chinese: 今天一早我看见过她，但自此就没见过她了。

examples.english: Since when have you had a computer?
examples.chinese: 你从什么时候起有电脑的？

examples.english: Since leaving the army, he's spent most of his time looking for a job.
examples.chinese: 退伍后，他大部分时间都在找工作。

examples.english: He arrived in Hollywood back in 1952. Since then he's appeared in over 100 movies.
examples.chinese: 早在1952年他就进了好莱坞，此后演过一百多部影片。

examples.english: I've been getting these pains in my back ever since I fell down the stairs.
examples.chinese: 我从楼梯上摔下来以后，就一直背痛。

examples.english: He's been acting different ever since his arrest.
examples.chinese: 他自从被捕以后，行为一直很反常。

examples.english: Joan had been an early riser ever since she was a child.
examples.chinese: 琼从小就有早起的习惯。

examples.english: Ever since I can remember, I've wanted to be a dancer.
examples.chinese: 从我记事起我就一直想成为舞蹈演员。

examples.english: Matt moved to San Francisco in 1984 to go to medical school, and he's been there ever since.
examples.chinese: 1984年，马特迁居圣弗郎西斯科并上了医学院，后来就一直待在那里。

examples.english: I started an exercise program five years ago, and ever since then I've felt a lot better.
examples.chinese: 五年前我开始锻炼，从那以后我就感觉好多了。

examples.english: Omar's been studying English for two years now.
examples.chinese: 奥马尔学英语迄今有两年了。

examples.english: We've been waiting here for over two hours!
examples.chinese: 我们在这里等了两个多小时了！

examples.english: Daniel's been complaining of a stomach ache for a couple of days.
examples.chinese: 丹尼尔说肚子痛有好几天了。

examples.english: I hadn't seen Tim for a while, and I was surprised by how much weight he'd gained.
examples.chinese: 我有一阵子没有见到蒂姆，奇怪他竟然长胖了那么多。

examples.english: From the first time we met, I knew we would be good friends.
examples.chinese: 从我们第一次见面起，我就知道我们会成为好朋友。

examples.english: Timmy Connell has been a problem in class right from the beginning of term.
examples.chinese: 学期一开始，蒂米·康奈尔就成了班上的一个问题。

examples.english: We had a big fight that fall, and from then on he never treated me the same.
examples.chinese: 那年秋天我们大吵了一场，从那以后他待我就不一样了。

examples.english: Benson became chairman of the company on October 12th, and starting from that day things have steadily improved.
examples.chinese: 本森于10月12日当上公司的董事长，从那天起情况就逐步在好转。

centers.english: in a container or other enclosed space
centers.chinese: 在容器或其他封闭的空间内

examples.english: There's some pizza in the refrigerator.
examples.chinese: 冰箱里有些比萨饼。

examples.english: I think I have some tissues in my purse.
examples.chinese: 我记得钱包里有几张卫生纸。

examples.english: Perhaps I left my wallet in my other jacket pocket.
examples.chinese: 也许我把钱包放在另一件夹克衫的口袋里了。

examples.english: Valuables should be kept in the hotel safe.
examples.chinese: 贵重物品应存放在旅馆保险箱内。

examples.english: She stayed in the car while I went to the bank.
examples.chinese: 她待在车里，我去银行。

examples.english: There's a key inside the envelope.
examples.chinese: 信封里有把钥匙。

examples.english: She opened the package to find another, smaller package inside.
examples.chinese: 她打开包裹后发现里面另有一个稍小的包裹。

examples.english: Jem opened the box. Inside, surrounded by cotton wool, was a little brooch.
examples.chinese: 杰姆把盒子打开。盒子内是由棉花包着的一枚小胸针。

examples.english: The ship and its contents are at the bottom of the lake.
examples.chinese: 船和船内的东西躺在湖底。

examples.english: The customs officer opened my suitcase and examined the contents.
examples.chinese: 海关人员打开了我的手提箱，检查了箱里的东西。

examples.english: Add the contents of the saucepan to the bean mixture.
examples.chinese: 把平底锅里的东西加到豆混合料上。

centers.english: in a building or room

examples.english: Francis and his friend were drinking tea in his room.
examples.chinese: 弗朗西斯和朋友在他的房间里喝茶。

examples.english: The movie was bad, but at least it was cool in the theater.
examples.chinese: 电影很糟糕，但至少戏院里很凉快。

examples.english: There isn't a comfortable chair in the house.
examples.chinese: 屋子里没有一把舒适的椅子。

examples.english: She had to spend a week in the hospital.
examples.chinese: 她只得在医院里住了一星期。

examples.english: The lights were on inside the house.
examples.chinese: 房子内的灯亮着。

examples.english: Inside it was lovely and warm.
examples.chinese: 屋子里惬意而温暖。

examples.english: I sat outside the interview room and wondered what was going on inside.
examples.chinese: 我坐在面试室的外面，不知道里面在发生什么事。

examples.english: It was too sunny to think of staying indoors.
examples.chinese: 阳光如此明媚，根本不想待在屋内。

examples.english: Some arts and crafts projects are too messy to be done indoors.
examples.chinese: 有些工艺美术作品做起来又脏又乱，不能在室内完成。

examples.english: The hotel has a heated indoor swimming pool.
examples.chinese: 酒店中有个室内温水游泳池。

examples.english: This year, the world indoor tennis championship will take place in Paris.
examples.chinese: 今年的世界室内网球锦标赛将在巴黎举行。

examples.english: Traditionally, markets were held outdoors, but many cities in Britain now have indoor markets.
examples.chinese: 传统上市场都是设在室外的，但英国的许多城市现在都有室内市场。

centers.english: the part of something that is inside

examples.english: All I've seen of Australia is the inside of a hotel room at Sydney airport.
examples.chinese: 我在澳大利亚所看到的就是悉尼机场一个旅馆房间的内部。

examples.english: The inside of a camera is painted black to prevent light reflecting onto the film.
examples.chinese: 相机内部被涂成了黑色，以防止光线反射到胶片上。

examples.english: The door had been locked from the inside and the police had to break it down in order to get in.
examples.chinese: 门从里面被锁上了，警察为了进去只好把门砸了。

examples.english: the car's leather interior
examples.chinese: 这辆汽车皮质的内部

examples.english: My eyes gradually became accustomed to the gloomy interior of the store.
examples.chinese: 我的眼睛逐渐适应了商店内部的昏暗。

centers.english: in a town, country, or area

examples.english: My husband hates driving in London.
examples.chinese: 我丈夫讨厌在伦敦市内开车。

examples.english: Everyone in town knew Archie.
examples.chinese: 镇上每个人都认识阿奇。

examples.english: The company's Spanish subsidiary is based in Madrid.
examples.chinese: 该公司在西班牙的子公司设在马德里。

examples.english: There are many different species of wild cat in Africa and Asia.
examples.chinese: 在非洲和亚洲有许多不同种类的野猫。

examples.english: Enemy troops are now three miles inside their territory.
examples.chinese: 敌军现已进入他们的领土三英里。

examples.english: The guerrillas were said to be operating from bases inside the country.
examples.chinese: 据说，游击队从国内的基地开展活动。

examples.english: Children must remain within the school grounds during the lunch break.
examples.chinese: 午餐时间，孩子们必须待在校内。

examples.english: If the ball lands within the white lines it counts as a fair serve.
examples.chinese: 球落在白线内，就算发球有效。

examples.english: Russia faces many internal problems, for example inflation.
examples.chinese: 俄罗斯面临许多内部问题，比如通货膨胀。

examples.english: The US was accused of interfering in the internal affairs of the country.
examples.chinese: 美国被指责干涉了该国的内政。

centers.english: in a company, organization, or group
centers.chinese: 在公司、组织或一群人中

examples.english: Homelessness is a major problem in society today.
examples.chinese: 无家可归是当今社会的一个主要问题。

examples.english: The mood in the Republican Party is one of optimism.
examples.chinese: 共和党内的情绪很乐观。

examples.english: Some analysts in Wall Street are predicting that the company will merge with a rival firm.
examples.chinese: 华尔街的一些分析师预计该公司将与一家竞争对手公司合并。

examples.english: From inside, the company seems less successful.
examples.chinese: 从内部看，公司好像没有那样成功。

examples.english: A struggle is going on inside the party between the moderates and the right wing.
examples.chinese: 党内的温和派与右翼之间正进行着一场斗争。

examples.english: According to inside information, many members of the security forces are concerned about this problem.
examples.chinese: 据内部消息，保安部队中有许多人对此问题很关心。

examples.english: Police are saying it was an inside job a crime committed by someone inside an organization.
examples.chinese: 警方说此案是内部人员所为。

examples.english: The landowners have always regarded themselves as an elite group within society.
examples.chinese: 地主们一向将自己视为社会中的精英。

examples.english: Different factions within the party are fighting for overall control.
examples.chinese: 党内各派正在争夺全面控制权。

examples.english: Violence within the family is often alcohol-related.
examples.chinese: 家庭暴力常与喝酒有关。

examples.english: Many companies use the program for internal accounting purposes.
examples.chinese: 许多公司将此程序用于内部会计。

examples.english: After the accident, NASA conducted an internal investigation.
examples.chinese: 事故发生后，美国国家航空航天局进行了一次内部调查。

examples.english: In November the directors wrote an internal memorandum suggesting that the company should close down three of its factories.
examples.chinese: 在11月份，董事们写了一份内部备忘录，建议公司关闭三家工厂。

examples.english: The job will only be advertised internally inside the organization.
examples.chinese: 这份工作只在公司内部招聘。

examples.english: Many companies run in-house management courses for their staff.
examples.chinese: 许多公司都在内部为员工开设管理课程。

examples.english: All our artwork is done by in-house designers; we don't normally use freelance people.
examples.chinese: 我们所有的插图均是由内部人员设计的，我们通常不用自由职业者。

examples.english: This magazine is produced in-house.
examples.chinese: 该杂志是内部编制的。

examples.english: Insiders have been predicting that the company would be involved in a takeover bid for some time.
examples.chinese: 知情者预测该公司可能卷入收购之中，且已经有一段时间了。

examples.english: Political insiders believe Republicans won't gain control of the Senate.
examples.chinese: 政治知情者相信共和党不会控制参议院。

examples.english: Several people went to prison after the investigation into insider trading.
examples.chinese: 对内幕交易展开调查后有好几个人进了监狱。

centers.english: in a person's body or mind
centers.chinese: 在一个人的身体或心里

examples.english: I have a pain in my stomach.
examples.chinese: 我肚子痛。

examples.english: Paul felt a terrible cramp in his left leg.
examples.chinese: 保罗感到左腿抽筋抽得厉害。

examples.english: We shall be studying the effects of these bacteria in the intestine.
examples.chinese: 我们将研究这些细菌在肠内的作用。

examples.english: All these memories of Judith are still fresh in my mind.
examples.chinese: 所有这些有关朱迪思的记忆在我心中仍很清晰。

examples.english: Mrs Jones suffered serious internal injuries as a result of the accident.
examples.chinese: 由于这起事故，琼斯太太受了严重内伤。

examples.english: The doctor said they found some signs of internal bleeding.
examples.chinese: 医生说他们发现有内出血的迹象。

examples.english: He was bleeding internally and had to be operated on immediately.
examples.chinese: 他在内出血，必须立刻动手术。

examples.english: Kate tried to make jokes but inside she was furious.
examples.chinese: 凯特努力说笑话，但心里头火冒三丈。

examples.english: I desperately needed some way to vent all the anger and frustration I felt inside.
examples.chinese: 我迫切需要想个办法排遣胸中的怒火与沮丧。

examples.english: If he has any inner doubts, he doesn't show them.
examples.chinese: 如果他心里有什么疑问的话，他并未表现出来。

examples.english: Terri has an inner confidence that her sister lacks.
examples.chinese: 特里具有她妹妹欠缺的内在的自信。

centers.english: in a book, newspaper, speech, or piece of writing etc
centers.chinese: 在书、报纸、演说或文章等之中

examples.english: Did you read that article in ‘Newsweek’?
examples.chinese: 你看过《新闻周刊》上的那篇文章了吗？

examples.english: Romance! Adventure! Passion! They're all in this week's ‘Woman’ magazine.
examples.chinese: 浪漫！冒险！激情！这一切尽在本周的《妇女》杂志中。

examples.english: There are some wonderful descriptive passages in the novel.
examples.chinese: 小说中有些段落的描写非常出色。

examples.english: Inside there are lots of handy hints to help you take better pictures.
examples.chinese: 其中有许多便捷的提示，能帮助你拍出更出色的照片。

examples.english: Free inside! A monthly horoscope guide!
examples.chinese: 里面有免费的内容！有每月星座运程！

examples.english: The letter was burned and its contents will never be known.
examples.chinese: 信被烧了，信中的内容永远不会有人知道了。

examples.english: A computer disk can store the entire contents of a set of encyclopedias.
examples.chinese: 一张电脑磁盘可储存一套百科全书的全部内容。

examples.english: The contents of the report are expected to show that the government acted wrongly.
examples.chinese: 大家预期报告内容将显示政府采取的行动是错误的。

examples.english: She glanced at the table of contents to see what stories were included.
examples.chinese: 她瞥了一眼目录，看看包含了哪些故事。

examples.english: Many of the essays are political in content.
examples.chinese: 许多文章的内容都是政治。

examples.english: The software, designed for children, has good graphics and animation that doesn't overwhelm the content.
examples.chinese: 这种专为儿童设计的软件有高质量的图片和动画，对内容而言却并不喧宾夺主。

examples.english: People pay as much attention to your voice as to the content of your speech.
examples.chinese: 听众对你的声音和发言内容同样关注。

centers.english: from the outside towards the inside

examples.english: Jane went into the living-room and sat down on the sofa.
examples.chinese: 简走进起居室，坐在沙发上。

examples.english: Pour half a pint of milk into a small pan and warm it gently.
examples.chinese: 把半品脱牛奶倒入小锅中，然后慢慢加热。

examples.english: Rachel jumped into her car and sped off in the direction of the hospital.
examples.chinese: 雷切尔跳入车中，朝着医院方向飞速驶去。

examples.english: Edwards is charged with trying to smuggle 20 kg of cannabis into the country.
examples.chinese: 爱德华兹由于试图走私20公斤大麻到该国而被起诉。

examples.english: Come in! The door's not locked.
examples.chinese: 请进！门没锁。

examples.english: A big car pulled up and the driver told me to get in.
examples.chinese: 一辆大汽车停了下来，司机叫我坐进去。

examples.english: Maureen stood at the door, looking in.
examples.chinese: 莫琳站在门口朝里张望。

examples.english: Do you want me to put it in a bag for you?
examples.chinese: 你要我把它装包吗？

examples.english: She went in the bathroom and turned on the tap.
examples.chinese: 她走进浴室，打开了水龙头。

examples.english: Tom ran back inside and called the police.
examples.chinese: 汤姆往回跑进去打电话报警。

examples.english: I put my hand inside my bag, searching for my passport.
examples.chinese: 我伸手进包里找我的护照。

examples.english: The main door opens inwards.
examples.chinese: 大门朝里开。

examples.english: All the windows faced inward across the courtyard.
examples.chinese: 所有的窗都朝院子里面开。

centers.english: to have something such as a television, car, house etc
centers.chinese: 有某物，如电视机、汽车、房子等

examples.english: Most families in England have a car, and over 25% of them have two cars.
examples.chinese: 英格兰大多数家庭都拥有汽车，其中超过25%的家庭有两部车。

examples.english: ‘Have you got a garden in your new place?’ ‘Yes, we have.’
examples.chinese: “你的新居有花园吗？”“有的。”

examples.english: They have a houseboat out on the lake.
examples.chinese: 他们在湖上有间船屋。

examples.english: ‘Do you have a phone here?’ ‘Yes sir, we do.’
examples.chinese: “你们这儿有电话吗？”“有的，先生。”

examples.english: Have you got your own computer at home?
examples.chinese: 你家里有自己的电脑吗？

examples.english: There aren't many people with cars in this part of town -- they're too poor.
examples.chinese: 镇上这地区有车子的人不多—他们太穷了。

examples.english: Taking the bus across the country appeals to people with more time than money.
examples.chinese: 乘公共汽车走遍全国对于钱少时间多的人来说很有吸引力。

examples.english: Anybody with shares in the company is urged to contact the receivers to register a claim.
examples.chinese: 凡持有该公司股份者必须与破产管理人联系作所有权登记。

examples.english: Andy and his wife own a vacation home near the beach.
examples.chinese: 安迪和他妻子在海滩附近拥有一处度假的居所。

examples.english: The company was previously owned by the French government.
examples.chinese: 这家公司早前由法国政府拥有。

examples.english: American newspapers in different cities are often owned by the same company.
examples.chinese: 美国不同城市里的报纸经常为同一家公司所有。

examples.english: The number of nations that possess nuclear weapons has risen.
examples.chinese: 拥有核武器的国家数量增多了。

examples.english: Hamly admitted illegally possessing a handgun.
examples.chinese: 哈姆利承认自己非法拥有手枪。

examples.english: The caller claimed to possess valuable information about the boy's whereabouts.
examples.chinese: 来电者称，他掌握了那名男孩下落的重要信息。

centers.english: to have something with you

examples.english: Excuse me, do you have change for a dollar?
examples.chinese: 不好意思，你能把一美元换成零钱吗？

examples.english: Have you got a pen I could borrow?
examples.chinese: 你有笔我可以借用一下吗？

examples.english: Here, I have a map.
examples.chinese: 嗨，我这儿有一张地图。

examples.english: I think you've got my tickets.
examples.chinese: 我想我的票在你那儿。

examples.english: The dancers had elaborate costumes with long embroidered skirts.
examples.chinese: 舞蹈演员们穿着华丽的服装，包括长长的绣花裙子。

examples.english: There's a man at the door with a parcel for you.
examples.chinese: 门口有个人有包裹给你。

examples.english: A woman with a baby in a stroller was looking at clothes.
examples.chinese: 一名妇女把婴儿放在婴儿车上推着看衣服。

examples.english: Rob is the guy with the blue jacket.
examples.chinese: 罗布是那个穿蓝夹克的家伙。

examples.english: I don't have enough change on me for the parking meter.
examples.chinese: 我身上没有足够的零钱付停车费。

examples.english: Jim is the only guy I know who always has a handkerchief on him.
examples.chinese: 吉姆是我知道的唯一一个身上总是带着手帕的人。

examples.english: Her address is in my diary but I haven't got it with me.
examples.chinese: 她的地址在我记事本上，但是我没带记事本。

examples.english: She had her camera with her on the hike.
examples.chinese: 她去远足时带着照相机。

examples.english: You should have your identity card with you at all times.
examples.chinese: 你应该随身带着身份证。

expressions.text: have something handy/have something to hand

examples.english: When you call, have your credit card handy.
examples.chinese: 你打电话的时候手边要备好信用卡。

examples.english: Before you begin make sure you have all the tools you need to hand.
examples.chinese: 开始之前一定要准备好所有要用的工具。

expressions.text: keep something handy/keep something to hand

examples.english: Keep a fire extinguisher handy in the kitchen.
examples.chinese: 厨房里要备有一个灭火器。

examples.english: Keep important telephone numbers to hand by the telephone.
examples.chinese: 把重要的电话号码放在电话机旁边。

examples.english: The man who was arrested had an illegal firearm in his possession.
examples.chinese: 那名被捕的男子非法持有火器。

examples.english: The drugs he had in his possession had an estimated street value of $15,000.
examples.chinese: 他持有的毒品黑市价估计达15,000美元。

centers.english: to have something that you do not want

examples.english: It's only a rented house, so we're stuck with the decor.
examples.chinese: 这只是租来的房子，所以这样的装修我们只能将就了。

examples.english: As a result of the financial collapse many people are stuck with worthless investments.
examples.chinese: 由于金融崩溃，许多人手上都只得拿着一些毫无价值的投资。

centers.english: to have a particular feature, quality, or ability
centers.chinese: 具有某种特征、品质或能力

examples.english: Although she's eighty she has an excellent memory.
examples.chinese: 她虽然已经80岁了，可是记忆力非常好。

examples.english: Kids have wonderful imaginations, and it is natural for them to create imaginary friends.
examples.chinese: 儿童有着丰富的想象力，他们自然就会想象出一些朋友来。

examples.english: The hotel only had two double rooms and they were both occupied.
examples.chinese: 这家旅店只有两间双人房，而且都已有住客了。

examples.english: The jacket has two side pockets and two more pockets inside.
examples.chinese: 这件夹克两边都有口袋，里面还有两个口袋。

examples.english: Her brother's got long dark hair and blue eyes.
examples.chinese: 她哥哥有一头长黑发，长着一双蓝眼睛。

examples.english: We booked a room with a sea view.
examples.chinese: 我们订了一间海景房。

examples.english: The company needs more people with marketing experience.
examples.chinese: 公司需要更多有市场推广经验的人。

examples.english: Katrina's over there in front of that man with red hair.
examples.chinese: 卡特里娜在那儿，那个红头发男人的前面。

examples.english: It's a big house - there are five bedrooms.
examples.chinese: 房子很大—有五间卧室。

examples.english: There are lots of old temples and gardens to visit in Kyoto.
examples.chinese: 京都有许多古寺和花园可以游览。

examples.english: There's an Olympic-sized swimming pool on campus.
examples.chinese: 校园里有一个具有奥运会规模的游泳池。

examples.english: He possessed an unusual ability to learn languages quickly.
examples.chinese: 他有一种特殊的能力，学语言很快。

examples.english: Like all towns and villages on Trinidad, it possessed a cricket ground.
examples.chinese: 和特立尼达的所有村镇一样，这儿也有一个板球场。

examples.english: The Western Highlands possess a beauty and a majesty found nowhere else in Britain.
examples.chinese: 西部高地的风光雄伟壮丽，这在英国其他地方是没有的。

examples.english: Father was a man of great integrity and honesty.
examples.chinese: 父亲是个非常正直诚实的人。

examples.english: an area of outstanding beauty
examples.chinese: 风景秀丽的地区

examples.english: She was an actress of great skill.
examples.chinese: 她是个演技精湛的演员。

examples.english: Some of the workers enjoy a relatively high degree of job security.
examples.chinese: 其中有些工人工作比较稳定。

examples.english: When first introduced on the market, these products enjoyed great success.
examples.chinese: 这些产品刚刚引入市场就大受欢迎。

examples.english: Londoners are blessed with some of the very best Thai restaurants in the country.
examples.chinese: 伦敦人有福气，他们有英国最好的一些泰国餐馆。

examples.english: Justine was unfortunately not blessed with a sense of humour.
examples.chinese: 贾斯廷真是不幸，没有一丁点幽默感。

examples.english: Few gardens are blessed with an ideal site.
examples.chinese: 很少有花园位于理想的地段。

examples.english: Hugh was young, handsome, and endowed with the privileges of class and education.
examples.chinese: 休年轻英俊，生来就有贵族和教育的特权。

examples.english: Jefferson wrote that all citizens were endowed with ‘the rights to life, liberty, and the pursuit of happiness.’
examples.chinese: 杰斐逊写道，所有公民都被赋予“生命权、自由权和追求幸福的权利。”

examples.english: The golf course is surrounded by hills and boasts some of the finest scenery in the country.
examples.chinese: 这个高尔夫球场群山环抱，拥有国内最美丽的景色。

examples.english: Each luxury home boasts an indoor pool and three-car garage.
examples.chinese: 每一所豪华居室都拥有一个室内游泳池和一间可停放三辆汽车的车库。

centers.english: to not have something

expressions.gram: verb phrase not in progressive or passive

examples.english: I don't have any brothers or sisters.
examples.chinese: 我没有兄弟姐妹。

examples.english: My parents haven't got a television.
examples.chinese: 我父母没有电视机。

examples.english: The store didn't have the right type of glue in stock.
examples.chinese: 这家商店没有合用的胶水。

examples.english: She hasn't got anything to wear for her interview.
examples.chinese: 她去面试没有衣服可穿。

examples.english: Haven't we got any more tomatoes? I need some for the salad.
examples.chinese: 我们没有番茄了吗？我做沙拉要用。

examples.english: I'm sorry, I don't seem to have my credit card with me -- can I pay by cheque?
examples.chinese: 不好意思，我好像没有带信用卡—我付支票行吗？

examples.english: Billy came to class without his school books.
examples.chinese: 比利没有带课本就去上课了。

examples.english: You can't get a passport without a birth certificate.
examples.chinese: 没有出生证就领不到护照。

examples.english: There are so many people without jobs that companies receive hundreds of applications to each advertisement.
examples.chinese: 没有工作的人很多，公司一登招聘启事就会收到数百封求职信。

examples.english: The schools are having to provide programs without adequate funding.
examples.chinese: 有些学校没有足够的经费，却又不得不开办这些课程。

examples.english: Two of her front teeth were missing.
examples.chinese: 她的两颗门牙掉了。

examples.english: When I put my hand inside my pocket I discovered that my wallet was missing.
examples.chinese: 我把手伸进口袋，发现我的钱包不见了。

examples.english: The dog has part of his left ear missing.
examples.chinese: 那条狗左耳缺了一块。

expressions.text: what's missing is/all that's missing is

examples.english: It's such a romantic setting -- all that's missing is the candles.
examples.chinese: 多浪漫的情调啊一唯一欠缺的就是蜡烛。

centers.english: to not have any more of something

expressions.text: not have any more/not have any left

examples.english: That was my last one -- I don't have any more.
examples.chinese: 那是我最后一个了，没有了。

examples.english: I didn't have any time left to finish.
examples.chinese: 我没有时间去完成了。!

examples.english: The theatre didn't have any seats left when I went to get tickets.
examples.chinese: 我去买票的时候，剧院里已经没有位子了。

examples.english: He didn't have any more questions.
examples.chinese: 他没有问题了。

examples.english: Looks like we're out of milk again -- can you go to the store for me?
examples.chinese: 看来我们又没有牛奶了一你帮我去商店跑一趟好吗?

examples.english: The store was out of the paint I wanted.
examples.chinese: 这家商店卖完了我要的油漆。

examples.english: In the end she ran out of patience and started yelling.
examples.chinese: 最后，她失去耐心，开始大叫了起来。

examples.english: Better take plenty of water -- we don't want to run out.
examples.chinese: 最好多带点水—不够用可不好了。

centers.english: to not have something you need

examples.english: Tom lacks confidence and needs a lot of encouragement.
examples.chinese: 汤姆缺少自信，需要多加鼓励。

examples.english: They lived in appalling conditions, lacking even the most primitive sanitation.
examples.chinese: 他们的生活条件令人震惊，甚至连最基本的卫生设施都没有。

examples.english: She showed a complete lack of interest in her own baby.
examples.chinese: 她对自己的宝宝毫无兴趣。

examples.english: Over a million people in the Sudan have been without supplies of food and water for several months.
examples.chinese: 那儿有一百多万人已经有好几个月没有食物和水供应了。

examples.english: Some towns are still without electricity after last week's storms.
examples.chinese: 上个星期的暴风雨之后，有些镇上到现在还是没有电。

examples.english: Lucas's soldiers had to go without food or water for several days.
examples.chinese: 卢卡斯手下的士兵好几天没有食物和水。

examples.english: New parents go without much sleep for at least the first few months.
examples.chinese: 初为父母的人最起码在头几个月里睡不了多少觉。

examples.english: There wasn't enough water to go around, and some people went without.
examples.chinese: 水不够大家分了，有些人就没有了。

examples.english: For three years I managed without pain-killing drugs.
examples.chinese: 我有三年时间没有吃止痛药。

examples.english: From May to November it is very hot, but the schools do without air-conditioning.
examples.chinese: 从5月份到11月份天气非常炎热，但学校里却没有空调设备。

examples.english: Many of the young people here had never before had to do without.
examples.chinese: 这里的许多年轻人以前从来都不曾缺少过什么。

expressions.text: through lack of something/for lack of something/for want of something

examples.english: Crops and animals died through lack of rain.
examples.chinese: 因为缺少雨水，庄稼和牲口都死了。

examples.english: The case was abandoned for lack of evidence.
examples.chinese: 因为缺乏证据，此案撤诉了。

examples.english: We haven't yet quite succeeded, but not for want of trying.
examples.chinese: 我们还没有完全成功，但并不是我们没去努力。

centers.english: to not allow yourself to have something you need
centers.chinese: 不允许自己拥有需要的东西

expressions.gram: intransitive/transitive phrasal verb not in passive

examples.english: His parents often did without lunch or supper so that he could have more.
examples.chinese: 他的父母经常不吃午饭或晚饭，好让他可以多吃一点。

examples.english: During the month of Ramadan, Muslims go without food and drink between the hours of sunrise and sunset.
examples.chinese: 斋月里，穆斯林从日出到日落的时间里不吃也不喝。

examples.english: Meat was expensive and a lot of people went without.
examples.chinese: 肉很贵，许多人就不吃了。

examples.english: Cuts have to be made, and city residents need to think about what services they can do without.
examples.chinese: 开支必须削减下来，市民们需要想想，哪些服务是可以省去不要的。

examples.english: Girls who constantly deny themselves food in order to get thin rarely do well at school.
examples.chinese: 经常为减肥不吃东西的女孩子，很少有学习成绩好的。

examples.english: I worked hard, lived frugally, and denied myself material goods in order to achieve financial security.
examples.chinese: 我工作勤奋，生活节俭，不让自己享受任何物质上的东西，为的就是要有经济上的保障。

examples.english: The sex education program encourages teens to abstain.
examples.chinese: 这个性教育节目劝勉青少年不要有性行为。

examples.english: Catholics are supposed to abstain from meat on Good Friday.
examples.chinese: 天主教徒在受难日当天要禁肉。

examples.english: Trial volunteers are told to abstain from watching TV for a month.
examples.chinese: 参加试验的志愿者被告知要禁看一个月的电视。

examples.english: a season of fasting and abstinence
examples.chinese: 禁食禁欲的季节

examples.english: Senior board members have offered to forgo their annual bonuses this year.
examples.chinese: 高层的董事会成员已经主动提出放弃今年的年度奖金。

examples.english: Novices were expected to forgo all earthly pleasures and concentrate on the hereafter.
examples.chinese: 见习修士必须放弃所有尘世间的乐趣，潜心于来世的问题。

centers.english: to not have a particular substance, quality, feature etc
centers.chinese: 没有某一物质、品质、特征等

expressions.gram: verb phrase not in progressive or passive

examples.english: He doesn't have much of a sense of humor.
examples.chinese: 他没有多少幽默感。

examples.english: Her little girl doesn't seem to have any fear at all.
examples.chinese: 她的小女儿好像什么都不怕。

examples.english: It doesn't really have any practical use.
examples.chinese: 这其实没有什么实际的效用。

examples.english: She said she hasn't got as much pain in her leg as she used to.
examples.chinese: 她说她的腿没有以前痛了。

examples.english: He lacked the energy to argue with him.
examples.chinese: 他没有精力和他争论。

examples.english: Many people lack adequate pension arrangements.
examples.chinese: 许多人都没有足够的养老金安排。

examples.english: Glenn has the discipline that Forman lacks.
examples.chinese: 格伦有自我管制的能力，这是福曼所没有的。

examples.english: ‘With or without sugar?’ ‘Without, please!’
examples.chinese: “放不放糖？”“不放，谢谢！”

examples.english: ‘Gourmet Food without Salt’ is aimed at people with high-blood pressure.
examples.chinese: “无盐美食”是给血压高的人食用的。

examples.english: He was without any sense whatsoever.
examples.chinese: 他根本没有头脑。

examples.english: There aren't enough ladies’ rooms at the stadium.
examples.chinese: 体育场里没有足够的女洗手间。

examples.english: There wasn't a decent restaurant for miles.
examples.chinese: 几英里之内没有一家像样的餐馆。

examples.english: The new shampoo uses only natural products and is completely free from artificial colouring and preservatives.
examples.chinese: 这种新的洗发水只用天然原料，不含任何人工色素和防腐剂。

examples.english: Organic produce is free from harmful chemicals.
examples.chinese: 有机农产品不含有害化学物质。

examples.english: a sugar-free soft drink
examples.chinese: 无糖软饮料

examples.english: It looks like wine and tastes like wine, but it's almost alcohol-free.
examples.chinese: 这看上去像葡萄酒，喝起来也像葡萄酒，但却几乎不含酒精。

centers.english: to no longer have something important

examples.english: I'll lose my job if the factory closes.
examples.chinese: 如果工厂关门，我就要失业。

examples.english: We lost our home and all our belongings in the fire.
examples.chinese: 我们在大火中失去了家园，失去了所有的东西。

examples.english: Professor Wilkes lost his sight in an accident three years ago.
examples.chinese: 威尔克斯教授在三年前的一场事故中丧失了视力。

examples.english: Another mistake like that could cost you your job.
examples.chinese: 那样的错误再犯一次，你就会丢掉工作。

examples.english: All this delay has cost the company an important contract.
examples.chinese: 这种延误已经使公司丢掉了一份重要的合同。

examples.english: Larry's years of hard drinking and living almost cost him his life.
examples.chinese: 拉里长期酗酒和艰苦的生活差一点要了他的命。

examples.english: An increase in profits was achieved, but only at the cost of hundreds of jobs.
examples.chinese: 利润增加是实现了，但代价却是有数百人丢了工作。

expressions.text: be a high price to pay for

examples.english: The pollution of our rivers is a high price to pay for agricultural development
examples.chinese: 我们的河流遭到污染，是发展农业所付出的一个巨大代价。

examples.english: Most people know now that getting sunburnt is a high price to pay for a quick tan.
examples.chinese: 大多数人现在知道，晒伤是短时间里晒黑皮肤所要付出的高昂代价。

expressions.text: be too high a price to pay (for)

examples.english: The new road has made life easier for commuters, but some say it is too high a price to pay.
examples.chinese: 这条新修的道路给通勤者的生活带来了方便，但是有些人说代价太大了。
